salary: Monthly pension of Rs. 3000 after 60 years.
how_to_apply: Visit the nearest Common Service Centre (CSC) or apply online through the PM-LVMY portal. Provide Aadhaar, business proof, bank account details, and make the initial contribution.
meta_title: Pradhan Mantri Laghu Vyapari Maan-dhan Yojana (PM-LVMY) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PM-LVMY is a voluntary pension scheme for small shopkeepers and self-employed persons. It provides a monthly pension of Rs. 3000 after the age of 60 years.
content:
### Benefits
- Assured monthly pension of Rs. 3000 after 60 years.
- Family pension of 50% to spouse after beneficiary's death.
- Government matching contribution.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Business proof (e.g., GST registration, shop license)
- Savings bank account
- Mobile number
- Age proof

### How to Apply
1. Visit a CSC or the official PM-LVMY portal.
2. Fill the enrollment form with personal, business, and bank details.
3. Verify Aadhaar and business documents.
4. Make the initial contribution.
5. Receive registration confirmation.

title: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP)
department: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
overview: PMEGP is a credit-linked subsidy scheme for generating employment by setting up micro-enterprises. It provides financial assistance for new projects in manufacturing, service, and trading sectors.
eligibility: Individuals above 18 years, with at least 8th standard pass for projects above Rs. 10 lakh. Self-help groups, institutions, and cooperatives are also eligible.
age_limit: Minimum 18 years
salary: Subsidy of 15-35% of project cost (max Rs. 35 lakh for manufacturing, Rs. 10 lakh for service).
how_to_apply: Apply online through the PMEGP portal. Submit project proposal, documents, and obtain loan from a scheduled bank.
meta_title: Prime Minister's Employment Generation Programme (PMEGP) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PMEGP is a credit-linked subsidy scheme for generating employment by setting up micro-enterprises. It provides financial assistance for new projects in man
content:
### Benefits
- Subsidy on project cost (15-35% for general, 25-35% for special categories).
- Loan from bank with easy repayment terms.
- Employment generation for self and others.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Educational qualification certificate
- Project report
- Land/building documents (if applicable)
- Caste certificate (if applicable)

### How to Apply
1. Visit the PMEGP portal and register.
2. Fill the application form with project details.
3. Upload required documents.
4. Submit to the concerned bank branch.
5. Bank appraises and sanctions loan; subsidy is released.

title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram (PMJVK)
overview: PMJVK is a central sector scheme for the development of minority concentration areas. It aims to provide infrastructure and basic amenities to improve the quality of life of minorities.
eligibility: Minority concentration areas (blocks, towns, districts) with at least 25% minority population as per census.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Funding for infrastructure projects like schools, health centers, skill development centers, etc.
how_to_apply: Implemented by state/UT governments. Proposals are submitted by district authorities to the ministry.
meta_title: Pradhan Mantri Jan Vikas Karyakram (PMJVK) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PMJVK is a central sector scheme for the development of minority concentration areas. It aims to provide infrastructure and basic amenities to improve the
content:
### Benefits
- Infrastructure development in minority concentration areas.
- Provision of schools, health centers, skill centers, and other amenities.
- Employment generation through construction and skill training.

### Documents Required
- Project proposals from district authorities.
- Demographic data showing minority concentration.
- Land availability documents.

### How to Apply
1. District authorities identify minority concentration areas.
2. Prepare project proposals with cost estimates.
3. Submit to the state government for forwarding to the Ministry of Minority Affairs.
4. Ministry approves and releases funds.

title: Prime Minister's Development Initiative for North East Region (PM DevINE)
department: Ministry of Development of North Eastern Region
overview: PM DevINE is a central sector scheme for infrastructure development in the North East Region. It funds projects in sectors like road connectivity, water supply, power, and education.
eligibility: States in the North East Region (Arunachal Pradesh, Assam, Manipur, Meghalaya, Mizoram, Nagaland, Sikkim, Tripura).
age_limit: N/A
salary: 100% central funding for projects up to Rs. 100 crore per project.
how_to_apply: State governments submit project proposals to the Ministry of DoNER for approval.
meta_title: Prime Minister's Development Initiative for North East Region (PM DevINE) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PM DevINE is a central sector scheme for infrastructure development in the North East Region. It funds projects in sectors like road connectivity, water su
content:
### Benefits
- 100% central funding for infrastructure projects.
- Focus on sectors like road, water supply, power, education, and health.
- Employment generation and economic development.

### Documents Required
- Detailed project report (DPR).
- Land availability certificate.
- State government recommendation.

### How to Apply
1. State government identifies priority projects.
2. Prepare DPR with cost estimates and feasibility.
3. Submit to Ministry of DoNER through the state nodal department.
4. Ministry evaluates and approves projects.

title: PM Gati Shakti National Master Plan
overview: PM Gati Shakti is a digital platform for integrated planning and coordinated implementation of infrastructure projects. It aims to reduce logistics costs and improve connectivity.
eligibility: Central and state government departments, infrastructure ministries, and private sector entities.
age_limit: N/A
salary: N/A (It is a planning platform, not a direct benefit scheme).
how_to_apply: Departments and ministries use the platform for project planning. No direct public application.
meta_title: PM Gati Shakti National Master Plan 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PM Gati Shakti is a digital platform for integrated planning and coordinated implementation of infrastructure projects. It aims to reduce logistics costs a
content:
### Benefits
- Integrated planning of infrastructure projects.
- Reduced logistics costs and improved supply chain efficiency.
- Faster project implementation through data-driven decision making.

### Documents Required
- N/A (for public).

### How to Apply
- The platform is used by government departments for planning. No public application process.

title: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE)
department: Ministry of Micro, Small and Medium Enterprises
overview: CGTMSE provides credit guarantee coverage to banks for collateral-free loans to micro and small enterprises. It facilitates easy access to credit for MSEs.
eligibility: Micro and small enterprises (manufacturing and service) as per MSME definition. New and existing units are eligible.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Guarantee coverage up to 85% of the loan amount (max Rs. 2 crore for MSEs, Rs. 5 crore for women/SC/ST).
how_to_apply: Apply for a loan at a member lending institution (bank/NBFC). The institution will avail guarantee from CGTMSE.
meta_title: Credit Guarantee Fund Trust for Micro and Small Enterprises (CGTMSE) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: CGTMSE provides credit guarantee coverage to banks for collateral-free loans to micro and small enterprises. It facilitates easy access to credit for MSEs.
content:
### Benefits
- Collateral-free loans up to Rs. 2 crore (Rs. 5 crore for women/SC/ST).
- Guarantee coverage reduces risk for lenders.
- Lower interest rates due to reduced risk.

### Documents Required
- Loan application form.
- Business plan and financials.
- KYC documents.
- MSME registration certificate.

### How to Apply
1. Approach a member lending institution (bank/NBFC).
2. Submit loan application with required documents.
3. Bank processes loan and applies for guarantee from CGTMSE.
4. Loan is sanctioned with guarantee coverage.

title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS)
department: Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship
overview: NAPS promotes apprenticeship training by providing financial incentives to employers and apprentices. It aims to enhance skill development and employability.
eligibility: Employers (establishments) and apprentices (youth aged 14-35 years with minimum educational qualification as per trade).
age_limit: 14-35 years
salary: Stipend to apprentices (minimum 70% of minimum wage for semi-skilled workers) and government reimbursement of 25% of stipend (up to Rs. 1,500 per month) to employers.
how_to_apply: Employers register on the apprenticeship portal and post vacancies. Apprentices apply online through the portal.
meta_title: National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: NAPS promotes apprenticeship training by providing financial incentives to employers and apprentices. It aims to enhance skill development and employabilit
content:
### Benefits
- Apprentices gain practical skills and a stipend.
- Employers get skilled workforce and reimbursement of 25% of stipend.
- Enhanced employability for youth.

### Documents Required
- For apprentices: Aadhaar, educational certificates, age proof.
- For employers: Business registration, GST, etc.

### How to Apply
1. Employers register on the apprenticeship portal.
2. Post apprenticeship vacancies with trade details.
3. Apprentices search and apply for positions.
4. Employer selects and onboards apprentices.
5. Government reimburses 25% of stipend to employer.

title: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana (RVY)
department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
overview: RVY provides free assistive devices to senior citizens with age-related disabilities. It aims to improve the quality of life of elderly persons.
eligibility: Senior citizens aged 60 years and above with age-related disabilities (low vision, hearing impairment, loco-motor disability, etc.) and belonging to BPL families.
age_limit: 60 years and above
salary: Free assistive devices like walking sticks, crutches, hearing aids, wheelchairs, etc.
how_to_apply: Apply through the nearest ALIMCO (Artificial Limbs Manufacturing Corporation of India) office or district social welfare office. Camps are organized for distribution.
meta_title: Rashtriya Vayoshri Yojana (RVY) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: RVY provides free assistive devices to senior citizens with age-related disabilities. It aims to improve the quality of life of elderly persons.
content:
### Benefits
- Free assistive devices to eligible senior citizens.
- Devices include walking sticks, crutches, hearing aids, wheelchairs, etc.
- Improved mobility and independence.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Age proof (birth certificate or any government ID)
- BPL certificate
- Medical certificate for disability (if required)

### How to Apply
1. Visit the nearest ALIMCO office or district social welfare office.
2. Fill the application form with personal details.
3. Submit required documents.
4. Attend the distribution camp organized by ALIMCO.
5. Receive the assistive device after verification.

title: Pradhan Mantri Daksh Yojana
department: Ministry of Social Justice and Empowerment
overview: PM Daksh Yojana is a skill development scheme for marginalized sections (SC, ST, OBC, etc.). It provides training and placement assistance to enhance employability.
eligibility: SC, ST, OBC, EWS, and other marginalized communities. Age 18-45 years. Educational qualification as per course.
age_limit: 18-45 years
salary: Free skill training with stipend (up to Rs. 3,000 per month) and placement assistance.
how_to_apply: Apply online through the PM Daksh portal or visit the nearest training center. Registration is done through the portal.
meta_title: Pradhan Mantri Daksh Yojana 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PM Daksh Yojana is a skill development scheme for marginalized sections (SC, ST, OBC, etc.). It provides training and placement assistance to enhance emplo
content:
### Benefits
- Free skill training in various trades.
- Stipend during training (up to Rs. 3,000 per month).
- Placement assistance after training.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Caste certificate (SC/ST/OBC/EWS)
- Educational certificates
- Age proof
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Visit the PM Daksh portal.
2. Register with Aadhaar and mobile number.
3. Choose a training course and center.
4. Submit application and documents.
5. Attend training and receive stipend.
6. Get placement assistance after completion.

title: Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM)
department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (Urban) / Ministry of Jal Shakti (Rural)
overview: SBM is a national campaign for cleanliness and sanitation. It aims to eliminate open defecation and improve solid waste management.
eligibility: All households, communities, and institutions in rural and urban areas.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Financial assistance for construction of individual household toilets (Rs. 12,000 per toilet) and community toilets.
how_to_apply: Apply through the local gram panchayat (rural) or municipal corporation (urban). Online application available on the SBM portal.
meta_title: Swachh Bharat Mission (SBM) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: SBM is a national campaign for cleanliness and sanitation. It aims to eliminate open defecation and improve solid waste management.
content:
### Benefits
- Financial assistance for toilet construction.
- Improved sanitation and health.
- Open defecation free (ODF) status for communities.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- BPL certificate (if applicable)
- Land ownership proof (for toilet construction)
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Visit the local gram panchayat or municipal office.
2. Fill the application form for toilet construction.
3. Submit required documents.
4. After verification, funds are released for construction.
5. Construction is completed and inspected.

title: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation (AMRUT)
department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
overview: AMRUT is a central scheme for urban infrastructure development. It focuses on water supply, sewerage, storm water drainage, urban transport, and green spaces.
eligibility: Selected cities and towns (500+ with population over 1 lakh, and all capital cities).
age_limit: N/A
salary: Central funding for infrastructure projects (50% for cities with population >10 lakh, 33% for others).
how_to_apply: Implemented by state urban development departments. Projects are proposed by urban local bodies and approved by the state and central government.
meta_title: Atal Mission for Rejuvenation and Urban Transformation (AMRUT) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: AMRUT is a central scheme for urban infrastructure development. It focuses on water supply, sewerage, storm water drainage, urban transport, and green spac
content:
### Benefits
- Improved water supply and sewerage systems.
- Better storm water drainage and urban transport.
- Creation of green spaces and parks.

### Documents Required
- Detailed project reports (DPRs) from urban local bodies.
- State government approval.

### How to Apply
1. Urban local body identifies infrastructure gaps.
2. Prepare DPR with cost estimates.
3. Submit to state government for scrutiny.
4. State government forwards to Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs.
5. Ministry approves and releases funds.

title: Smart Cities Mission
department: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs
overview: Smart Cities Mission aims to develop 100 smart cities with core infrastructure and a decent quality of life. It focuses on sustainable and inclusive development.
eligibility: 100 selected cities through a competition process.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Central funding of Rs. 500 crore per city over 5 years, with matching contribution from state/ULB.
how_to_apply: Implemented by Special Purpose Vehicles (SPVs) in each city. No direct public application.
meta_title: Smart Cities Mission 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Smart Cities Mission aims to develop 100 smart cities with core infrastructure and a decent quality of life. It focuses on sustainable and inclusive develo
content:
### Benefits
- Improved infrastructure: water, electricity, sanitation, transport.
- Smart solutions: IT-enabled services, e-governance.
- Enhanced quality of life and economic opportunities.

### Documents Required
- N/A (for public).

### How to Apply
- Projects are implemented by city SPVs. Citizens can participate through consultations and feedback.

title: Sansad Adarsh Gram Yojana (SAGY)
overview: SAGY is a rural development scheme where MPs adopt villages to develop them as model villages. It focuses on integrated development in all aspects.
eligibility: Villages selected by Members of Parliament (MPs) from their constituency.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Central and state funds for development projects; no direct cash benefit to individuals.
how_to_apply: Villages are selected by MPs. No direct public application.
meta_title: Sansad Adarsh Gram Yojana (SAGY) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: SAGY is a rural development scheme where MPs adopt villages to develop them as model villages. It focuses on integrated development in all aspects.
content:
### Benefits
- Holistic development of villages: infrastructure, health, education, sanitation.
- Improved quality of life and livelihood opportunities.
- Model village concept for replication.

### Documents Required
- N/A (for public).

### How to Apply
- Villages are identified by MPs. Community participation is encouraged through gram sabhas.

title: SVAMITVA Scheme
overview: SVAMITVA (Survey of Villages and Mapping with Improvised Technology in Village Areas) is a central scheme aimed at providing property rights to rural households by mapping land parcels using drone technology. It enables villagers to use their property as a financial asset for loans and other benefits.
eligibility: All rural households with unencumbered land in villages covered under the scheme.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Property card (record of rights) issued to beneficiaries, enabling access to bank loans and other financial benefits.
how_to_apply: No direct application; scheme is implemented by state revenue departments. Villagers should contact their local Gram Panchayat or revenue officer for inclusion.
meta_title: SVAMITVA Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: SVAMITVA (Survey of Villages and Mapping with Improvised Technology in Village Areas) is a central scheme aimed at providing property rights to rural house
content:
### Benefits
- Provides legal ownership of property (property card) to rural households.
- Enables villagers to use property as collateral for loans.
- Helps in better planning and revenue collection for villages.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Land records (if available)
- Proof of residence

### How to Apply
1. The scheme is implemented by the state government in coordination with the Ministry of Panchayati Raj.
2. Beneficiaries are identified through drone surveys conducted by the state.
3. No individual application is required; contact local Gram Panchayat for updates.

title: Mission Indradhanush
department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
overview: Mission Indradhanush is a central immunization program aimed at vaccinating all unvaccinated and partially vaccinated children under 2 years and pregnant women against 12 vaccine-preventable diseases. It targets to achieve 90% full immunization coverage in India.
eligibility: Children up to 2 years of age and pregnant women who have missed routine vaccinations.
age_limit: 0-2 years for children; pregnant women of any age.
salary: Free vaccination against 12 diseases (diphtheria, whooping cough, tetanus, polio, tuberculosis, hepatitis B, measles, rubella, Japanese encephalitis, rotavirus, pneumococcal disease, and diarrhea).
how_to_apply: Visit the nearest government health facility or Anganwadi center during immunization sessions. No online application; walk-in basis.
meta_title: Mission Indradhanush 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Mission Indradhanush is a central immunization program aimed at vaccinating all unvaccinated and partially vaccinated children under 2 years and pregnant w
content:
### Benefits
- Free vaccination for children and pregnant women.
- Protection against 12 life-threatening diseases.
- Reduces child mortality and morbidity.

### Documents Required
- Child's birth certificate or immunization card (if available)
- Mother's Aadhaar card

### How to Apply
1. Check the immunization schedule at your local health center or Anganwadi.
2. Visit the center on the designated day with your child or if pregnant.
3. Vaccination is provided free of cost.

title: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK)
department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
overview: RBSK is a central health screening program for children aged 0-18 years to detect and manage 30 health conditions including defects at birth, diseases, deficiencies, and developmental delays. It aims to improve child health through early intervention.
eligibility: All children from birth to 18 years of age, especially those in government schools and Anganwadi centers.
age_limit: 0-18 years
salary: Free health screening and treatment (including surgeries) for identified conditions at government hospitals or empaneled facilities.
how_to_apply: Children are screened at Anganwadi centers and government schools by mobile health teams. Parents can also bring children to nearby health facilities for screening.
meta_title: Rashtriya Bal Swasthya Karyakram (RBSK) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: RBSK is a central health screening program for children aged 0-18 years to detect and manage 30 health conditions including defects at birth, diseases, def
content:
### Benefits
- Early detection of health issues in children.
- Free treatment and referral for 30 health conditions.
- Reduces disability and improves quality of life.

### Documents Required
- Child's Aadhaar card (if available)
- Parent's ID proof

### How to Apply
1. Screening is conducted by mobile health teams at schools and Anganwadi centers.
2. Parents can also visit the nearest Community Health Center (CHC) or District Hospital for screening.
3. If a condition is detected, referral to a higher center is provided.

title: PM National Dialysis Program
department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
overview: The Pradhan Mantri National Dialysis Program provides free dialysis services to poor patients suffering from chronic kidney disease. It is implemented under the National Health Mission (NHM) in district hospitals across India.
eligibility: Patients with chronic kidney disease requiring dialysis, especially those below the poverty line (BPL) or from economically weaker sections.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Free dialysis sessions at government district hospitals; includes consumables and medicines.
how_to_apply: Visit the nearest district hospital or government medical college with a referral from a doctor. Registration is done at the hospital's dialysis unit.
meta_title: PM National Dialysis Program 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: The Pradhan Mantri National Dialysis Program provides free dialysis services to poor patients suffering from chronic kidney disease. It is implemented unde
content:
### Benefits
- Free dialysis for poor patients.
- Reduces out-of-pocket expenditure.
- Access to dialysis in district hospitals.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- BPL certificate (if applicable)
- Doctor's prescription/referral

### How to Apply
1. Obtain a referral from a government doctor.
2. Visit the dialysis unit at the district hospital.
3. Register with required documents and schedule sessions.

title: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM)
department: Ministry of Health and Family Welfare
overview: ABDM aims to create a digital health ecosystem by providing every citizen with a unique health ID (Ayushman Bharat Health Account - ABHA) that stores their medical records digitally. It enables seamless sharing of health data across healthcare providers.
eligibility: All Indian citizens (no income or age restriction).
age_limit: N/A
salary: Free creation of ABHA ID; access to digital health records and services.
how_to_apply: Download the ABDM app or visit the official website. Provide Aadhaar or mobile number to generate ABHA ID.
meta_title: Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission (ABDM) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: ABDM aims to create a digital health ecosystem by providing every citizen with a unique health ID (Ayushman Bharat Health Account - ABHA) that stores their
content:
### Benefits
- Single digital health ID for all medical records.
- Easy access to health history.
- Consent-based sharing with doctors.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card (optional) or mobile number

### How to Apply
1. Download the 'Ayushman Bharat Digital Mission' app or visit the website.
2. Click on 'Create ABHA'.
3. Enter Aadhaar or mobile number and verify via OTP.
4. Set a PIN and complete registration.

title: One Nation One Ration Card (ONORC) Scheme
department: Ministry of Consumer Affairs, Food and Public Distribution
overview: ONORC enables portability of ration cards across India, allowing beneficiaries to access subsidized food grains from any Fair Price Shop (FPS) in the country. It ensures food security for migrant workers and their families.
eligibility: All ration cardholders under the National Food Security Act (NFSA) who have Aadhaar-seeded ration cards.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Subsidized food grains (wheat at Rs. 2/kg, rice at Rs. 3/kg) as per NFSA entitlement.
how_to_apply: No separate application; ensure your ration card is Aadhaar-seeded. To use portability, visit any FPS in another state and provide Aadhaar for biometric authentication.
meta_title: One Nation One Ration Card (ONORC) Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: ONORC enables portability of ration cards across India, allowing beneficiaries to access subsidized food grains from any Fair Price Shop (FPS) in the count
content:
### Benefits
- Access ration from any state.
- Helps migrant workers.
- Reduces exclusion.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar-seeded ration card
- Aadhaar card

### How to Apply
1. Ensure your ration card is linked with Aadhaar.
2. Visit any FPS in the country.
3. Provide Aadhaar and authenticate via biometric.
4. Receive your entitled food grains.

title: PM-PRANAM Yojana
overview: PM-PRANAM (Pradhan Mantri Promotion of Alternate Nutrients for Agriculture Management Yojana) is a central scheme to promote balanced use of fertilizers and reduce subsidy burden. It incentivizes states to adopt alternative fertilizers like nano urea and organic manure.
eligibility: State governments; farmers indirectly benefit through reduced fertilizer costs.
age_limit: N/A
salary: States receive incentives for reducing chemical fertilizer usage; farmers get access to subsidized alternative fertilizers.
how_to_apply: Farmers can purchase alternative fertilizers from authorized dealers. States implement the scheme through agriculture departments.
meta_title: PM-PRANAM Yojana 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PM-PRANAM (Pradhan Mantri Promotion of Alternate Nutrients for Agriculture Management Yojana) is a central scheme to promote balanced use of fertilizers an
content:
### Benefits
- Promotes sustainable agriculture.
- Reduces fertilizer subsidy.
- Encourages use of nano urea and organic fertilizers.

### Documents Required
- Farmer ID or land records (for subsidy)

### How to Apply
1. Visit authorized fertilizer dealer.
2. Purchase alternative fertilizers at subsidized rates.
3. State agriculture department provides guidance.

title: GOBARdhan Scheme
overview: GOBARdhan (Galvanizing Organic Bio-Agro Resources Dhan) is a central scheme under Swachh Bharat Mission to convert cattle dung and organic waste into biogas, compost, and bio-CNG. It promotes circular economy and rural sanitation.
eligibility: Village communities, farmers, and entrepreneurs; implemented through Gram Panchayats.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Financial assistance for setting up biogas plants; income from sale of biogas and compost.
how_to_apply: Contact local Gram Panchayat or district Swachh Bharat Mission office. Apply through state nodal agency.
meta_title: GOBARdhan Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: GOBARdhan (Galvanizing Organic Bio-Agro Resources Dhan) is a central scheme under Swachh Bharat Mission to convert cattle dung and organic waste into bioga
content:
### Benefits
- Waste-to-wealth generation.
- Clean fuel and organic fertilizer.
- Additional income for farmers.

### Documents Required
- Land ownership proof
- Aadhaar card
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Approach Gram Panchayat or SBM office.
2. Submit application for setting up a biogas plant.
3. Receive technical and financial support.

title: SATAT Initiative
department: Ministry of Petroleum and Natural Gas
overview: SATAT (Sustainable Alternative Towards Affordable Transportation) is a central initiative to promote production of compressed biogas (CBG) from organic waste. It aims to set up 5,000 CBG plants by 2023-24, providing clean fuel and reducing import dependence.
eligibility: Entrepreneurs, farmers, and cooperatives willing to set up CBG plants; also vehicle owners using CBG.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Financial incentives and market linkage for CBG producers; affordable fuel for consumers.
how_to_apply: Visit the SATAT portal or contact oil marketing companies (OMCs) for setting up plants. For CBG as fuel, visit authorized OMC outlets.
meta_title: SATAT Initiative 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: SATAT (Sustainable Alternative Towards Affordable Transportation) is a central initiative to promote production of compressed biogas (CBG) from organic was
content:
### Benefits
- Clean energy from waste.
- Reduces pollution and imports.
- Income for waste suppliers.

### Documents Required
- Business plan
- Land documents
- Environmental clearance

### How to Apply
1. Register on SATAT portal.
2. Submit proposal to OMCs.
3. Get approval and set up plant.

title: FAME India Scheme (Phase II)
department: Ministry of Heavy Industries and Public Enterprises
overview: FAME (Faster Adoption and Manufacturing of Hybrid and Electric Vehicles) India Phase II is a central scheme to promote electric mobility by providing subsidies on electric vehicles (EVs) and charging infrastructure. It aims to reduce vehicular pollution and fuel import.
eligibility: Buyers of electric two-wheelers, three-wheelers, four-wheelers, and buses; also manufacturers and charging infrastructure providers.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Subsidy on purchase of EVs (e.g., up to Rs. 15,000 per kWh for two-wheelers); incentives for charging stations.
how_to_apply: Purchase an eligible EV from a registered dealer; the subsidy is deducted from the ex-showroom price. For charging stations, apply through state nodal agencies.
meta_title: FAME India Scheme (Phase II) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: FAME (Faster Adoption and Manufacturing of Hybrid and Electric Vehicles) India Phase II is a central scheme to promote electric mobility by providing subsi
content:
### Benefits
- Reduced purchase cost of EVs.
- Lower running and maintenance costs.
- Environmental benefits.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Address proof
- Vehicle registration documents

### How to Apply
1. Choose an eligible EV model from FAME II list.
2. Purchase from authorized dealer; subsidy is applied at point of sale.
3. Dealer handles documentation.

title: PM KUSUM Scheme
department: Ministry of New and Renewable Energy
overview: PM KUSUM (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan) is a central scheme to promote solar energy in agriculture. It provides subsidies for installing solar pumps and grid-connected solar power plants on farmland, helping farmers generate income and reduce electricity costs.
eligibility: Farmers with land ownership; individual farmers, cooperatives, and farmer producer organizations (FPOs).
age_limit: N/A
salary: Subsidy of up to 60% for solar pumps (30% central, 30% state); farmers can sell surplus power to grid.
how_to_apply: Apply through the state nodal agency (usually state renewable energy department) or online portal. Submit land documents and application form.
meta_title: PM KUSUM Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PM KUSUM (Pradhan Mantri Kisan Urja Suraksha evam Utthaan Mahabhiyan) is a central scheme to promote solar energy in agriculture. It provides subsidies for
content:
### Benefits
- Free solar power for irrigation.
- Additional income from selling surplus power.
- Reduces diesel dependency.

### Documents Required
- Land records
- Aadhaar card
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Visit state renewable energy department website.
2. Fill application form for solar pump or plant.
3. Submit documents and await approval.

title: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY)
department: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
overview: PMMSY is a central scheme to enhance fish production and productivity through sustainable aquaculture. It provides financial assistance for fish farming, infrastructure, and marketing, aiming to double fishermen's income.
eligibility: Fishermen, fish farmers, entrepreneurs, and cooperatives involved in fisheries and aquaculture.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Subsidy up to 40% for general category and 60% for SC/ST/women for various activities like pond construction, cages, and boats.
how_to_apply: Apply through the state fisheries department or online portal. Submit project proposal and required documents.
meta_title: PM Matsya Sampada Yojana (PMMSY) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PMMSY is a central scheme to enhance fish production and productivity through sustainable aquaculture. It provides financial assistance for fish farming, i
content:
### Benefits
- Increased fish production.
- Financial support for modern aquaculture.
- Better market access.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Land lease/ownership documents
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Visit state fisheries department or PMMSY portal.
2. Select appropriate component (e.g., pond, cage).
3. Submit application with project details.

title: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY)
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
overview: PKVY is a central scheme to promote organic farming among farmers. It provides financial assistance for certification, inputs, and marketing of organic produce, aiming to improve soil health and farmer income.
eligibility: Individual farmers, groups, and farmer producer organizations (FPOs) willing to adopt organic farming.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Financial assistance of Rs. 50,000 per hectare over 3 years (Rs. 20,000 in first year, Rs. 15,000 each in second and third year) for organic inputs and certification.
how_to_apply: Apply through the state agriculture department or online portal. Form a group or apply individually with land documents.
meta_title: Paramparagat Krishi Vikas Yojana (PKVY) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PKVY is a central scheme to promote organic farming among farmers. It provides financial assistance for certification, inputs, and marketing of organic pro
content:
### Benefits
- Promotes chemical-free farming.
- Higher price for organic produce.
- Soil health improvement.

### Documents Required
- Land records
- Aadhaar card
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Contact state agriculture department.
2. Form a farmer group (minimum 50 farmers) or apply individually.
3. Submit application and get approval.

title: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund (AIF)
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
overview: AIF is a central scheme to provide medium to long-term debt financing for post-harvest management infrastructure and community farming assets. It aims to improve farm gate value realization and reduce post-harvest losses.
eligibility: Farmers, FPOs, cooperatives, startups, and agri-entrepreneurs with viable projects for infrastructure like cold storage, warehouses, and processing units.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Interest subvention of 3% per annum on loans up to Rs. 2 crore; credit guarantee coverage for loans up to Rs. 2 crore.
how_to_apply: Apply through the online portal of the scheme or through empaneled banks. Submit project proposal and financial documents.
meta_title: Agriculture Infrastructure Fund (AIF) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: AIF is a central scheme to provide medium to long-term debt financing for post-harvest management infrastructure and community farming assets. It aims to i
content:
### Benefits
- Affordable loans for agri-infrastructure.
- Reduces post-harvest losses.
- Enhances farmer income.

### Documents Required
- Project report
- Land documents
- Financial statements

### How to Apply
1. Visit AIF portal.
2. Register and submit project details.
3. Approach a bank for loan under the scheme.

title: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises (PMFME)
overview: PMFME is a central scheme to formalize and support micro food processing enterprises. It provides financial assistance for technology upgradation, branding, and marketing, aiming to enhance competitiveness and income of small food processors.
eligibility: Existing micro food processing enterprises (including those in unorganized sector), FPOs, and self-help groups (SHGs) engaged in food processing.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Credit-linked capital subsidy of 35% of eligible project cost (max Rs. 10 lakh) for individual enterprises; seed capital of Rs. 40,000 per SHG member for working capital.
how_to_apply: Apply through the state implementing agency (SIA) or online portal. Submit business plan and required documents.
meta_title: PM Formalisation of Micro Food Processing Enterprises (PMFME) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PMFME is a central scheme to formalize and support micro food processing enterprises. It provides financial assistance for technology upgradation, branding
content:
### Benefits
- Financial support for modernization.
- Formalization of unorganized sector.
- Better market linkages.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Business plan
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Visit PMFME portal.
2. Register as an enterprise.
3. Submit business plan and apply for subsidy.

title: Samagra Shiksha Scheme
overview: Samagra Shiksha is an integrated scheme for school education covering pre-primary to senior secondary levels. It aims to ensure inclusive and equitable quality education, with a focus on improving learning outcomes and reducing dropout rates.
eligibility: All children aged 3-18 years, with special focus on girls, SC/ST, OBC, and children with disabilities.
age_limit: 3-18 years
salary: Free education, textbooks, uniforms, and transport allowance for eligible students.
how_to_apply: Apply through the school or state education department. Online registration via the Samagra Shiksha portal.
meta_title: Samagra Shiksha Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Samagra Shiksha is an integrated scheme for school education covering pre-primary to senior secondary levels. It aims to ensure inclusive and equitable qua
content:
### Benefits
- Free and compulsory education for children aged 6-14.
- Financial support for uniforms, textbooks, and transport.
- Special focus on girls and disadvantaged groups.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Birth certificate
- Caste certificate (if applicable)
- Income certificate
- Previous school records

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official Samagra Shiksha portal.
2. Register with basic details.
3. Fill in the application form.
4. Upload required documents.
5. Submit and take a printout for future reference.

title: PM-SHRI Schools Scheme
overview: PM-SHRI (Pradhan Mantri Schools for Rising India) aims to develop over 14,500 schools as model schools showcasing the National Education Policy 2020. These schools will have modern infrastructure, smart classrooms, and holistic education.
eligibility: Existing government schools selected through a competitive process. Students from all backgrounds can enroll.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Enhanced educational facilities, no direct financial benefit to students.
how_to_apply: Schools apply through the state education department. Students apply directly to the school.
meta_title: PM-SHRI Schools Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PM-SHRI (Pradhan Mantri Schools for Rising India) aims to develop over 14,500 schools as model schools showcasing the National Education Policy 2020. These
content:
### Benefits
- Modern infrastructure and smart classrooms.
- Focus on experiential learning and skill development.
- Access to quality education as per NEP 2020.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Birth certificate
- Previous school records
- Caste certificate (if applicable)

### How to Apply
1. Check the list of PM-SHRI schools in your area.
2. Visit the school for admission.
3. Submit required documents.
4. Complete the admission process as per school guidelines.

title: PM Research Fellowship (PMRF)
overview: PMRF is a flagship scheme to attract the best talent into PhD programs in top Indian institutions. It provides a generous fellowship, research grant, and opportunities for international exposure.
eligibility: Students who have completed or are in the final year of BTech, MTech, MSc, or equivalent with high academic performance. Selection through a national test and interview.
age_limit: Maximum 30 years at the time of application (relaxable for reserved categories).
salary: Fellowship of Rs. 70,000 per month for first 2 years, Rs. 75,000 for 3rd year, and Rs. 80,000 for 4th and 5th years, plus research grant of Rs. 2 lakh per year.
how_to_apply: Apply online through the PMRF portal during the application window. Appear for the national test and interview.
meta_title: PM Research Fellowship (PMRF) 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PMRF is a flagship scheme to attract the best talent into PhD programs in top Indian institutions. It provides a generous fellowship, research grant, and o
content:
### Benefits
- Monthly fellowship up to Rs. 80,000.
- Annual research grant of Rs. 2 lakh.
- International exposure and collaboration opportunities.

### Documents Required
- Academic transcripts
- Research proposal
- Letters of recommendation
- Identity proof
- Category certificate (if applicable)

### How to Apply
1. Visit the PMRF portal.
2. Register and fill the application form.
3. Upload required documents.
4. Appear for the national test.
5. If shortlisted, attend the interview.
6. Await final selection.

title: PM Van Dhan Yojana
overview: PM Van Dhan Yojana aims to enhance the income of tribal communities by leveraging their traditional knowledge of forest produce. It establishes Van Dhan Vikas Kendras for value addition and marketing of Minor Forest Produce (MFP).
eligibility: Tribal families and forest dwellers who collect Minor Forest Produce. Self-Help Groups (SHGs) and tribal cooperatives are eligible.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Income generation through sale of value-added forest products; initial training and infrastructure support.
how_to_apply: Apply through the state tribal department or local Van Dhan Vikas Kendra. Tribal groups can register as SHGs.
meta_title: PM Van Dhan Yojana 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PM Van Dhan Yojana aims to enhance the income of tribal communities by leveraging their traditional knowledge of forest produce. It establishes Van Dhan Vi
content:
### Benefits
- Skill development and training for value addition.
- Market linkage for forest produce.
- Financial support for setting up processing units.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Tribal certificate
- Bank account details
- Passport-size photo

### How to Apply
1. Contact the nearest Van Dhan Vikas Kendra.
2. Form a Self-Help Group (SHG) with other tribal members.
3. Register the SHG with the state tribal department.
4. Attend training programs.
5. Start processing and selling forest produce.

title: PM E-Drive Scheme
overview: PM E-Drive (Electric Drive) Scheme promotes electric vehicle adoption in India by providing subsidies for EV purchases and supporting charging infrastructure. It aims to reduce pollution and dependence on fossil fuels.
eligibility: Individuals, fleet operators, and businesses purchasing electric vehicles (2-wheelers, 3-wheelers, 4-wheelers, buses).
age_limit: N/A
salary: Subsidy of up to Rs. 1.5 lakh per vehicle depending on category and battery capacity.
how_to_apply: Apply through the FAME India portal or through authorized dealers. The subsidy is deducted from the vehicle price at the point of sale.
meta_title: PM E-Drive Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: PM E-Drive (Electric Drive) Scheme promotes electric vehicle adoption in India by providing subsidies for EV purchases and supporting charging infrastructu
content:
### Benefits
- Direct subsidy on EV purchase.
- Reduced GST on EVs.
- Support for charging infrastructure.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Address proof
- Bank account details
- Vehicle registration documents

### How to Apply
1. Visit an authorized EV dealer.
2. Select the vehicle and complete purchase.
3. Dealer will apply for subsidy on your behalf.
4. Subsidy amount is deducted from the invoice.
5. Alternatively, apply online via FAME portal for reimbursement.

title: Bharat-VISTAAR Scheme
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
overview: Bharat-VISTAAR (Village Information System for Technology and Agriculture Advancement) is a digital platform providing farmers with real-time information on weather, market prices, and best practices. It aims to enhance agricultural productivity and income.
eligibility: All farmers and agricultural stakeholders in India.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Free access to information and advisory services.
how_to_apply: Register on the Bharat-VISTAAR portal or mobile app. No fee required.
meta_title: Bharat-VISTAAR Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Bharat-VISTAAR (Village Information System for Technology and Agriculture Advancement) is a digital platform providing farmers with real-time information o
content:
### Benefits
- Real-time weather updates and alerts.
- Market price information for crops.
- Expert advice on farming techniques.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Mobile number
- Land records (optional)

### How to Apply
1. Download the Bharat-VISTAAR app or visit the website.
2. Create an account using your mobile number.
3. Fill in basic details.
4. Start accessing services.

title: Coconut Promotion Scheme
department: Ministry of Agriculture and Farmers Welfare
overview: The Coconut Promotion Scheme aims to increase coconut production and productivity through area expansion, rejuvenation of old gardens, and promotion of value-added products. It provides financial assistance to coconut farmers.
eligibility: Coconut farmers, especially small and marginal farmers, and coconut growers' societies.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Financial assistance of up to Rs. 20,000 per hectare for replanting and maintenance.
how_to_apply: Apply through the state agriculture department or Coconut Development Board (CDB) regional offices.
meta_title: Coconut Promotion Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: The Coconut Promotion Scheme aims to increase coconut production and productivity through area expansion, rejuvenation of old gardens, and promotion of val
content:
### Benefits
- Subsidy for planting material and maintenance.
- Training on best practices.
- Support for processing and marketing.

### Documents Required
- Land ownership documents
- Aadhaar card
- Bank account details
- Farmer ID

### How to Apply
1. Visit the nearest Coconut Development Board office.
2. Obtain the application form.
3. Fill in details and attach documents.
4. Submit to the board or state agriculture department.
5. Await inspection and approval.

title: Reservoir Development Scheme
department: Ministry of Fisheries, Animal Husbandry and Dairying
overview: The Reservoir Development Scheme aims to enhance fish production from reservoirs through stocking, management, and capacity building of fishers. It provides financial assistance for cage culture and other technologies.
eligibility: Fishermen cooperatives, self-help groups, and individual fishers registered with the state fisheries department.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Subsidy of up to 40% for cage culture units and other inputs.
how_to_apply: Apply through the state fisheries department or district fisheries office.
meta_title: Reservoir Development Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: The Reservoir Development Scheme aims to enhance fish production from reservoirs through stocking, management, and capacity building of fishers. It provide
content:
### Benefits
- Financial support for cage culture.
- Training on modern fishing techniques.
- Improved fish yield and income.

### Documents Required
- Fisherman ID card
- Bank account details
- Cooperative registration (if applicable)
- Aadhaar card

### How to Apply
1. Contact the district fisheries office.
2. Submit application with required documents.
3. Attend training sessions.
4. Receive subsidy and start operations.

title: Sabooj Sathy Scheme
overview: Sabooj Sathy (Green Partner) Scheme provides financial assistance to farmers for the purchase of agricultural inputs like seeds, fertilizers, and pesticides. It aims to boost agricultural productivity and support small farmers.
eligibility: Small and marginal farmers in West Bengal with landholding up to 2 acres.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Subsidy of up to Rs. 5,000 per farmer per season for inputs.
how_to_apply: Apply through the local agriculture office or online via the state agriculture portal.
meta_title: Sabooj Sathy Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Sabooj Sathy (Green Partner) Scheme provides financial assistance to farmers for the purchase of agricultural inputs like seeds, fertilizers, and pesticide
content:
### Benefits
- Subsidized agricultural inputs.
- Improved crop yield.
- Reduced financial burden.

### Documents Required
- Land records
- Aadhaar card
- Bank account details
- Farmer ID

### How to Apply
1. Visit the nearest agriculture office.
2. Obtain the application form.
3. Fill in details and attach documents.
4. Submit to the office.
5. Receive subsidy after verification.

title: Yuvashree Scheme
overview: Yuvashree Scheme provides unemployment allowance to educated unemployed youth in West Bengal. It aims to provide financial support until they find suitable employment.
eligibility: Unemployed youth aged 18-45 years with educational qualification of at least Class 12, and family income below Rs. 1.5 lakh per annum.
age_limit: 18-45 years
salary: Monthly allowance of Rs. 1,000 for general category and Rs. 1,500 for SC/ST/OBC.
how_to_apply: Apply online through the Yuvashree portal or through the local employment exchange.
meta_title: Yuvashree Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Yuvashree Scheme provides unemployment allowance to educated unemployed youth in West Bengal. It aims to provide financial support until they find suitable
content:
### Benefits
- Monthly unemployment allowance.
- Financial support during job search.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Educational certificates
- Income certificate
- Bank account details
- Unemployment certificate

### How to Apply
1. Visit the Yuvashree portal.
2. Register and fill the application.
3. Upload required documents.
4. Submit and track status.
5. Allowance is credited monthly.

title: Lokkhir Bhandar Scheme
department: Department of Women and Child Development, West Bengal
overview: Lokkhir Bhandar is a financial assistance scheme for women in West Bengal, providing monthly support to help with household expenses and promote women's empowerment.
eligibility: Women aged 25-60 years from families with annual income below Rs. 1.5 lakh, not receiving any other government pension.
age_limit: 25-60 years
salary: Monthly assistance of Rs. 500 for general category and Rs. 1,000 for SC/ST/OBC.
how_to_apply: Apply online through the Lokkhir Bhandar portal or through the local block office.
meta_title: Lokkhir Bhandar Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Lokkhir Bhandar is a financial assistance scheme for women in West Bengal, providing monthly support to help with household expenses and promote women's em
content:
### Benefits
- Monthly financial assistance.
- Economic empowerment of women.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Income certificate
- Bank account details
- Age proof
- Caste certificate (if applicable)

### How to Apply
1. Visit the Lokkhir Bhandar portal.
2. Register with mobile number.
3. Fill application form.
4. Upload documents.
5. Submit and receive monthly credit.

title: Gatidhara Scheme
overview: Gatidhara Scheme provides financial assistance for the purchase of commercial vehicles to unemployed youth in West Bengal. It aims to promote self-employment and entrepreneurship.
eligibility: Unemployed youth aged 18-45 years with a valid driving license, family income below Rs. 1.5 lakh per annum.
age_limit: 18-45 years
salary: Subsidy of up to Rs. 1 lakh for purchase of commercial vehicle, with loan assistance.
how_to_apply: Apply through the state transport department or online via the Gatidhara portal.
meta_title: Gatidhara Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Gatidhara Scheme provides financial assistance for the purchase of commercial vehicles to unemployed youth in West Bengal. It aims to promote self-employme
content:
### Benefits
- Financial subsidy for vehicle purchase.
- Loan assistance.
- Self-employment opportunity.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Driving license
- Income certificate
- Bank account details
- Project report

### How to Apply
1. Visit the Gatidhara portal.
2. Register and fill application.
3. Upload documents.
4. Submit and await approval.
5. Receive subsidy and loan.

title: Shikshashree Scheme
department: Department of School Education, Government of West Bengal
overview: Shikshashree Scheme is a West Bengal government initiative aimed at providing financial assistance to girl students from economically weaker sections to continue their education. The scheme covers tuition fees and other educational expenses for girls studying in classes 9 to 12.
eligibility: Girl students from economically weaker families, with annual family income less than Rs. 1.2 lakh, studying in government or government-aided schools in West Bengal.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Full tuition fee waiver and additional financial support for educational expenses up to Rs. 5,000 per year.
how_to_apply: Apply through the official West Bengal scholarship portal. Fill the online application form, upload required documents, and submit. The school verifies and forwards the application.
meta_title: Shikshashree Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Shikshashree Scheme is a West Bengal government initiative aimed at providing financial assistance to girl students from economically weaker sections to co
content:
### Benefits
- Full tuition fee waiver for girl students in classes 9-12.
- Additional financial assistance up to Rs. 5,000 per year for books, stationery, etc.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Income certificate
- Caste certificate (if applicable)
- Previous class mark sheet
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official West Bengal scholarship portal.
2. Register with a valid mobile number and email.
3. Fill the Shikshashree application form.
4. Upload scanned copies of required documents.
5. Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.

title: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarozgar Yojana
department: Department of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship, Government of Uttar Pradesh
overview: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarozgar Yojana is a UP government scheme to promote self-employment among educated unemployed youth. It provides subsidized loans and training to start small businesses or enterprises.
eligibility: Unemployed youth aged 18-40 years, with educational qualification of at least Class 8, and family income less than Rs. 3 lakh per annum. Must be a resident of Uttar Pradesh.
age_limit: 18 to 40 years
salary: Subsidized loan up to Rs. 10 lakh for business setup, with 25% subsidy on project cost (max Rs. 2.5 lakh).
how_to_apply: Apply online through the UP government portal. Fill the application form, upload documents, and submit. The application is forwarded to the district level for verification and loan sanction.
meta_title: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarozgar Yojana 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Mukhyamantri Yuva Swarozgar Yojana is a UP government scheme to promote self-employment among educated unemployed youth. It provides subsidized loans and t
content:
### Benefits
- Subsidized loan up to Rs. 10 lakh.
- Capital subsidy of 25% (max Rs. 2.5 lakh).
- Free entrepreneurship training.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Educational certificates
- Income certificate
- Domicile certificate
- Project report
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official portal and register.
2. Fill the application form with personal and project details.
3. Upload scanned documents.
4. Submit and note the application number.
5. Attend training if required.
6. Loan is sanctioned after verification.

title: UP Bhagirathi Scheme
department: Department of Urban Development, Government of Uttar Pradesh
overview: UP Bhagirathi Scheme is a water supply scheme by the Uttar Pradesh government to provide piped drinking water to every household in urban areas. It aims to ensure safe and adequate water supply to all urban residents.
eligibility: All households in urban local bodies of Uttar Pradesh. Priority to areas with water scarcity.
age_limit: N/A
salary: Free or subsidized piped water connection to households.
how_to_apply: Apply through the local urban body office or online portal. Submit application form with proof of residence and identity.
meta_title: UP Bhagirathi Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: UP Bhagirathi Scheme is a water supply scheme by the Uttar Pradesh government to provide piped drinking water to every household in urban areas. It aims to
content:
### Benefits
- Piped water connection to every urban household.
- Safe and adequate drinking water.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Residence proof
- Property tax receipt (if applicable)

### How to Apply
1. Visit the nearest urban local body office or the official portal.
2. Fill the application form for a new water connection.
3. Submit required documents.
4. Pay the connection fee (if any).
5. Connection is provided after verification.

title: UP Gopalak Yojana
department: Department of Animal Husbandry, Government of Uttar Pradesh
overview: UP Gopalak Yojana is a scheme by the Uttar Pradesh government to provide financial assistance to cattle rearers for purchasing high-yielding cows and buffaloes. It aims to increase milk production and improve the livelihood of dairy farmers.
eligibility: Residents of Uttar Pradesh engaged in dairy farming, with landholding up to 2 hectares. Priority to SC/ST, women, and small farmers.
age_limit: 18 to 60 years
salary: Subsidy of 50% on the cost of a high-yielding cow or buffalo, up to Rs. 50,000 per animal.
how_to_apply: Apply online through the UP government portal. Fill the application, upload documents, and submit. The application is verified by the district animal husbandry officer.
meta_title: UP Gopalak Yojana 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: UP Gopalak Yojana is a scheme by the Uttar Pradesh government to provide financial assistance to cattle rearers for purchasing high-yielding cows and buffa
content:
### Benefits
- 50% subsidy on purchase of high-yielding cow/buffalo.
- Maximum subsidy of Rs. 50,000 per animal.
- Free veterinary services and insurance.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Land records
- Income certificate
- Caste certificate (if applicable)
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Register on the official portal.
2. Fill the application form with personal and animal details.
3. Upload required documents.
4. Submit and get acknowledgment.
5. After verification, subsidy is transferred to bank account.

title: UP Divyang Pension Yojana
department: Department of Social Welfare, Government of Uttar Pradesh
overview: UP Divyang Pension Yojana is a social security scheme for persons with disabilities in Uttar Pradesh. It provides a monthly pension to support their livelihood and well-being.
eligibility: Persons with 40% or more disability, aged 18-60 years, with family income less than Rs. 60,000 per annum. Must be a resident of Uttar Pradesh.
age_limit: 18 to 60 years
salary: Monthly pension of Rs. 500 (may vary; check latest updates).
how_to_apply: Apply through the local Social Welfare office or online portal. Submit application form with disability certificate and income proof.
meta_title: UP Divyang Pension Yojana 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: UP Divyang Pension Yojana is a social security scheme for persons with disabilities in Uttar Pradesh. It provides a monthly pension to support their liveli
content:
### Benefits
- Monthly pension of Rs. 500.
- Financial support for disabled persons.

### Documents Required
- Disability certificate (40% or more)
- Aadhaar card
- Income certificate
- Residence proof
- Bank account details

### How to Apply
1. Visit the local Social Welfare office or the official portal.
2. Obtain and fill the pension application form.
3. Attach self-attested copies of required documents.
4. Submit to the concerned officer.
5. After verification, pension is credited monthly.

title: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme
department: Department of Education, Government of Bihar
overview: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme provides easy education loans to students from Bihar for pursuing higher education in India or abroad. The loan covers tuition fees, living expenses, and other educational costs at a low interest rate.
eligibility: Students who are permanent residents of Bihar, aged 18-45 years, and have secured admission in a recognized institution for higher education (graduate, postgraduate, diploma, etc.).
age_limit: 18 to 45 years
salary: Loan up to Rs. 10 lakh at 4% interest per annum (subsidized by the state government).
how_to_apply: Apply online through the Bihar Student Credit Card portal. Fill the application, upload admission proof and documents, and submit. The loan is processed through participating banks.
meta_title: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: Bihar Student Credit Card Scheme provides easy education loans to students from Bihar for pursuing higher education in India or abroad. The loan covers tui
content:
### Benefits
- Education loan up to Rs. 10 lakh.
- Low interest rate of 4% per annum.
- No collateral required for loans up to Rs. 4 lakh.

### Documents Required
- Aadhaar card
- Domicile certificate
- Admission letter
- Fee structure
- Bank account details
- Income proof of parents

title: Navy B.Tech Entry 10+2 Recruitment 2026 for Jan 2027 Batch
overview: The Indian Navy invites applications from unmarried male and female candidates for the B.Tech Entry Scheme (10+2) for the January 2027 batch. This prestigious program offers a career as a Permanent Commission Officer in the Executive and Technical branches of the Indian Navy. Selected candidates will undergo training at the Indian Naval Academy, Ezhimala, and will be awarded a B.Tech degree from Jawaharlal Nehru University (JNU).
eligibility: Candidates must have passed 10+2 or equivalent with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) with at least 70% aggregate marks in PCM. Candidates appearing in 12th standard are also eligible, provided they meet the criteria at the time of SSB interview.
age_limit: 17 to 19.5 years (born between 02 Jan 2007 and 01 Jul 2009 inclusive)
salary: During training: ₹56,100 per month (as per 7th CPC). After commissioning: Pay Level 10 (₹56,100 - ₹1,77,500) plus allowances.
how_to_apply: 1. Visit the official Indian Navy recruitment website joinindiannavy.gov.in. 2. Click on 'Officer Entry' and select 'B.Tech Entry Scheme (10+2) Jan 2027 Batch'. 3. Register with a valid email ID and mobile number. 4. Fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and communication details. 5. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required documents. 6. Pay the application fee (if applicable) via online mode. 7. Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.
meta_title: Navy B.Tech Entry 10+2 Recruitment 2026 for Jan 2027 Batch 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: The Indian Navy invites applications from unmarried male and female candidates for the B.Tech Entry Scheme (10+2) for the January 2027 batch. This prestigi
content:
## Indian Navy B.Tech Entry 10+2 Recruitment 2026 for Jan 2027 Batch

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Start of Online Application | 01 July 2025 |
| Last Date to Apply | 31 July 2025 |
| SSB Interview (Tentative) | September 2025 onwards |
| Course Commencement | January 2027 |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| General / OBC | ₹0 (No fee) |
| SC / ST | ₹0 (No fee) |
| All Female Candidates | ₹0 (No fee) |

### Vacancy Details
| Branch | Vacancies |
|--------|-----------|
| Executive (General Service) | 30 |
| Technical (Engineering) | 20 |
| Technical (Naval Architecture) | 10 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Educational Qualification**: Passed 10+2 with Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics (PCM) with at least 70% aggregate marks in PCM.
- **Age Limit**: 17 to 19.5 years (born between 02 Jan 2007 and 01 Jul 2009).
- **Physical Standards**: Height minimum 157 cm, weight proportionate, and medically fit as per Navy standards.

### Selection Process
1. **Shortlisting** based on 10+2 PCM marks.
2. **SSB Interview** (Stage I & II) at designated centers.
3. **Medical Examination**.
4. **Merit List** based on SSB performance.

### How to Apply
1. Visit [joinindiannavy.gov.in](https://www.joinindiannavy.gov.in).
2. Click on 'Officer Entry' → 'B.Tech Entry Scheme (10+2) Jan 2027 Batch'.
3. Register and fill the application form.
4. Upload required documents.
5. Submit and print the application.

### Important Links
- **Apply Online**: [https://www.joinindiannavy.gov.in](https://www.joinindiannavy.gov.in)
- **Official Notification**: Not yet released (check website for updates).

content:
## BPSC 72nd Combined Competitive Examination (CCE) 2026: Upcoming Recruitment

The Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) is gearing up to announce the 72nd Combined Competitive Examination (CCE) for various administrative positions within the Bihar State Government. This highly anticipated recruitment offers a golden chance for graduates aspiring to join the esteemed state civil services. Aspiring candidates are advised to commence their preparation as the official notification, detailing the eligibility, application process, and selection criteria, is expected soon for the 2026 cycle.

### Important Dates & Schedule (Tentative)

Candidates should regularly check the official BPSC website for the exact dates. The table below provides a general timeline based on typical BPSC examination cycles.

| Event | Date | Status |
| :---------------------------------- | :---------------- | :------------------ |
| **Official Notification Release Date** | To be announced (Expected 2026) | Pending |
| Online Application Start Date | To be announced | Pending |
| Online Application End Date | To be announced | Pending |
| Last Date for Application Fee Payment | To be announced | Pending |
| Admit Card Release Date (Prelims) | To be announced | Pending |
| Preliminary Examination Date | To be announced | Pending |
| Preliminary Exam Result Date | To be announced | Pending |
| Mains Examination Dates | To be announced | Pending |
| Mains Exam Result Date | To be announced | Pending |
| Interview Dates | To be announced | Pending |
| Final Result Declaration | To be announced | Pending |

### Application Fee Details

Applicants will be required to pay an application fee as part of the online submission process. The fee structure for the BPSC 72nd CCE will be as per the official notification.

| Category | Application Fee (Expected) | Payment Mode |
| :------------------------------ | :------------------------- | :--------------- |
| General / OBC / EWS | As per Official Notification | Online (Net Banking, Debit/Credit Card) |
| SC / ST / PwD (Bihar Domicile) | As per Official Notification | Online (Net Banking, Debit/Credit Card) |
| Female Candidates (Bihar Domicile) | As per Official Notification | Online (Net Banking, Debit/Credit Card) |

*Note: Application fees are non-refundable. Please refer to the detailed official notification for exact amounts and any changes.*

### Eligibility Criteria

To be eligible for the BPSC 72nd CCE, candidates must meet specific academic qualifications and age limits. These criteria are subject to change with each notification, so referring to the official document is crucial.

#### Educational Qualification:
*   Candidates must possess a **Bachelor's Degree** or an equivalent qualification from a recognized University/Institution in India. Specific post-wise educational requirements, if any, will be detailed in the official notification.

#### Age Limit (as of the cut-off date mentioned in the notification):
*   **Minimum Age:** Generally between 20 to 22 years (depending on the post).
*   **Maximum Age:**
    *   Unreserved Male: 37 years
    *   Unreserved Female / OBC (Male & Female): 40 years
    *   SC / ST (Male & Female): 42 years
*   Age relaxation for various reserved categories will be applicable as per the Bihar Government rules. Candidates with disabilities and ex-servicemen will also receive age relaxation as per norms.

### How to Apply for BPSC 72nd CCE 2026

Follow these steps to successfully apply online once the application window opens:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the official website of the Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC). The exact link will be provided in the official notification.
2.  **Registration:** Click on the 'Apply Online' or 'Online Registration' link for the 72nd BPSC Combined Competitive Examination. Register by providing your basic details such as name, email ID, and mobile number. A registration ID and password will be generated.
3.  **Fill the Application Form:** Log in using your registration credentials. Carefully fill out all mandatory fields in the application form, including personal details, educational qualifications, communication address, and other relevant information.
4.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, and any other required documents (e.g., caste certificate, disability certificate) in the prescribed format and size.
5.  **Pay Application Fee:** Proceed to pay the application fee online through the available payment gateways (Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card).
6.  **Review and Submit:** Before final submission, review all the entered information to ensure accuracy. Make any necessary corrections. Once satisfied, click on the 'Submit' button.
7.  **Print Application Form:** After successful submission and fee payment, download and print a copy of your submitted application form for future reference. This will serve as proof of application.

Candidates are strongly advised to read the entire official notification thoroughly before applying to ensure they meet all eligibility criteria and understand the application process completely.

content:
### NSUT Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026: Overview

The Netaji Subhas University of Technology (NSUT), Delhi, has announced a significant recruitment drive for 61 Teaching and Non-Teaching positions for the year 2026. This presents a valuable opportunity for candidates aspiring to contribute to a leading state university. Interested and eligible candidates are advised to prepare as the detailed application process and official notification are expected soon on the university's official website.

### Vacancy Details

A total of 61 posts are to be filled across various Teaching and Non-Teaching cadres. Detailed post-wise distribution will be specified in the full official notification.

| Post Category      | Number of Posts (Tentative) |
| :----------------- | :-------------------------- |
| Teaching Posts     | To be announced             |
| Non-Teaching Posts | To be announced             |
| **Total**          | **61**                      |

### Application Fee

Candidates will be required to pay an application fee as per the university's guidelines. The fee structure is typically categorized based on applicant group.

| Category             | Application Fee (Tentative) |
| :------------------- | :-------------------------- |
| General/OBC/EWS      | ₹1000 - ₹1200               |
| SC/ST/PwBD/Women     | ₹500 - ₹700                 |
| **Payment Mode**     | Online (Net Banking/Credit Card/Debit Card) |

*Note: Exact fee amounts will be confirmed in the official notification.*

### Important Dates

The application window and other crucial dates for the NSUT Teaching and Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026 will be released shortly. Candidates should regularly check the official NSUT website for updates.

| Event                         | Date (Tentative for 2026) |
| :---------------------------- | :------------------------ |
| Notification Release Date     | To be announced           |
| Online Application Start Date | To be announced           |
| Online Application End Date   | To be announced           |
| Last Date for Fee Payment     | To be announced           |
| Exam Date (CBT/Interview)     | To be announced           |
| Admit Card Release            | To be announced           |

### Eligibility Criteria

#### Educational Qualification

*   **For Teaching Positions:** Candidates typically require a Master's degree (PG) in the relevant discipline with a good academic record, and/or a Ph.D. degree from a recognized university. Specific requirements may include NET/SLET/SET qualification as per UGC norms for Assistant Professor roles.
*   **For Non-Teaching Positions:** Qualifications vary by post, generally requiring a Graduation degree, Diploma, or 10+2 with relevant experience in the respective field from a recognized board/university.

*Detailed post-wise qualifications will be mentioned in the official notification.*

#### Age Limit

The age limit for applicants will vary according to the specific post.
*   **Minimum Age:** Generally 18 years.
*   **Maximum Age:** Typically between 30 to 35 years for unreserved categories.
*   **Age Relaxation:** Applicable for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-servicemen candidates as per Government of Delhi rules and NSUT regulations.

### Salary Structure

Selected candidates will be offered a competitive salary package as per the norms of the Netaji Subhas University of Technology and the Government of Delhi, adhering to the prescribed pay matrix for the respective teaching or non-teaching position.

### Selection Process

The selection process for NSUT Teaching and Non-Teaching posts typically involves:
1.  **Written Examination (CBT):** For most non-teaching posts and potentially a screening test for teaching posts.
2.  **Interview:** For teaching positions and higher-level non-teaching posts.
3.  **Skill Test/Document Verification:** Where applicable.

*The exact selection methodology will be detailed in the official notification.*

### How to Apply for NSUT Recruitment 2026

Interested and eligible candidates must apply online through the official recruitment portal of Netaji Subhas University of Technology. Follow these general steps:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the official NSUT website (nsut.ac.in).
2.  **Find the Recruitment Section:** Navigate to the 'Recruitment' or 'Careers' section.
3.  **Read the Notification:** Download and thoroughly read the official notification for NSUT Teaching & Non-Teaching Recruitment 2026.
4.  **Online Registration:** Click on the 'Apply Online' link and complete the registration process using a valid email ID and mobile number.
5.  **Fill the Application Form:** Log in with your registration credentials and accurately fill in all personal, educational, and experience details in the online application form.
6.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, and other required documents in the specified format and size.
7.  **Pay Application Fee:** Pay the requisite application fee online through the available payment gateway.
8.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all entered information before final submission.
9.  **Print Application Form:** Download and print the submitted application form for future reference.

### Important Links

| Resource                        | Link                 |
| :------------------------------ | :------------------- |
| Official NSUT Website           | [nsut.ac.in](https://www.nsut.ac.in/) |
| Official Notification (Will be updated) | To be updated        |
| Apply Online (Will be updated)  | To be updated        |
