content:
## NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card Released by NTA

The National Testing Agency (NTA) has announced the release of the Admit Card for the NEET (National Eligibility cum Entrance Test) UG 2026 Re-Examination. This is a crucial update for all candidates preparing to appear for the re-exam. The admit card is a mandatory document for entry to the examination center and contains important details such as the candidate's name, roll number, photograph, signature, examination date, time, venue, and essential instructions.

Candidates are strongly advised to download their admit cards immediately from the official website and verify all the details printed on it. In case of any discrepancy, contact the NTA helpdesk without delay.

### Important Dates for NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam

| Event                          | Date (Tentative) |
| :----------------------------- | :--------------- |
| NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card Release | (Recently Released) |
| NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Date      | To be announced / Refer Admit Card |
| Result Declaration             | To be announced |


### Admit Card Download Procedure

To download your NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card, please follow these steps:

1.  **Visit the Official Website**: Navigate to `neet.nta.nic.in`.
2.  **Locate Admit Card Link**: On the homepage, find and click on the link for 'NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card'.
3.  **Enter Credentials**: You will be redirected to a login page. Enter your NEET UG 2026 Application Number and Date of Birth.
4.  **Submit and View**: Click on the 'Submit' or 'Login' button.
5.  **Download and Print**: Your admit card will be displayed. Carefully review all the details, then download and print at least two copies for your records and exam day use.

### Documents Required on Exam Day

Candidates must carry the following documents to the examination center:

*   **Printed copy of NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card** with a passport size photograph affixed on it.
*   **One passport size photograph** (same as uploaded on the application form) to be affixed on the attendance sheet.
*   **Any one of the original, valid photo identification proof** such as PAN Card, Driving License, Voter ID, Passport, Aadhaar Card (with photograph), Ration Card, or E-Aadhaar with a photograph.
*   **PwBD certificate** (if applicable).

### Exam Day Guidelines and Instructions

*   **Reporting Time**: Candidates must report to the examination center at the time mentioned on their admit card to allow for frisking and registration.
*   **No Electronic Devices**: Mobile phones, calculators, electronic watches, study material, or any other electronic gadgets are strictly prohibited inside the examination hall.
*   **Dress Code**: Adhere to the prescribed NEET UG dress code guidelines to avoid any inconvenience at the entry gate.
*   **Rough Work**: All rough work must be done only in the space provided in the Test Booklet.
*   **Biometric Verification**: Candidates may undergo biometric verification at the exam center.
*   **COVID-19 Precautions**: Follow all prevalent COVID-19 safety protocols and guidelines, including wearing masks, maintaining social distancing, and using hand sanitizers.

Candidates are advised to read all instructions on the admit card carefully and comply with them to ensure a smooth examination experience. Best of luck to all candidates appearing for the NEET UG 2026 Re-Examination!

content:
# Chhattisgarh High Court JJA Recruitment 2026: Apply for Junior Judicial Assistant Vacancies

The High Court of Chhattisgarh has issued an official notification for the recruitment of Junior Judicial Assistants (JJA), including specialized roles such as Library Assistant, for the year 2026. This recruitment drive offers a notable opportunity for eligible candidates to secure a prestigious position within the judicial system of Chhattisgarh. Aspiring individuals are encouraged to go through the comprehensive details provided in the official notification and apply online before the closing date.

## Important Dates

| Event                          | Date         |
| :----------------------------- | :----------- |
| Notification Release Date      | To be announced |
| Online Application Start Date  | To be announced |
| Last Date for Online Application | To be announced |
| Last Date for Fee Payment      | To be announced |
| Admit Card Release Date        | To be announced |
| Examination Date               | To be announced |
| Result Declaration             | To be announced |

## Vacancy Details

The recruitment drive aims to fill various positions for Junior Judicial Assistant, which may include specialized roles like Library Assistant. Detailed post-wise vacancy breakdown will be available in the official notification.

| Post Name                      | Total Vacancies |
| :----------------------------- | :-------------- |
| Junior Judicial Assistant (JJA)| To be announced |
| Library Assistant              | To be announced |

## Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must meet the following eligibility criteria to be considered for the Chhattisgarh High Court JJA Recruitment 2026:

### Educational Qualification

*   **Junior Judicial Assistant (JJA):** Candidates must possess a Graduate Degree (e.g., B.A., B.Sc., B.Com, LLB) from a recognized University or institution. A Diploma in Computer Applications or equivalent computer proficiency certificate is generally required.
*   **Library Assistant:** Candidates must hold a Graduate Degree from a recognized University, preferably with a Bachelor's Degree in Library Science (B.Lib.Sc.) or equivalent. Relevant computer proficiency may also be required.

*Specific qualifications and essential experience (if any) will be detailed in the official notification.*

### Age Limit

*   **Minimum Age:** 18 years
*   **Maximum Age:** 30 years (as on a specified cutoff date, typically the beginning of the application period).
*   **Age Relaxation:** Permissible age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to reserved categories (SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen) as per the Chhattisgarh Government rules. Candidates are advised to refer to the official notification for precise details on age calculation and relaxation.

## Application Fee

The application fee details for the Chhattisgarh High Court JJA Recruitment 2026 are as follows. Candidates should note that the fee is non-refundable.

| Category             | Application Fee |
| :------------------- | :-------------- |
| General/OBC (Creamy Layer) | To be announced |
| SC/ST/OBC (Non-Creamy Layer)/PwD | To be announced |
| Other Categories         | To be announced |

*Fees are subject to change as per the official notification. Payment can typically be made online through various modes like Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card.*

## Salary Details

Selected candidates for the Junior Judicial Assistant (JJA) positions, including Library Assistant, will be offered an attractive salary package as per the rules of the Chhattisgarh High Court. The pay scale will typically be in Level 7 of the Pay Matrix, along with other admissible allowances as per government norms.

## How to Apply

Interested and eligible candidates must apply online for the Chhattisgarh High Court JJA Recruitment 2026 by following the steps below:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the official website of the Chhattisgarh High Court (or its designated recruitment portal).
2.  **Locate Notification:** Find the link for "Chhattisgarh High Court JJA Recruitment 2026" or similar in the 'Recruitment' or 'Latest Notifications' section.
3.  **Read Official Notification:** Download and thoroughly read the official notification PDF to understand all eligibility criteria, important dates, application procedures, and instructions.
4.  **New Registration:** If you are a new user, click on the "Apply Online" or "New Registration" link. Provide the required basic details like name, email ID, and mobile number to register and generate login credentials.
5.  **Fill Application Form:** Log in using your registration details and fill out the online application form with accurate personal information, educational qualifications, and other relevant details.
6.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your recent passport-sized photograph, signature, and other necessary documents (e.g., educational certificates, caste certificate) in the specified format and size.
7.  **Pay Application Fee:** Proceed to pay the application fee through the available online payment gateway (Net Banking, Credit/Debit Card, UPI).
8.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the details entered in the application form before final submission. Make sure there are no errors.
9.  **Print Application:** After successful submission and fee payment, download and print a copy of your submitted application form and the e-receipt for future reference.

## Selection Process

The selection process for Junior Judicial Assistant (JJA) and Library Assistant positions typically involves:

1.  **Written Examination:** Candidates will appear for a written test assessing their general knowledge, legal aptitude, computer proficiency, and language skills.
2.  **Skill Test (Typing/Computer Test):** A skill test may be conducted to evaluate typing speed and accuracy, and basic computer operation skills.
3.  **Interview:** Shortlisted candidates may be called for an interview to assess their overall suitability for the post.
4.  **Document Verification:** Final selection will be subject to successful document verification.

*The exact stages of the selection process will be detailed in the official notification.*

## Important Links

*   **Official Website:** [Official High Court of Chhattisgarh Website](https://highcourt.cg.gov.in/)
*   **Official Notification (PDF):** [Link will be updated once available]
*   **Apply Online Link:** [Link will be updated once available]

## How to Check Your Marks

Follow these simple steps to access your APPSC AO, AC & JL marks:

1.  **Visit the Official Portal:** Navigate to the official website of the Andhra Pradesh Public Service Commission (APPSC). (Please search for the official APPSC website as a direct link is not provided here in the raw data).

Candidates are encouraged to cross-verify their details and the marks obtained carefully. For any discrepancies or further information, always refer to the official APPSC website for the most accurate and up-to-date information.

meta_description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has officially released the Admit Cards for the NEET UG 2026 Re-Examination. Candidates who are eligible to appear for th
content:
## NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card Released

The National Testing Agency (NTA) has activated the download link for the NEET UG 2026 Re-Examination Admit Cards. Candidates who are scheduled to appear for the re-exam are urged to download their admit cards well in advance of the examination date. The admit card is a compulsory document for entry into the examination centre and contains important information regarding your examination.

### Important Dates & Schedule

| Event                       | Date           |
| :-------------------------- | :------------- |
| NEET UG 2026 Admit Card Release (Re-Exam) | 2026-07-05     |
| NEET UG 2026 Re-Examination Date          | 2026-07-10     |
| Result Declaration (Tentative) | To Be Announced |

### Exam Day Guidelines for NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam

Candidates appearing for the NEET UG 2026 Re-Examination must adhere to the following guidelines to ensure a smooth and fair examination process:

*   **Reporting Time**: Arrive at the examination centre well before the gate closing time as specified on your admit card. Latecomers will not be permitted entry.
*   **Required Documents**: Candidates must carry their NEET UG 2026 Admit Card (a clear printout) and a valid photo identification proof (e.g., Aadhaar Card, Passport, PAN Card, Driving License, Voter ID). Without these, entry will be denied.
*   **Prohibited Items**: Do not carry any electronic devices such as mobile phones, calculators, smartwatches, or any study material. Wallets, handbags, food items, and metallic items are also strictly prohibited inside the examination hall.
*   **Dress Code**: Follow the prescribed dress code as per NEET UG guidelines. Avoid wearing full-sleeved shirts/dresses, heavy jewellery, or shoes with thick soles.
*   **Biometric Attendance**: Candidates will undergo biometric attendance and frisking before entering the examination hall. Cooperate with the invigilators and examination staff.
*   **Rough Work**: All rough work must be done only in the space provided in the test booklet.
*   **COVID-19 Precautions**: Follow all prevalent government guidelines related to COVID-19, including wearing a mask, carrying personal hand sanitizer, and maintaining social distancing.

### Verification Documents

Along with your NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card, you **must** carry the following for verification at the examination centre:

1.  **NEET UG Admit Card 2026**: A printout of the downloaded Admit Card with your passport-size photograph affixed on it.
2.  **Valid Photo ID Proof**: Any one of the original, valid Photo ID Proofs issued by the Government (PAN Card/ Driving License/ Voter ID/ Passport/ Aadhaar Card (with photograph)/ E-Aadhaar/ Ration Card/ Aadhaar Enrolment No. with Photo).
3.  **Passport Size Photograph**: One additional passport-size photograph (same as uploaded on the application form) to be pasted on the attendance sheet.

Candidates are advised to thoroughly read all instructions mentioned on their admit card to avoid any last-minute issues.

| Post Name         | Total Vacancies | Last Date    | Bank / Department |
| :---------------- | :-------------- | :----------- | :---------------- |

**Latest Govt Banking / Financial Jobs 2026**

| Post Name   | Total Vacancies | Last Date    | Bank / Department |
| :---------- | :-------------- | :----------- | :---------------- |
| Specialist  | 7               | 2026-06-30   | NABARD            |

### Eligibility Criteria

Candidates applying for bank jobs must meet specific eligibility requirements:

*   **Educational Qualification:**
    *   **Clerical Cadre (Clerk, Junior Associates, Cashier, Peon):** Minimum 10th pass or 12th pass from a recognized board.
    *   **Officer Posts (PO, SO, MT):** Bachelor's degree or Master's degree from a recognized university in the relevant discipline (e.g., IT, Law, HR, Marketing, Finance).
*   **Age Limit:** Generally, candidates should be between 20 to 30 years of age. Age relaxations are applicable for Scheduled Castes/Scheduled Tribes (SC/ST), Other Backward Classes (OBC), Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD), Ex-Servicemen, and other categories as per government rules. Specific age limits may vary for individual posts; candidates should refer to the official notification.

### Application Fee

The application fee varies based on the post and category of the applicant. Candidates are strongly advised to refer to the official notification for each specific recruitment drive for detailed fee structures and payment methods.

| Category               | Application Fee (Approx.) |
| :--------------------- | :------------------------ |
| General/OBC/EWS        | ₹600 - ₹850               |
| SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen | ₹100 - ₹200               |

### Exam Schedules & Important Dates

Stay ahead with the latest information on upcoming bank exams 2026 conducted by major public sector banks and recruitment bodies like IBPS, SBI, and RBI. These exams offer excellent opportunities for graduates and postgraduates to secure prestigious bank jobs in India.

| Exam / Post Name                    | Registration Month | Details           |
| :---------------------------------- | :----------------- | :---------------- |
| IBPS SO 2026 (Specialist Officers)  | July 2026          | Officer Level     |
| IBPS PO MT 2026 (PO / MT)           | July 2026          | Officer Level     |
| IBPS CRP RRBs-XIV (Officer, Asst.)  | September 2026     | Officer / Clerical|
| IBPS Clerk 2026                     | August 2026        | Clerical Level    |
| RBI Grade B Officers                | August 2026        | Officer Level     |
| SBI Pharmacist 2026                 | Upcoming           | Specialist Role   |
| IDBI Specialist Officers            | Upcoming           | Specialist Role   |
| Union Bank Local Bank Officers      | To be announced    | Officer Level     |
| IDBI Executives                     | To be announced    | Executive Level   |

### How to Apply for Bank Jobs 2026

Follow these step-by-step instructions to apply for various bank jobs:

1.  **Identify Opportunities:** Regularly check official bank websites (SBI, PNB, BoB, etc.) and recruitment portals (IBPS, RBI) for the latest job notifications.
2.  **Review Official Notification:** Download and thoroughly read the official detailed notification for the specific post you are interested in. Pay close attention to eligibility criteria, age limit, application fees, selection process, and important dates.
3.  **Online Registration:** If you meet the eligibility criteria, proceed to the official online application portal. Register yourself by providing basic details such as name, email ID, and mobile number. A registration number and password will be generated.
4.  **Fill Application Form:** Log in with your credentials and accurately fill in all the required details in the online application form, including personal information, educational qualifications, and work experience.
5.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, and any other required documents as per the specified format and size guidelines.
6.  **Pay Application Fee:** Pay the application fee online using debit card, credit card, net banking, or other available payment modes. Ensure the transaction is successful.
7.  **Review and Submit:** Before final submission, carefully review all the entered information. Make any necessary corrections. Once satisfied, click on the 'Submit' button.
8.  **Print Application:** After successful submission, take a printout of the e-receipt and the completed application form for your records and future reference.

### Important Links

While direct application links for specific recruitments are dynamic, candidates should regularly visit the official career pages of major banks and recruitment bodies:

*   **IBPS Official Website:** [www.ibps.in](https://www.ibps.in) (For PO, Clerk, SO, RRB exams)
*   **SBI Careers:** [sbi.co.in/careers](https://sbi.co.in/careers)
*   **RBI Opportunities:** [rbi.org.in/careers](https://rbi.org.in/careers)
*   **Other Public Sector Banks:** Visit the respective official bank websites (e.g., Bank of Baroda, Punjab National Bank, Union Bank of India, Canara Bank).

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQ)

1.  **How to apply for bank jobs in India?**
    Eligible candidates can apply online or offline through official notifications listed on IndGovtJobs.in. The site updates daily with the latest bank job vacancies in government and public sector banks.
2.  **Why choose government bank jobs?**
    Government bank jobs offer unmatched job security, attractive salaries, allowances, and strong career progression – making them among the most preferred careers in India.
3.  **What bank jobs are available after 12th pass or graduation?**
    After 12th: Clerk, Office Assistant, Cashier, Peon, Customer Service roles. After Graduation: Probationary Officer (PO), Specialist Officer (SO), Management Trainee, IT Officer, Law Officer, Manager roles.
4.  **What are the major upcoming bank exams in India?**
    Top upcoming bank exams include IBPS Clerk, IBPS PO, IBPS RRB, SBI Clerk, SBI PO, RBI Assistant, and RBI Grade B exams conducted for clerical and officer-level recruitment.
5.  **What are the eligibility criteria and selection process for bank jobs?**
    Qualification: Minimum 10+2 for clerical posts; Bachelor’s/Master’s degree for officer roles. Selection: Usually online written exam + interview (for officer posts). Age Limit: Generally 20–30 years (relaxations applicable).

content:
## SSC CGL 2026 Recruitment – 12,256 Vacancies

The Staff Selection Commission (SSC) has announced the Combined Graduate Level Examination (CGL) 2026 for filling 12,256 Group B and Group C posts in various Government of India ministries, departments, and constitutional bodies.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| General / OBC / EWS | ₹100 |
| Women / SC / ST / PwBD / Ex-Servicemen | Exempted (No fee) |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Online Registration Start | 21 May 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply Online | 22 June 2026 (23:00 hours) |
| Last Date for Fee Payment | 23 June 2026 (23:00 hours) |
| Application Correction Window | 29 June – 1 July 2026 |
| Tier-I Examination (Tentative) | August – September 2026 |
| Tier-II Examination (Tentative) | December 2026 |

### Post-wise Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Pay Level | Salary Range |
|-----------|-----------|--------------|
| Assistant Audit Officer / Assistant Accounts Officer | Level-8 | ₹47,600 – ₹1,51,100 |
| Assistant Section Officer / Inspector of Income Tax / Sub Inspector in CBI | Level-7 | ₹44,900 – ₹1,42,400 |
| Assistant / Executive Assistant / Divisional Accountant / Sub Inspector in NIA / Junior Statistical Officer | Level-6 | ₹35,400 – ₹1,12,400 |
| Auditor / Accountant | Level-5 | ₹29,200 – ₹92,300 |
| Postal Assistant / Senior Secretariat Assistant / Tax Assistant | Level-4 | ₹25,500 – ₹81,100 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Age Limit (as on 01.08.2026):** 18-30 years (post-specific variations: 18-27, 20-30, 18-32). Relaxation as per government rules.
- **Educational Qualification:** Bachelor's Degree from a recognized university. Additional qualifications for AAO, JSO, and Statistical Investigator posts.

### Selection Process
1. Tier-I Examination (Computer Based Test) – Qualifying
2. Tier-II Examination (Computer Based Test) – Merit
3. Document Verification

### Exam Pattern
**Tier-I:** 100 questions, 200 marks, 60 minutes. Subjects: General Intelligence & Reasoning, General Awareness, Quantitative Aptitude, English Comprehension. Negative marking: 0.50 marks per wrong answer.

**Tier-II:** Paper-I (Compulsory) with four sections: Mathematical Abilities, Reasoning & General Intelligence, English Language & Comprehension, General Awareness, Computer Knowledge Test, and Data Entry Speed Test (Qualifying).

### How to Apply
1. Visit https://ssc.gov.in.
2. Register and log in.
3. Fill the application form.
4. Upload photo and signature.
5. Pay fee (if applicable).
6. Submit and print confirmation.

### FAQs
**Q1. How many vacancies?**
Approx. 12,256.

**Q2. Last date to apply?**
22 June 2026 (23:00 hours).

**Q3. Educational qualification?**
Bachelor's Degree.

**Q4. Salary?**
₹25,500 – ₹1,51,100 per month.

**Q5. Selection process?**
Tier-I → Tier-II → Document Verification.

**Q6. Negative marking?**
Yes, 0.50 marks per wrong answer in Tier-I and Tier-II.

meta_description: The Army College of Medical Sciences (ACMS), Delhi Cantt, an esteemed institution under the Army Welfare Education Society (AWES), has announced a recruitm
content:
### ACMS Delhi Cantt Recruitment 2026: LDC & Attendant Posts

The Army College of Medical Sciences (ACMS), Delhi Cantt, operating under the Army Welfare Education Society (AWES), has released an official notification for the recruitment of Lower Division Clerk (LDC) and Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA) on a contractual basis. A total of 06 vacancies are available for eligible candidates, including Ex-Servicemen. This presents a significant opportunity for those looking to join a reputed medical institution.

#### Vacancy Details

| Sl. No. | Post Name                   | Vacancies | Monthly Salary |
| :------ | :-------------------------- | :-------- | :------------- |
| 1       | Lower Division Clerk (LDC)  | 05        | ₹25,500/-      |
| 2       | Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA) | 01        | ₹25,500/-      |
| **Total** |                             | **06**    |                |

#### Eligibility Criteria

**1. Lower Division Clerk (LDC)**
*   **Educational Qualification:**
    *   Graduate from a recognized university.
    *   Computer literate with a minimum typing speed of 30 WPM.
    *   Minimum 3 years of experience in a reputed organization (preferably an educational institution).
    *   **For Ex-Servicemen (ESM):** Completed 10 years of service as Clerk in the Army.
*   **Age Limit (as on 01 July 2026):**
    *   Below 45 years (for other candidates)
    *   Below 50 years (for ESM candidates)
    *   Below 55 years (for JCOs – ESM)
*   **Additional Requirements:** Basic knowledge of accounts, medically fit, no disciplinary history.

**2. Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA)**
*   **Educational Qualification:**
    *   Ex-Serviceman (ESM) from Army Medical Corps (AMC).
    *   Retired House Keeper (AMC) may also apply.
    *   Minimum 15 years of service in the Army Medical Corps.
*   **Age Limit (as on 01 July 2026):**
    *   Below 53 years
*   **Additional Requirements:** Medically fit for the job, no disciplinary history.

#### Salary & Benefits

Selected candidates for both LDC and DHA positions will receive a consolidated monthly salary of ₹25,500/-. Please note that the appointment is purely contractual (full-time term-based) and no accommodation facility, other allowances, or benefits are mentioned.

#### Application Fee

No application fee is required for this recruitment drive.

| Category | Application Fee |
| :------- | :-------------- |
| All Candidates | Nil             |

#### Important Dates

Candidates should adhere to the following key dates for the application process:

| Event                               | Date                |
| :---------------------------------- | :------------------ |
| Last Date for Submission of Application | 22 June 2026 (10:00 AM) |

#### Selection Process

The selection for these contractual posts will involve a two-stage process:
1.  **Shortlisting:** Applications will be shortlisted based on the eligibility criteria mentioned above.
2.  **Interview:** Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview.
*   *Note: No TA/DA will be paid for attending the interview.*

#### How to Apply

Eligible and interested candidates must submit their applications via email by the specified deadline. Follow the steps below:

1.  **Prepare your Documents:** Gather your updated Curriculum Vitae (CV) or Resume along with all necessary supporting documents (educational certificates, experience letters, ESM discharge book, etc.).
2.  **Compose Email:** Draft an email to the official ACMS recruitment email address.
3.  **Specify Subject Line:** In the subject line of your email, clearly mention the post you are applying for (e.g., "Application for Lower Division Clerk" or "Application for Dissection Hall Attendant").
4.  **Send Application:** Send your complete application, including the CV/Resume and supporting documents as attachments, to **acms@awesindia.edu.in**.
5.  **Address:** While the application is by email, it should ideally be addressed to "The Dean, Army College of Medical Sciences (ACMS), Delhi Cantt".
6.  **Deadline:** Ensure your email application reaches the specified address on or before **22 June 2026 by 10:00 AM**.
7.  **Keep Records:** It is advisable to retain a copy of the sent email and all submitted documents for future reference.

#### Important Links

*   **Official Website:** [https://theacms.in](https://theacms.in)

content:
The Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd. (MSC Bank) invites applications from highly skilled and experienced banking professionals for 06 Manager positions on a contract basis. This recruitment drive seeks dynamic individuals to contribute to the bank's operations at its Head Office in Mumbai or other designated locations. Candidates meeting the stringent eligibility criteria are encouraged to review the details below and apply before the deadline.

### Vacancy Details

| Post Name          | Total Vacancies |
| :----------------- | :-------------- |
| Manager (Contract) | 06              |

### Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill the following criteria as of May 01, 2026:

*   **Educational Qualification:** A Graduate Degree or equivalent from a recognized University with a minimum Second Class.
*   **Professional Qualification:** Must have successfully passed the CAIIB examination.
*   **Experience:** A minimum of 10 to 12 years of banking experience at a Senior or Middle Management level in Commercial Banks, District Central Co-operative Banks, Urban Banks, or Co-operative Banks.
*   **Language Proficiency:** Essential proficiency in Marathi, English, and Hindi.
*   **Note:** Retired candidates or those who have resigned with adequate relevant experience are also eligible to apply.

### Age Limit

Candidates should be between **45 and 62 years** of age as on May 01, 2026.

### Salary / Remuneration

Selected candidates will receive a minimum remuneration of **₹83,000/- per month**. Higher remuneration may be offered to exceptionally deserving candidates based on their qualifications and experience, as pay scale will not be a limiting factor for suitable profiles.

### Application Fee

| Category       | Fee     |
| :------------- | :------ |
| All Candidates | **Nil** |

No application fee is required to be paid for this recruitment.

### Selection Process

The selection of candidates for the Manager (Contract) posts will involve the following stages:

1.  **Screening of Applications:** Initial screening of all submitted applications to ensure compliance with eligibility criteria.
2.  **Shortlisting:** Eligible candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.
3.  **Interview / Discussion Process:** Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview or discussion to assess their suitability for the role.

### Important Dates

| Event                                 | Date           |
| :------------------------------------ | :------------- |
| Last Date for Receipt of Applications | **June 22, 2026** |

### How to Apply for MSC Bank Manager Recruitment 2026

Eligible and interested candidates are required to apply in the prescribed application format. Follow these steps to complete your application:

1.  **Download Application Form:** Obtain the prescribed application format from the official Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd. (MSC Bank) website (www.mscbank.com) or refer to the detailed recruitment notification.
2.  **Fill the Form:** Carefully fill in all mandatory details in the application form, including personal information, educational qualifications, professional experience, and any other required particulars.
3.  **Attach Documents:** Prepare self-attested photocopies of the following documents:
    *   Proof of Date of Birth
    *   Educational Certificates / Mark Sheets
    *   Experience Certificates (clearly indicating the area, organization, and period of service)
    *   Copies of relevant published work / research papers (if any)
4.  **Send Application:** Place the completed application form along with all self-attested supporting documents in an envelope. Address it to:
    The Deputy General Manager (OSD), HRD&M Department,
    The Maharashtra State Co-operative Bank Ltd., Mumbai,
    Sir Vithaldas Thackersey Smruti Bhavan,
    9, Maharashtra Chamber of Commerce Lane, Fort,
    Mumbai - 400001
5.  **Submission Deadline:** Ensure that your application reaches the aforementioned address on or before **June 22, 2026**. Applications received after the stipulated deadline will not be considered.
6.  **Retain a Copy:** It is strongly recommended to keep a photocopy of your submitted application for your records and future reference.

*   **Note:** Knowledge of the Marathi language is mandatory for this position.

### Important Links

*   **Official Website:** [www.mscbank.com](https://www.mscbank.com/)

content:
## BEDF Meerut Recruitment 2026 – Apply for 07 Lab Analyst & Subject Matter Specialist Posts

Basmati Export Development Foundation (BEDF), a society founded by APEDA under the Ministry of Commerce & Industry, Government of India, has released Advertisement No. 03/2026 dated 01 June 2026 for engagement of 07 contractual positions of Lab Analyst (DNA Lab), Lab Analyst (Quality) and Subject Matter Specialist at its state-of-the-art laboratory and Demonstration cum Training Farm at Modipuram, Meerut (Uttar Pradesh). This is an excellent opportunity for qualified professionals to work in the field of Basmati rice export development, quality testing and agricultural extension.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates | Nil |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Notification Release | 01 June 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply | 22 June 2026 (17:00 hours) |
| Interview Date | To be intimated via email to shortlisted candidates |

### Vacancy Details
| S.No. | Position | Vacancies | Place of Posting |
|-------|----------|-----------|------------------|
| 1 | Lab Analyst (DNA Lab) | 01 | BEDF Lab, Modipuram, Meerut |
| 2 | Lab Analyst (Quality) | 01 | BEDF Lab, Modipuram, Meerut |
| 3 | Subject Matter Specialist | 05 | Chandigarh (Punjab) – 01, Pilibhit (Uttarakhand & UP) – 02, Modipuram (UP & Haryana) – 02 |
| **Total** | | **07** | |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Age Limit (as on last date of application):** Maximum 35 years.
- **Educational Qualification & Experience:**
  - **Lab Analyst (DNA Lab):** M.Tech / M.Sc in Biotechnology / Food Technology / Chemistry + Minimum 4 years experience in Food Testing Lab with hands-on knowledge of DNA fingerprinting, GMO detection, DNA extraction, PCR, RT-PCR etc.
  - **Lab Analyst (Quality):** M.Sc / M.Tech in Food Technology / Life Science + Minimum 4 years experience in Food Testing Lab. Experience in rice quality testing is desirable.
  - **Subject Matter Specialist:** Master Degree in Agronomy / Seed Technology / Genetics & Plant Breeding / Plant Protection / Agriculture Extension etc. + Minimum 4 years experience in crop/seed production, organic farming, agricultural extension or marketing. Proficiency in MS Office is mandatory.

### Salary & Benefits
- **Consolidated Salary:** ₹70,000 per month for all posts (inclusive of all taxes and allowances).
- **Engagement:** Purely contractual for an initial period of 1 year (including 3 weeks probation), extendable on yearly basis based on performance.
- **Accommodation:** Free accommodation may be provided as per availability. No other facilities or allowances are admissible.

### Selection Process
1. Screening of Applications / Shortlisting
2. Personal Interview (only shortlisted candidates will be contacted via email)

### How to Apply
1. Download the prescribed application format from the official notification PDF.
2. Fill the application form neatly and get it typed / signed.
3. Prepare your updated CV / Resume along with self-attested copies of all educational certificates, experience letters, and other relevant documents.
4. Send the complete application (application form + CV + documents) through email only to **jdbedf@apeda.gov.in**.
5. Mention the post applied for clearly in the subject line of the email.
6. Applications received after **22 June 2026 (17:00 hours)** or through any other mode will not be considered.
7. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted via email for the interview.

### Important Links
- [Official Notification & Application Format PDF](#) (Link not available)
- [BEDF / APEDA Official Website](https://apeda.gov.in)

### FAQs
**Q1. How many vacancies are announced in BEDF Meerut Recruitment 2026?**
A1. Total 07 contractual vacancies have been announced (02 Lab Analyst + 05 Subject Matter Specialist).

**Q2. What is the last date to apply for BEDF Meerut 2026?**
A2. The last date for receipt of application is 22 June 2026 (17:00 hours).

**Q3. What is the educational qualification required?**
A3. M.Sc / M.Tech in Biotechnology / Food Technology / Life Science / Agronomy / Seed Technology / Genetics etc. with minimum 4 years relevant experience.

**Q4. What is the monthly remuneration?**
A4. Consolidated remuneration of ₹70,000 per month for all posts.

**Q5. What is the selection process?**
A5. Shortlisting of applications followed by Personal Interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted via email.

**Q6. How to apply for BEDF Meerut Recruitment 2026?**
A6. Send the duly filled & signed prescribed application format along with CV and self-attested documents via email to jdbedf@apeda.gov.in on or before 22 June 2026.

content:
## UKSSSC Kanisth Sahayak & Stenographer Recruitment 2026 – 398 Vacancies

The Uttarakhand Subordinate Services Selection Commission (UKSSSC) invites online applications from eligible candidates for 398 posts of Kanisth Sahayak (Junior Assistant) and Stenographer Grade-1/Personal Assistant in Civil Courts and Family Courts under the Nainital High Court, Uttarakhand. The online application process starts from **22nd June 2026** and closes on **6th July 2026**.

### Post-wise Vacancy Details

| Post | Court Type | Pay Scale | No. of Posts |
|------|------------|-----------|--------------|
| Kanisth Sahayak (Junior Assistant) | Civil Courts | Level-03 (₹21,700 – ₹69,100) | 230 |
| Kanisth Sahayak (Junior Assistant) | Family Courts | Level-03 (₹21,700 – ₹69,100) | 29 |
| Stenographer Grade-1 / Personal Assistant | Civil Courts | Level-05 (₹29,200 – ₹92,300) | 128 |
| Stenographer Grade-1 / Personal Assistant | Family Courts | Level-07 (₹44,900 – ₹1,42,400) | 11 |
| **Total** | | | **398** |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Educational Qualification**: Graduate from a recognized University. Good knowledge of Hindi and English.
- **Typing/Shorthand Skills**:
  - Kanisth Sahayak: Hindi Typing speed minimum 25 WPM on Computer (English Typing 30 WPM preferred).
  - Stenographer: Hindi Shorthand minimum 80 WPM + Hindi Typing 25 WPM (English Shorthand 80 WPM & Typing 35 WPM preferred).
- **Computer Knowledge**: Basic knowledge of Computer Operation.

### Age Limit
- Minimum: 21 years
- Maximum: 35 years (as on 01.01.2026)
- Age relaxation as per government rules for reserved categories.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| Unreserved (UR) / OBC | ₹300/- |
| SC / ST / EWS / PwD (Uttarakhand) | ₹150/- |
| Orphan (Anath) | ₹0/- |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Notification Date | 15 June 2026 |
| Commencement of Online Application | 22 June 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Application | 06 July 2026 |
| Application Correction Window | 08 to 10 July 2026 |
| Tentative Written Exam Date | 23 August 2026 |

### Selection Process
1. Written Objective Type Competitive Examination (140 Marks)
2. Typing / Shorthand Skill Test (60 Marks) – Qualifying Nature
3. Document Verification

### How to Apply
Eligible candidates must apply online through the official UKSSSC website. The steps are as follows:

1. Visit the official website [https://sssc.uk.gov.in](https://sssc.uk.gov.in) and register using a valid mobile number and email ID.
2. Fill in Personal Details, Educational Qualification, and other required information.
3. Upload scanned Photograph, Signature, and Left Thumb Impression in the prescribed format.
4. Pay the application fee online (if applicable).
5. Review all details carefully and submit the application.
6. Take a printout of the submitted application form for future reference.

### Important Links
- **Official Website**: [https://sssc.uk.gov.in](https://sssc.uk.gov.in)
- **Detailed Notification PDF**: [Click Here](#) (Link not available)
- **Apply Online**: [Click Here](#) (Link not available)

### FAQs
**Q1: What is the total number of vacancies in UKSSSC Recruitment 2026?**
Total 398 posts (259 Kanisth Sahayak + 139 Stenographer Grade-1/Personal Assistant).

**Q2: What is the age limit for UKSSSC Kanisth Sahayak & Stenographer Recruitment 2026?**
21 to 35 years as on 01.01.2026 (with age relaxation for reserved categories).

**Q3: What is the educational qualification required?**
Graduate degree + Hindi Typing / Shorthand knowledge as per post requirement.

**Q4: What is the selection process?**
Written Examination + Typing/Shorthand Skill Test + Document Verification.

**Q5: What is the last date to apply for UKSSSC Recruitment 2026?**
06 July 2026.

**Q6: Where to apply?**
Online through the official UKSSSC website (https://sssc.uk.gov.in).

- Additional Requirements: Basic knowledge of accounts, medically fit, no disciplinary history.

**Dissection Hall Attendant (DHA)**
- Educational Qualification: Ex-Serviceman (ESM) from Army Medical Corps (AMC), Retired House Keeper (AMC), minimum 15 years of service in Army Medical Corps.
- Age Limit (as on 01 July 2026): Below 53 years.
- Additional Requirements: Medically fit for the job, no disciplinary history.

### Selection Process

A4. Consolidated salary of ₹25,500 per month for both posts.

overview: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has announced the release of Admit Cards for the Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2026. Candidates who have successfully registered for this prestigious examination can now download their admit cards from the official UPSC website. This document is mandatory for entry into the examination hall and contains crucial details such as the candidate's name, roll number, exam venue, date, and time. meta_description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has announced the release of Admit Cards for the Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2026. Candidates who have succ
content:
The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has announced the release of admit cards for the Civil Services Examination (CSE) 2026. This is a crucial step for all registered candidates as the admit card is a mandatory document for appearing in the examination. Candidates are strongly advised to download their admit cards promptly and review all details carefully.

### Important Dates

| Event                     | Date              |
| :------------------------ | :---------------- |
| **Admit Card Release**    | To be announced   |
| **Examination Date**      | To be announced   |
| **Last Date to Download** | To be announced   |

*Note: Specific dates will be updated upon official announcement by UPSC. Candidates should regularly check the official UPSC website for the latest updates.*

### How to Download Your Admit Card

Follow these steps to successfully download your UPSC Civil Services 2026 Admit Card:

1.  **Visit the Official UPSC Website:** Navigate to the e-Admit Card section on the official UPSC portal. (A direct link will be available on the official site upon release).
2.  **Locate Admit Card Link:** Find the link for "e-Admit Card - Civil Services (Preliminary/Main) Examination 2026".
3.  **Login Credentials:** You will typically need to enter your Registration ID / Roll Number and Date of Birth (DD/MM/YYYY) as required.
4.  **View and Verify:** Once logged in, your admit card will be displayed on the screen. Verify all the details such as your name, photograph, signature, roll number, exam center, date, and time.
5.  **Download and Print:** Download the admit card and take a clear printout. It is advisable to print multiple copies for safety.
6.  **Read Instructions:** Carefully read all the instructions mentioned on the admit card regarding exam day rules and regulations.

### Examination Day Guidelines

To ensure a smooth examination experience, candidates must adhere to the following guidelines:

*   **Mandatory Documents:** Carry a printout of your e-Admit Card along with a valid photo identity proof (e.g., Aadhaar Card, Passport, Voter ID, Driving License) in original.
*   **Reporting Time:** Report to the examination venue well in advance of the scheduled time to complete biometric verification and other formalities.
*   **Prohibited Items:** Do not carry any electronic gadgets such as mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators (unless permitted for specific exams), study material, or any other unauthorized items into the examination hall.
*   **Pencil/Pen:** Carry your own black ballpoint pen for marking answers on the OMR sheet.
*   **Rough Work:** Rough sheets will be provided at the examination center. Do not write anything on the admit card or question booklet other than the designated spaces.
*   **Face Mask & Sanitizer:** Candidates are advised to follow all prevailing COVID-19 safety protocols, including wearing a face mask and carrying personal hand sanitizer, if applicable.
*   **Instructions:** Follow all instructions given by the invigilators strictly.

### Verification Documents Required

Candidates must bring the following documents to the examination center:

*   **Printed e-Admit Card:** A clear printout of the UPSC Civil Services 2026 Admit Card.
*   **Original Photo ID Proof:** Any one of the following valid photo identity cards in original:
    *   Aadhaar Card / E-Aadhaar
    *   Passport
    *   Voter ID Card
    *   Driving License
    *   PAN Card
    *   Any other photo ID card issued by Central/State Govt.
*   **Photograph (Optional):** While not always explicitly required at the center if the admit card photo is clear, it's good practice to carry a couple of recent passport-size photographs, similar to the one uploaded during application, in case of any discrepancy.

Please ensure that the details on your admit card match those on your photo ID proof. In case of any discrepancy, contact the UPSC examination authorities immediately.

content:
## ICAR IARI Field Assistant & Young Professional Recruitment 2026 – Apply for 03 Posts

ICAR - Indian Agricultural Research Institute (IARI), New Delhi invites applications for contractual positions of Young Professional-II and Field Assistant under externally funded projects in the Division of Environmental Sciences. The last date for submission of application by email is 30th June 2026. The online interview is tentatively scheduled for 8th July 2026.

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | No. of Vacancies | Emoluments |
|-----------|-----------------|------------|
| Young Professional-II (YP-II) | 01 | ₹42,000/- (Fixed) |
| Field Assistant | 01 | ₹22,000/- (Fixed) |
| Field Assistant | 01 | ₹20,191/- (Fixed) |
| **Total** | **03** | |

### Eligibility Criteria
| Post Name | Age Limit | Educational Qualification & Experience |
|-----------|-----------|----------------------------------------|
| Young Professional-II | Maximum 35 years (Relaxation as per rules) | Essential: First class Master’s degree in Environmental Sciences / Soil Science & Agricultural Chemistry / Ag Chemistry (with thesis work). Desirable: Experience in soil & air sampling/analysis, handling GC, GC-MS, Spectrophotometer, scientific literature review, good scientific writing, data curation & analysis in MS Excel. |
| Field Assistant | As per rules | Essential: 10th Pass with experience of working in agricultural fields and data entry in MS Excel. Desirable: Experience in soil & GHG sampling, soil sample processing, GHG data entry. |
| Field Assistant | As per rules | Essential: 10th Pass with experience of working in agricultural fields and data entry in MS Excel. Desirable: Experience in soil sample collection and soil sample processing. |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates | Nil |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Date of Notification | 15 June 2026 |
| Last Date for Submission of Application (by Email) | 30 June 2026 |
| Tentative Date of Online Interview | 08 July 2026 (from 10:00 AM onwards) |

### Selection Process
The selection will be done through:
- Screening of Applications
- Online Interview (Tentatively on 8th July 2026)
- Original documents will be verified at the time of appointment.

### How to Apply
Eligible candidates must send their application via email. The steps are as follows:
1. Download the Application Performa from the official notification PDF.
2. Fill the application form completely and attach self-attested scanned copies of all required documents (educational certificates, experience certificates, date of birth proof, recent photograph, etc.).
3. Send the application along with all documents to the email ID **stlproject.iari@gmail.com** latest by **30th June 2026**.
4. Shortlisted candidates will be informed via email for the online interview scheduled on **8th July 2026**.
5. Original documents will be verified at the time of joining.

**Note:** The posts are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project (up to Dec 2027, extendable on satisfactory performance). No claim for regular appointment.

### Important Links
- [Detailed Notification & Application Form PDF](#)
- [Official Website](https://iari.res.in/)

### FAQs
**Q1: What is the total number of vacancies in ICAR IARI Field Assistant & Young Professional Recruitment 2026?**
A: Total 3 posts (1 Young Professional-II + 2 Field Assistant).

**Q2: What is the age limit for ICAR IARI YP-II Recruitment 2026?**
A: Maximum 35 years for Young Professional-II (Age relaxation of 5 years for SC/ST & Women and 3 years for OBC).

**Q3: What is the emoluments in ICAR IARI Field Assistant & Young Professional Recruitment 2026?**
A: Young Professional-II: ₹42,000/- (Fixed) | Field Assistant: ₹22,000/- or ₹20,191/- (Fixed) per month.

**Q4: What is the selection process for ICAR IARI YP-II & Field Assistant Recruitment 2026?**
A: Screening of applications followed by Online Interview (Tentatively on 8th July 2026).

**Q5: What is the last date to apply for ICAR IARI Field Assistant & Young Professional Recruitment 2026?**
A: Last date for submission of application by email: 30 June 2026.

**Q6: How to apply for ICAR IARI YP-II and Field Assistant posts?**
A: Send filled application form along with self-attested scanned documents to stlproject.iari@gmail.com by 30th June 2026.

content:
## APEDA Recruitment 2026 – Assistant General Manager & Assistant Manager Posts

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Vacancies | Pay Level | Reservation |
|-----------|-----------|-----------|-------------|
| Assistant General Manager (Finance) | 01 | Level-10 | UR |
| Assistant Manager | 02 | Level-6 | UR |
| Assistant Manager (Agriculture) | 01 | Level-6 | UR (PwBD – Low Vision) |
| **Grand Total** | **04 Posts** | | |

### Application Fee
| Post | Fee |
|------|-----|
| Assistant General Manager (Finance) | ₹500 + GST |
| Assistant Manager / Assistant Manager (Agriculture) | ₹300 + GST |
| Women & PwBD | Nil (Exempted) |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Advertisement Date | 23 May 2026 |
| Start Date for Online Application | 23 May 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Application | 22 June 2026 (23:59 hours) |

### Eligibility Criteria
**Age Limit (as on closing date):**
- Assistant General Manager (Finance): Maximum 35 years
- Assistant Manager / Assistant Manager (Agriculture): Maximum 30 years
- Age Relaxation: PwBD: 10 years; Ex-Servicemen: 3 years after deduction of military service; Defence Personnel disabled in operation: 3 years; APEDA Regular Employees (3+ years service): 5 years

**Educational Qualification & Experience:**
- **Assistant General Manager (Finance):** Post Graduate in Finance / Financial Management / MBA (Finance) OR Chartered Accountant (ICAI) with minimum 5 years post-qualification experience.
- **Assistant Manager / Assistant Manager (Agriculture):** Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture, Horticulture, Plantation, Agriculture Engineering, Food Technology, Food Science, Dairy Technology, Food Processing or related disciplines from a recognized University/Institution.

### Selection Process
- **Assistant General Manager (Finance):** Written Test (100 Marks) + Interview (40 Marks)
- **Assistant Manager & Assistant Manager (Agriculture):** Written Test only (100 Marks)

### Exam Pattern
**Assistant General Manager (Finance) – Written Test**
| Subject | Questions | Marks |
|---------|-----------|-------|
| General Management & Managerial Ability | 10 | 10 |
| Logical Reasoning, Problem Solving & Analytical Ability | 10 | 10 |
| IT & Computer Awareness | 10 | 10 |
| Current Affairs | 10 | 10 |
| General Economics | 5 | 5 |
| English Grammar | 5 | 5 |
| Descriptive Questions (Relevant Subject) | 3 | 50 |
| **Total** | **—** | **100** |
Duration: 3 Hours • Negative Marking: 25% for each wrong answer in objective questions.

**Assistant Manager Posts – Written Test**
| Section | Questions | Marks |
|---------|-----------|-------|
| General Awareness, English & Reasoning | 20 | 20 |
| APEDA / Agri Export Related | 30 | 30 |
| Degree-Level Subject Questions | 30 | 30 |
| Essay Writing & Precis Writing | 2 | 20 |
| **Total** | **—** | **100** |
Duration: 2½ Hours • Negative Marking: 25% for each wrong answer in objective questions.

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official recruitment portal: [https://jobapply.in/apeda2026/](https://jobapply.in/apeda2026/)
2. Register with a valid Email ID and Mobile Number.
3. Fill the online application form with all required details.
4. Upload scanned photograph, signature, and supporting documents.
5. Pay the application fee (if applicable) online.
6. Submit the form and take a printout of the confirmation page for future reference.

Candidates can apply for more than one post separately.

### Important Links
- **Official Notification PDF:** [Download PDF](#) (Link not available)
- **Apply Online:** [https://jobapply.in/apeda2026/](https://jobapply.in/apeda2026/)
- **Official Website:** [www.apeda.gov.in](https://www.apeda.gov.in)

### FAQs
**Q1. How many vacancies are announced in APEDA Recruitment 2026?**
A1. Total 04 vacancies have been announced (01 AGM Finance + 02 Assistant Manager + 01 Assistant Manager (Agriculture) reserved for PwBD).

**Q2. What is the last date to apply for APEDA 2026?**
A2. The last date to submit online application is 22 June 2026 (23:59 hours).

**Q3. What is the educational qualification required?**
A3. CA / PG in Finance for AGM (Finance); Bachelor’s Degree in Agriculture / Food Technology / Horticulture etc. for Assistant Manager posts.

**Q4. What is the salary in APEDA Recruitment 2026?**
A4. Pay Level-10 (₹56,100 – ₹1,77,500) for AGM and Pay Level-6 (₹35,400 – ₹1,12,400) for Assistant Manager posts.

**Q5. What is the selection process?**
A5. Written Test + Interview for Assistant General Manager (Finance); Written Test only for Assistant Manager posts.

**Q6. Is there any application fee exemption?**
A6. Yes, Women candidates and Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) are fully exempted from payment of application fee.

content:
## SAMS Odisha Plus 3 First Allotment List 2026

The Student Academic Management System (SAMS), Odisha, has released the first allotment list for Plus 3 (undergraduate) admissions for the academic year 2026. Candidates who applied for admission to various undergraduate programs across colleges in Odisha can now check their allotment status online.

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Release of First Allotment List | 2026-07-15 |
| Last Date to Accept Allotment | 2026-07-20 |
| Reporting to Allotted College | 2026-07-22 to 2026-07-25 |

### How to Check Allotment List

1. Visit the official SAMS Odisha website: [https://samsodisha.gov.in](https://samsodisha.gov.in)
2. Click on the 'Plus 3 First Allotment List 2026' link.
3. Enter your application number and date of birth.
4. View your allotment status and download the allotment letter.
5. Accept the allotment and report to the allotted college with required documents.

### Documents Required for Reporting

- Allotment letter (downloaded from the portal)
- Class 12 mark sheet and certificate
- School leaving certificate
- Category certificate (if applicable)
- Recent passport-size photographs
- Identity proof (Aadhaar card, voter ID, etc.)

### Important Notes

- Candidates must accept the allotment by the specified date to secure their seat.
- Failure to report to the allotted college within the given timeline may result in cancellation of the allotment.
- Subsequent allotment rounds will be conducted for remaining vacancies.

For more details, visit the official SAMS Odisha website.

## HPSEBL Apprentices Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 98 Posts

The Himachal Pradesh State Electricity Board Limited (HPSEBL) has announced a golden opportunity for aspiring candidates with the release of its Apprentices Recruitment 2026 notification. This recruitment drive aims to fill 98 vacant positions for Apprentices across various disciplines, offering a valuable platform to gain practical experience within a leading state-level public sector undertaking. Candidates with relevant educational qualifications are encouraged to apply online.

### Vacancy Details

| Post Name  | Total Vacancies |
| :--------- | :-------------- |
| Apprentice | 98              |

### Eligibility Criteria

Candidates applying for the HPSEBL Apprentices Recruitment 2026 must meet the following educational qualifications:

*   **Educational Qualification:** Applicants should possess a B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, CA, or an equivalent Degree from a recognized University or Institution.
*   *Specific discipline requirements, if any, will be detailed in the official notification.*

### Age Limit

The age limit for applicants will be as per the official notification released by HPSEBL.

*   **Minimum Age:** As per HPSEBL norms.
*   **Maximum Age:** As per HPSEBL norms.
*   *Age relaxation for reserved categories will be applicable as per Himachal Pradesh Government rules.*

### Application Fee

Candidates are required to pay an application fee as detailed below. Please refer to the official notification for exact amounts and payment methods.

| Category             | Fee Amount (Tentative)          |
| :------------------- | :------------------------------ |
| General / OBC        | To be announced                 |
| SC / ST / PwD        | To be announced                 |
| **Payment Mode:**    | Online (Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card) |

### Important Dates

Mark your calendars with the crucial dates for the HPSEBL Apprentices Recruitment 2026:

| Event                         | Date            |
| :---------------------------- | :-------------- |
| Application Start Date        | 18 June 2026    |
| Application End Date          | 13 July 2026    |
| Last Date for Fee Payment     | To be announced |
| Admit Card Release Date       | To be announced |
| Examination Date              | To be announced |
| Result Declaration            | To be announced |

### How to Apply

Follow these step-by-step instructions to successfully apply online for the HPSEBL Apprentices Recruitment 2026:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the official website of Himachal Pradesh State Electricity Board Limited (HPSEBL) at [hpseb.in](https://www.hpseb.in).
2.  **Navigate to Recruitment Section:** Look for the 'Recruitment' or 'Careers' section on the homepage.
3.  **Find the Notification:** Locate the link for "HPSEBL Apprentices Recruitment 2026" and click on it to access the detailed notification. Read it thoroughly to understand eligibility criteria, terms, and conditions.
4.  **Click on Apply Online:** Once you have reviewed the notification, click on the 'Apply Online' link.
5.  **Registration:** If you are a new user, you will need to register by providing essential details such as your name, email ID, and mobile number. A registration ID and password will be generated.
6.  **Login:** Log in using your generated registration credentials.
7.  **Fill the Application Form:** Complete the online application form with accurate personal, educational, and contact details.
8.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, and any other required documents in the specified format and size.
9.  **Pay Application Fee:** Proceed to pay the application fee, if applicable, through the provided online payment gateway (Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card).
10. **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the information entered in the application form before final submission. Ensure there are no errors.
11. **Print Application:** After successful submission, take a printout of the completed application form and the e-receipt of the fee payment for your records.

| Official Notification    | *Link will be updated soon*     |

## Re NEET Answer Key 2026 Code 50 (Unofficial)

The National Testing Agency (NTA) conducted the Re NEET UG 2026 examination on June 21, 2026. The unofficial answer key for Code 50 is now available for download. Candidates can use this key to estimate their scores using the +4/-1 marking scheme. The official answer key is expected to be released soon on the NTA website at neet.nta.nic.in.

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Re NEET UG 2026 Exam Date | June 21, 2026 |
| Unofficial Answer Key Release | June 22, 2026 |
| Official Answer Key Release (Expected) | To be announced |

### How to Download Unofficial Answer Key

1. Visit the official NTA website: [neet.nta.nic.in](https://neet.nta.nic.in)
2. Click on the 'Re NEET 2026 Answer Key' link.
3. Select your paper code (Code 50).
4. Download the PDF answer key.

### Score Calculation

- **Correct Answer**: +4 marks
- **Incorrect Answer**: -1 mark
- **Unanswered**: 0 marks

Calculate your estimated score by counting correct and incorrect answers.

### Official Answer Key

The official answer key will be released by NTA on the official website. Candidates are advised to check regularly for updates.

### Documents Required for Verification (if applicable)

- Admit Card
- Photo ID proof
- Passport size photographs

Stay tuned for further updates.

meta_description: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has announced the release of e-Admit Cards for the highly anticipated Civil Services Examination 2026. This cruc
content:
## UPSC Civil Services Admit Card 2026: Essential Information for Candidates

The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has released the e-Admit Cards for the Civil Services Examination 2026. This vital document is mandatory for entry into the examination hall. Candidates are advised to download their admit cards well in advance to avoid last-minute issues and to thoroughly check all printed details.

### Important Dates

| Event                     | Date          |
| :------------------------ | :------------ |
| Admit Card Release Date   | To be announced |
| Preliminary Exam Date     | To be announced |
| Mains Exam Date           | To be announced |
| Interview Dates           | To be announced |

### Admit Card Download Procedure

Candidates who have successfully applied for the UPSC Civil Services Examination 2026 can download their e-Admit Cards by following these steps:

1.  **Access the Official Portal**: Visit the official website of the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC).
2.  **Locate Admit Card Link**: Navigate to the 'e-Admit Cards' section on the homepage.
3.  **Select Examination**: Click on the link for 'e-Admit Card - Civil Services (Preliminary/Main) Examination 2026'.
4.  **Enter Credentials**: You will be prompted to enter your Registration ID/Roll Number and Date of Birth.
5.  **Verify & Download**: After entering the required information, verify the details, and click on the submit button. Your admit card will be displayed.
6.  **Print Admit Card**: Download and take a printout of your e-Admit Card. Ensure that all details are clearly visible.

### Documents Required for Examination

Candidates must carry the following documents to the examination center:

*   **Printed e-Admit Card**: A clear printout of the downloaded e-Admit Card.
*   **Photo Identity Proof**: Original photo identity proof (e.g., Aadhaar Card, PAN Card, Passport, Driving License, Voter ID) whose number is mentioned on the e-Admit Card.
*   **Photographs (Optional)**: While not always mandatory for entry, it is advisable to carry two passport-size photographs (similar to the one uploaded during application) as a precaution in case of any discrepancy in the admit card photo.

### Examination Day Guidelines

*   **Reporting Time**: Candidates must reach the examination venue at least 30 minutes before the scheduled start of the exam as indicated on the admit card.
*   **Prohibited Items**: Electronic gadgets such as mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, Bluetooth devices, and any other communication devices are strictly prohibited inside the examination hall. Bags, books, notes, and other study material are also not allowed.
*   **Face Mask & Sanitizer**: Candidates are advised to adhere to the latest health advisories, which may include wearing a face mask and carrying a small hand sanitizer bottle.
*   **Biometric Attendance**: Be prepared for biometric attendance or photo capture at the exam center.
*   **Maintain Discipline**: Follow all instructions given by the invigilators and maintain decorum inside the examination hall.
*   **Rough Work**: All rough work must be done only on the blank sheets provided by the invigilator at the examination center.

*Note: It is crucial for candidates to read all instructions mentioned on their e-Admit Card carefully before proceeding to the examination center.*

content:
## NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026: Walk-in Interview for DEO & Programmer Assistant Posts

National Institute of Electronics and Information Technology (NIELIT) invites applications from eligible and dynamic candidates for a walk-in interview for the recruitment of Programmer Assistant ‘A’ and Data Entry Operator posts. These positions are on a contract basis and will be located at Meerut, Uttar Pradesh. This is an excellent opportunity for individuals looking to contribute their skills to a leading organization in the electronics and information technology sector.

### Vacancy Details

NIELIT aims to fill 02 contractual positions through this recruitment drive. The post-wise distribution of vacancies is as follows:

| Post Name                  | No. of Vacancies |
| :------------------------- | :--------------- |
| Programmer Assistant ‘A’   | 01               |
| Data Entry Operator        | 01               |
| **Total Vacancies**        | **02**           |

### Eligibility Criteria

Candidates applying for the NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026 must fulfill the following eligibility criteria:

**1. Programmer Assistant ‘A’**
*   **Qualification & Experience:**
    *   Bachelor’s Degree in Computer Science / Computer Applications / Electronics & Communication or equivalent with minimum 50% marks.
    *   **OR** Bachelor’s degree in Science, Mathematics, Statistics, Economics, Commerce, Operations Research + One year ‘A’ level of NIELIT / PGDCA (with minimum 50% marks).
    *   Knowledge in large software Designing & Development using VB, .Net, JAVA, JSP, D2K, SQL server/Oracle, WIN NT/Linux with Hardware and Networking knowledge.
    *   **Desirable:** 5+ years of experience.
*   **Location:** Meerut

**2. Data Entry Operator**
*   **Qualification & Experience:**
    *   10+2 Pass with a good typing speed of at least 30 words per minute (wpm).
    *   Working knowledge of MS-Office.
    *   **Desirable:** 5+ years of experience.
*   **Location:** Meerut

### Age Limit

The age limit for candidates will be as per the official notification. Applicants are advised to refer to the detailed NIELIT advertisement for specific age criteria, including any relaxations applicable to reserved categories.

### Salary Structure

Selected candidates for these contractual positions will receive an attractive consolidated monthly remuneration as follows:

*   **Programmer Assistant ‘A’**: ₹77,837 per month
*   **Data Entry Operator**: ₹38,832 per month

### Application Fee

A non-refundable application fee is required to be paid by all candidates applying for the NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026. Details are as follows:

| Category                      | Application Fee |
| :---------------------------- | :-------------- |
| General / OBC / SC / ST Candidates | ₹750/-          |

### Selection Process

The selection of candidates for the Programmer Assistant ‘A’ and Data Entry Operator posts will be based on a multi-stage process to assess their suitability and skills:

1.  **Document Verification:** Scrutiny of original educational, experience, and other relevant documents.
2.  **Typing Test:** For Data Entry Operator post, a test to assess typing speed and accuracy.
3.  **Interview / Personal Interaction:** A direct interview to evaluate technical knowledge, communication skills, and overall fit for the role.

### Important Dates and Walk-in Schedule

Candidates should mark the following important dates related to the NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026:

| Event                       | Date           |
| :-------------------------- | :------------- |
| Notification Date           | 19 June 2026   |
| Eligibility Cut-off Date (as on) | 23 June 2026   |
| Walk-in Interview Date      | 25 June 2026   |

### How to Apply for NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026

Eligible and interested candidates must attend the Walk-in Interview on the specified date. Follow the steps below:

1.  **Read Official Notification:** Before attending the interview, thoroughly read the official NIELIT detailed notification. This document contains complete information regarding eligibility, reporting time, venue, and required documents.
2.  **Report to Venue:** Reach the designated interview venue on **25th June 2026** as per the reporting time mentioned in the official notification. Punctuality is crucial.
3.  **Carry Original Documents:** Bring all original documents, along with one set of self-attested photocopies. Essential documents include:
    *   Identity Proof (Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID, etc.)
    *   All Educational Certificates (from 10th standard onwards)
    *   Experience Certificates (if applicable)
    *   Category Certificate (for SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates, if applicable)
4.  **Application Form & Photographs:** Ensure you bring a duly filled application form (if a specific format is provided in the notification) and extra passport-size photographs.
5.  **Eligibility Verification:** Verify your complete eligibility as per the notification before proceeding to the venue. Arrive well in advance to complete all registration and verification formalities smoothly.

### Important Links

*   **NIELIT Detailed Notification:** [Official link not available; refer to `indgovtjobs.in` for indirect links or NIELIT's main website for official publications.]
*   **NIELIT Application Form:** [Official link not available; refer to `indgovtjobs.in` for indirect links or NIELIT's main website for official publications.]

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

**Q1: What is the total number of vacancies in NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026?**
A1: There are a total of 02 posts (Programmer Assistant ‘A’ – 01 & Data Entry Operator – 01).

**Q2: What is the age limit for NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026?**
A2: The age limit is as per the official notification. Candidates should refer to the detailed NIELIT advertisement for specific age criteria.

**Q3: What is the pay scale in NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026?**
A3: Programmer Assistant ‘A’ will receive ₹77,837 per month, and Data Entry Operator will receive ₹38,832 per month.

**Q4: What is the selection process for NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026?**
A4: The selection process includes Document Verification, a Typing Test, and an Interview / Personal Interaction.

**Q5: What is the application fee for NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026?**
A5: The application fee is ₹750/- for all categories (General/OBC/SC/ST).

**Q6: What are the important dates for NIELIT IT Resource Person Recruitment 2026?**
A6: The Notification Date is 19 June 2026, and the Walk-in Interview is scheduled for 25 June 2026.

## BEML ITI Operator Recruitment 2026 – 362 Vacancies

BEML Limited, a leading multi-technology company under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India, invites online applications from eligible ITI candidates for recruitment of Operators on Tenure Basis in various trades. The BEML ITI Operator Recruitment 2026 for 362 Vacancies Online Application process starts from 20th June 2026 and closes on 10th July 2026.

| ITI – Machinist | 40 |

### Eligibility Criteria
| Trade | Age Limit (as on 10.07.2026) | Qualification & Experience |
|-------|------------------------------|---------------------------|
| ITI – Fitter / Turner / Welder / Machinist / Electrician (Operator on Tenure Basis) | GEN/EWS: 29 years, OBC: 32 years, SC/ST: 34 years (PwD: Additional 10 years relaxation) | First Class (60% marks) in respective ITI Trade + National Trade Certificate (NTC) from NCVT + National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) from DGT (Minimum 60% marks relaxable by 5% for SC/ST/PwD) |

### Selection Process
The selection will be based on:
- Computer Based Written Test (2 Hours)
- Document Verification

**Written Test Pattern:**
- Part-I: 20 Qs – General Awareness
- Part-II: 20 Qs – English & Reasoning
- Part-III: 60 Qs – Concerned Trade
- Total: 100 marks, No negative marking.
- Pass marks: 45% (relaxed by 5% for SC/ST/PwD).

### How to Apply
Eligible candidates must apply online only through the BEML career portal. The online application steps are as follows:
1. Visit the official BEML career page at www.bemlindia.in and click on the recruitment link.
2. Register with valid email ID and mobile number (valid for at least one year).

4. Upload scanned copies of the following documents: 10th Marks Card, ITI NTC (or Provisional), All ITI Marks Cards, NAC (mandatory), Experience Certificate (if any), Government ID Proof, and Caste/PwD Certificate (if applicable).
5. Submit the application and note down the Registration Number. Take a printout for future reference.
6. The online registration facility will be available till 10.07.2026 (up to 06:00 PM).
