### Vacancy Details

A total of **05 Assistant Manager** positions have been announced. The breakdown of vacancies is as follows:

| Post Name                           | Total Posts | UR | EWS | OBC (Backlog) |
| :---------------------------------- | :---------- | :- | :-- | :------------ |
| Assistant Manager (Dredger/Tugs)    | 3           | 1  | 1   | 1             |
| Assistant Manager (Floating Crafts) | 2           | 1  | -   | 1             |
| **Total**                           | **5**       | **2** | **1** | **2**         |

### Application Fee

There are no application fees mentioned in the official notification for this recruitment. Candidates can apply without any fee payment.

| Category       | Fee      |
| :------------- | :------- |
| All Candidates | No Fee   |

### Pay Scale & Benefits

Selected candidates for the Assistant Manager posts will be offered an attractive pay scale under the IDA (Industrial Dearness Allowance) pattern, along with a comprehensive benefits package:

*   **Pay Scale**: ₹40,000 – ₹1,40,000
*   **Allowances**: Variable Dearness Allowance (VDA), Cafeteria Allowance
*   **Perks**: Accommodation / HRA, Gratuity, National Pension System (NPS), Group Insurance
*   **Welfare**: Medical facilities for self and dependents, Leave benefits, and Earned Leave Encashment

### Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must meet the following educational qualifications and experience requirements for their respective posts as on **01.06.2026**:

#### 1. Assistant Manager (Dredger/Tugs) – 3 Posts

*   **Educational Qualification**: Engineer Certificate of Competency issued under the Merchant Shipping Act.
*   **Experience**: 2 years of post-qualification experience as a Watch Keeping Engineer on ocean-going vessels.
    **OR**
    4 years of experience as an Engine Room Artificer in the Indian Navy, with 2 years of experience as a Watch Keeping Engineer on ocean-going vessels.

#### 2. Assistant Manager (Floating Crafts) – 2 Posts

*   **Educational Qualification**: Degree in Electrical Engineering from a recognized University/Institution.
*   **Experience**: Minimum 3 years of post-qualification experience in the maintenance of marine electrical installations.
    **OR**
    Worked as Chief Electrical Artificer in the Indian Navy.

### Age Limit

*   **Maximum Age**: 28 years (as on 01.06.2026)

#### Age Relaxation:

*   **OBC (NCL)**: 3 years
*   **Ex-Servicemen**: Military service period + 3 years
*   **Major Port Employees**: Up to 55 years

### Selection Process

The selection process for the Assistant Manager posts will involve the following stages:

1.  **Written Test**: This will be conducted if the number of applications received for a particular post is 20 or more.
2.  **Personal Interview**: Candidates will be shortlisted for the interview based on their performance in the Written Test (if applicable) in a ratio of approximately 1:5 or less.

### Important Dates

Candidates should mark the following key dates for the Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026:

| Event                               | Date                  |
| :---------------------------------- | :-------------------- |
| Date of Notification                | 06th / 08th June 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Application    | 19 July 2026          |
| Last Date for Receipt of Hard Copy  | 29 July 2026          |

### How to Apply for Deendayal Port Authority Recruitment 2026

Interested and eligible candidates must follow these steps to apply for the Assistant Manager positions:

1.  **Visit Official Website**: Go to the official website of Deendayal Port Authority (www.deendayalport.gov.in).
2.  **Locate Recruitment**: Navigate to the 'Recruitment' or 'Career' section on the homepage and find the link for Assistant Manager Recruitment 2026.
3.  **Apply Online**: Click on the online application link. Read the instructions carefully, fill out the application form with all required personal, educational, and experience details accurately.
4.  **Upload Documents**: Upload scanned copies of your photograph and signature as per the specifications.
5.  **Submit Online Application**: Review all entered details before final submission. After successful submission, the system will generate an application form with a unique registration number.
6.  **Print Application**: Take a printout of the submitted online application form for your records and for sending the hard copy.
7.  **Attach Documents**: Gather self-attested copies of all necessary supporting documents. These typically include:
    *   Recent passport-sized photograph
    *   Educational qualification certificates (from matriculation onwards)
    *   Experience certificates
    *   Age proof (e.g., birth certificate or matriculation certificate)
    *   Caste/Category certificate (if applying under a reserved category)
    *   Any other relevant documents as specified in the official notification.
8.  **Send Hard Copy**: Place the printed online application form along with the self-attested copies of all required documents in an envelope. Send this envelope through **Speed Post / Registered Post** to the following address:

    > The Secretary
    > Deendayal Port Authority
    > Post Bag No. 50
    > Administrative Office Building, Tagore Road
    > Gandhidham (Kachchh), Gujarat – 370201

9.  **Deadline**: Ensure that the hard copy of your application, complete with all enclosures, reaches the specified address on or before **29 July 2026**. Applications received after this date will not be entertained.

Candidates are advised to regularly check the official website for any updates or corrigenda related to this recruitment.

The age criteria for applying to KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 are as follows:

| :-------------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------- |
| Senior Scientist / Head KVK       | Not exceeding 47 years                         |
| Subject Matter Specialist (Horticulture) | Not exceeding 35 years                         |
| Subject Matter Specialist (Animal Science) | Not exceeding 35 years                         |
| Programme Assistant (Lab Technician) | Not exceeding 30 years                         |

**Age Relaxation**: Upper age limit is relaxed by 5 years for SC/ST candidates and 3 years for OBC candidates.

### Salary Structure

The selected candidates will be offered an attractive pay scale as per the 7th CPC:

### Application Fee

| :-------------- | :-------------- |

| Event                           | Date             |
| :------------------------------ | :--------------- |
| Date of Notification            | 20 June 2026     |

### Selection Process

The selection process for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026 will involve the following stages:
1.  **Shortlisting of Applications**: Applications received will be scrutinized, and eligible candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience.
2.  **Interview**: Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview. The final selection will be based on the performance in the interview.

### How to Apply for KVK Tirunelveli Recruitment 2026?

Eligible candidates must submit their applications offline. Follow these step-by-step instructions carefully:

1.  **Step 1: Download Application Form**: Visit the official website of ICAR – RVS Krishi Vigyan Kendra (KVK) at [https://rvskvk.org](https://rvskvk.org) to download the prescribed application form.

4.  **Step 4: Send by Post**: Enclose the duly filled application form along with all the self-attested copies of documents in an envelope and send it by post to the following address:

Applications received after the deadline will not be considered. Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted for the interview process.

meta_description: The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) has officially released the City Intimation Slip for the upcoming Forester and Vanpal Recruitment Examination 20
content:
## RSSB Forester/Vanpal Exam City Intimation Slip 2026 Released

### Essential Update for Candidates

The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) has activated the download link for the City Intimation Slip for the much-awaited Forester (वनपाल) and Vanpal (वनरक्षक) Recruitment Examination 2026. This slip is a crucial document that informs candidates about their assigned examination city, enabling them to plan their logistics well in advance of the actual examination date.

### Key Information on Your City Intimation Slip

Your downloaded City Intimation Slip will contain vital information to help you prepare for the exam, including:

*   **Candidate's Name**
*   **Application Number**
*   **Date of Birth**
*   **Category**
*   **Allotted Examination City**
*   **Reporting Time (Tentative)**
*   **Important Instructions**

**Note:** This City Intimation Slip is *not* the Admit Card. The official Admit Cards, containing exact exam center details, shift timings, and reporting instructions, will be released separately a few days before the examination.

### Steps to Download Your City Intimation Slip

Follow these simple steps to access and download your RSSB Forester/Vanpal Exam City Intimation Slip 2026:

1.  **Access the Official Portal:** Go to the official website of the Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSMSSB).
2.  **Navigate to News/Admit Card Section:** Look for the 'Latest News' or 'Admit Card' section on the homepage.
3.  **Find the Relevant Link:** Click on the link that reads "Forester/Vanpal Exam City Intimation Slip 2026" or similar.
4.  **Enter Your Login Credentials:** You will be prompted to enter your Application Number/Registration ID, Date of Birth (DOB), and any other required security credentials.
5.  **View Your Slip:** After successful login, your City Intimation Slip will be displayed on the screen.
6.  **Verify Details:** Carefully check all the information, especially your name, application number, and the allotted exam city.
7.  **Download and Print:** Download the slip as a PDF file and take a clear printout for your reference. Keep it safe until the examination process is complete.

### Important Dates

| Event                           | Date        |
| :------------------------------ | :---------- |
| City Intimation Slip Release    | **Released**|
| Forester/Vanpal Exam Date       | To be Notified |
| Admit Card Release              | To be Notified |

### Documents to Carry on Exam Day (General Guidelines)

Although this is an intimation slip, candidates should prepare for the exam day by ensuring they have:

*   **Printed Admit Card:** The actual Admit Card (when released) with a recent passport-sized photograph affixed.
*   **Valid Photo ID Proof:** Original (and a photocopy) such as Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID, Driving License, Passport.
*   **Passport-sized Photographs:** A few extra photographs matching the one on the admit card.

### Exam Day Guidelines

*   Familiarize yourself with the allotted exam city and plan your commute well in advance to avoid last-minute rush.
*   Reach the examination center as per the reporting time mentioned on your admit card (once released).
*   Adhere strictly to all instructions provided by the invigilators and mentioned on your admit card.
*   Electronic gadgets, mobile phones, smartwatches, and study materials are strictly prohibited inside the examination hall.

Stay updated with the official RSSB website for the release of the final Admit Cards and any further announcements regarding the Forester and Vanpal Recruitment Examination 2026.

Scrutiny of applications, verification of APARs, Vigilance Clearance and approval by Competent Authority.

No application fee is required (Nil).

Notification: June 2026 | Last Date for Receipt of Application: 18 July 2026.

- Fee: ₹100 per objection.
- Payment mode: Online (Debit/Credit Card, Net Banking).
- Objections will be accepted only through the official portal.

### Important Links

- [Official Website](https://hppsconline.hp.gov.in)
- [Answer Key Download Link](https://hppsconline.hp.gov.in) (available on the homepage)

### Note

The final answer key will be published after considering valid objections. Candidates are advised to keep checking the official website for updates.

title: TN Velai Vaippu 2026 - Online Registration and Renewal
department: Department of Employment and Training, Government of Tamil Nadu
overview: TN Velai Vaippu is the official employment registration portal of the Tamil Nadu State Government, designed to connect job seekers with government vacancies. Candidates from 1st standard to postgraduate level can register online to obtain an Employment Card, which is essential for applying to various state government jobs. The portal also facilitates renewal and profile updates, ensuring candidates remain eligible for upcoming opportunities.
eligibility: Candidates must be residents of Tamil Nadu and have completed at least 1st standard. Educational qualifications range from SSLC, HSC, ITI, Diploma, to Degree and Postgraduate. Professional degree and postgraduate holders must register through the Professional Employment and Career Guidance Centre in Madurai or Chennai based on their residential district.
how_to_apply:
1. Visit the official TN Velai Vaippu website at https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/Empower/.
2. Click on 'New User' and fill in the registration form with your name, gender, email, father's name, date of birth, address, Aadhaar number, and mobile number.
3. Create a User ID and password, then verify your mobile and email via OTP.
4. Add your educational qualifications and upload scanned copies of original documents.
5. Log in using your credentials to renew or update your profile as needed.
meta_title: TN Velai Vaippu 2026 - Online Registration and Renewal 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: TN Velai Vaippu is the official employment registration portal of the Tamil Nadu State Government, designed to connect job seekers with government vacancie
content:
## TN Velai Vaippu 2026 - Online Registration and Renewal

### Overview
TN Velai Vaippu (தமிழ்நாடு வேலைவாய்ப்பு) is the official employment registration portal of the Tamil Nadu State Government, managed by the Department of Employment and Training. Launched on 15th September 2013, the portal allows job seekers to register online and obtain an Employment Card, which is mandatory for applying to state government jobs. Candidates from 1st standard to postgraduate level can register, with professional degree holders required to register through regional employment offices.

### Latest Notifications
| Post Name | Total Vacancies | Last Date |
|-----------|----------------|-----------|
| CTS Non Interview Posts | 461 | 25/06/2026 |
| TNPSC Engineering Assistant Trainee (EAT) & Technician ‘C’ | 07 | 08/07/2026 |
| Bharat Electronics Limited (BEL) Scientist, Specialist & Assistant Posts | 04 | 12/07/2026 |
| KVK Tirunelveli Junior Telecom Officer | 06 | 03/07/2026 |
| BSNL Apprentice | 158 | 30/06/2026 |
| NPCIL MAPS Technical Officer, Technician | – | 08/07/2026 |
| CEERI Pilani Probationary Officers (PO) | 1500 | 08/07/2026 |
| State Bank of India Agniveervayu | – | 26/07/2026 |
| Indian Air Force Group Y Airmen Medical Assistant | – | 26/07/2026 |
| Bank of Baroda Manager Level Posts in C&IC Department | 86 | 06/07/2026 |
| Bank of Baroda Professionals in C&IC Department | 65 | 06/07/2026 |

### How to Register
1. Visit the official website: [https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/Empower/](https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/Empower/)
2. Click on 'New User' link.
3. Fill in the registration form with personal details (Name, Gender, Email, Father's Name, Date of Birth, Address, Aadhaar Number, Mobile Number).
4. Create a User ID and Password.
5. Verify your mobile number and email via OTP.
6. Add your educational qualifications and upload scanned copies of original documents.
7. Log in to renew or update your profile.

### How to Login
- Visit the Empower page: [https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/Empower/](https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/Empower/)
- Enter your Login ID and Password.
- For forgotten password, click 'Forget Password' and enter User ID and Date of Birth to reset.

### Contact Information
- Phone: 044-22500900, 044-22500911
- Email: emphelpdesk@tn.gov.in
- Address: Directorate of Employment and Training, Alandur Road, Thiru-vi-ka Industrial Estate, Guindy, Chennai - 600032.

### Important Links
- Official Website: [https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in](https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in)
- Registration Portal: [https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/Empower/](https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/Empower/)
- Login Page: [https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/empower/login](https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/empower/login)
- Seniority List: [https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/Empower/LoginAction.htm?homepageflag=SENIORITY](https://tnvelaivaaippu.gov.in/Empower/LoginAction.htm?homepageflag=SENIORITY)

**Q: What type of Jobs available in Tamilnadu Government?**

**Q: How to Apply Tamilnadu Government Jobs?**
A: Eligible candidates first check your qualification based TN Jobs, then visit the official notification page, read carefully, and finally click Apply Online or download prescribed application form to apply.

**Q: What are the Qualifications for TN Govt Jobs?**
A: Minimum 10th Class / SSLC / Matriculation Pass, 10+2 (12th Class) Pass, Any Degree, Diploma, ITI and Post Graduates are eligible to apply.

**Q: What is Age Limit for TN Govt Jobs?**
A: Minimum 18 years old. Maximum Age - No age limit for OBC, SC, ST, PWD and all reserved category candidates. The Maximum age limit only for General / Un-reserved category persons.

**Q: Is TN Govt Jobs page in IndGovtJobs updated?**
A: Yes. IndGovtJobs blog updates latest Tamil nadu state Government Jobs and Central Govt / Public Sector Company jobs in Tamil Nadu state. Every week, the IndGovtJobs updates TN Govt Jobs page.

**Q: Can other state candidates Apply for Tamil Nadu Govt Jobs?**
A: Yes. But, Other state candidates should have Knowledge in Tamil. The Tamil language as one of the subject in Matriculation / 10th class.

### ✅ Important Dates (General Timeline)

### ✅ How to Apply

1. Visit the official website of the respective state recruitment board or department.
2. Read the detailed notification.
3. Click on the online application link.
4. Fill in personal, educational, and other required details.
5. Upload scanned documents (photo, signature, certificates).
6. Pay the application fee (if applicable).
7. Submit and take a printout for future reference.

### ✅ Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: How to get state government jobs in India?**
A: www.indgovtjobs.in frequently updates latest state government jobs on this page. You can see the state-wise govt jobs list in the above table. Click your state to get full details.

**Q: What are the jobs of state government?**
A: State Government Services (VAO, Tahsildar, etc.), State PSUs (Engineers, Technicians), State Co-operative Banks (Assistants, Officers), State Universities (Faculty, Non-Teaching), Medical Services (Doctors, Nurses), Schools (Teachers), Police (Constable, SI), Forest (Ranger, Officer).

**Q: How to apply for state government jobs through IndGovtJobs?**
A: Most state government jobs are applied online or offline. Check the state-wise list table and click your state for full details.

**Q: What are the eligibility for state govt jobs?**
A: Minimum qualification varies: Matriculation (10th), 12th, Degree, ITI, Diploma, or Professional Qualification (B.E., B.Tech, MBBS, B.L.).

- Karnataka Public Service Commission (KPSC)

### ✅ Top State Government Jobs Categories

- **State Civil Services:** Similar to the Indian Administrative Service (IAS) at the central level, state civil services include positions like State Administrative Service, State Police Service, and State Forest Service.
- **State Police Jobs:** State police departments recruit for various positions such as Sub-Inspectors, Constables, Jailer, Fireman and Deputy Superintendents of Police (DSPs).
- **Teaching Jobs:** State governments hire teachers for primary and secondary education in state-run schools. Positions include Primary Teachers (PRT), School Assistant, Trained Graduate Teachers (TGT), and Post Graduate Teachers (PGT).
- **Healthcare Jobs:** State Health Departments hire medical professionals such as Doctors, Nurses, Pharmacists, Technician, Para Medical Staffs and healthcare staff for state-run hospitals and Medical Institutions.
- **Engineering Jobs:** Various state government departments and public sector undertakings (PSUs) recruit engineers for roles in civil, mechanical, electrical, and other engineering disciplines.
- **Revenue and Taxation:** State revenue departments hire officers for roles related to revenue collection and taxation.
- **Public Sector Undertakings (PSUs):** State-owned PSUs, such as state electricity boards, transport corporations, and housing boards, offer job opportunities in various sectors.
- **Agriculture and Rural Development:** State Agriculture and Rural Development Departments hire professionals to promote agriculture and rural development.
- **State Transport Services:** State transport corporations recruit drivers, conductors, and other staff for public transportation services.
- **State Judiciary:** State Judicial Services conduct exams to recruit Judicial Officers, Court Assistant, Steno, District Judges and Magistrates.
- **State Forest and Wildlife Services:** State Forest Departments hire professionals (Forester, Forest Ranger etc.) for roles related to forest conservation and wildlife protection.
- **State Public Service Commissions (PSCs):** State PSCs conduct exams for a variety of state government positions. Each state has its own PSC responsible for recruitment.
- **State Education Departments:** Besides teaching positions, state education departments also hire administrative and support staff for educational institutions.
- **Social Welfare and Women Empowerment:** Various state departments work on social welfare programs, women's empowerment, and child welfare, offering job opportunities in these areas.

### ✅ Frequently Asked Questions

**How to get state government jobs in India?**
www.indgovtjobs.in frequently updates latest state government jobs in this page. you can see State wise govt jobs list in the above table. Click your state in the above table, after you will get your state wise Govt Jobs.

**What are the jobs of state government?**
- State Government Services: Village Administrative Officers (VAO), various level of Officers, Tashildar, Motor Vehicle Inspectors, Assistants etc.
- State Govt owned Public Sector Companies Jobs: Engineers, Apprentices, Technicians etc.
- State Co-operative Bank Jobs: Assistants, Clerk, Officers, Managers.
- State Government Universities / Institutes: Faculty Posts (Professor, Associate Professor, Assistant Professor), Non Teaching Posts (Clerk, Data Entry Operator, Computer Assistant, Librarian etc.)
- State Govt Medical Services: Medical Officers, Specialists, Nurse, Lab Technicians etc.
- State Govt Primary, Higher Secondary Schools: Teachers, TGT, PGT, Physical Education Teacher etc.
- State Govt Police Department Jobs: Constable, Sub Inspector, Driver, Fireman etc.
- State Govt Forest Jobs: Forest Ranger, Forest Officer, Driver etc.

**How to apply for state government jobs through IndGovtJobs?**
Most of the State Government Jobs are apply through online or offline application mode. www.indgovtjobs.in updates latest State wise Govt Job Notifications in this page. Check out our State wise list table, Click your State to get full details.

**What are the eligibility for state govt jobs?**
Minimum qualification is differ for every post. Here, IndGovtJobs listed most vacancies required educational qualifications:
- Matriculation (10th, Xth Std, SSC, Madhyamik)
- 12th Class (10+2, Higher Secondary, XII standard)
- Degree (B.Com, B.Sc., B.A., BBM, BCA etc.)
- ITI, Diploma
- Professional Qualification (B.E., B.Tech, MBBS, B.L.)

### Frequently Asked Questions
**Q: What type of law jobs are available in the government sector?**
A: Positions include Legal Assistants, Legal Officer, Legal Advisor, Insurance Law Officer, Judicial Services, District Judge, High Court Judge, Junior Consultant (Legal), Young Professional (Legal), and Manager Level Legal Posts.

**Q: What are the qualifications for law jobs?**
A: Advocate Jobs require Bachelor Degree in Law (BL/LLB), Master Degree in Law (M.L.), or integrated courses like BA LLB, BBA LLB after 12th.

**Q: Which sector provides maximum law jobs?**
A: Government Sector provides maximum law jobs through District Courts, High Courts, Public Sector Companies, Ministry of Law and Justice, Government Universities, Public Sector Banks, Railways, and UPSC.

**Q: What does LLB stand for?**
A: LLB stands for Legum Baccalaureus in Latin or Bachelor of Law Degree.

## Indian Railway Recruitment 2026 – 6878 Vacancies

Indian Railways has released a massive recruitment notification for 2026, inviting applications for 6,878 vacancies across various posts. This is a golden opportunity for candidates seeking a stable and prestigious career in the government sector. Below are the details of vacancies, important dates, eligibility, and application process.

### Vacancy Details

|-------|------|
| Start of Online Application | 01/06/2026 |

| Exam Date (Tentative) | To be announced |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Educational Qualification**: Minimum 10th pass/ITI for Group C & D posts; Graduate/Post Graduate for Group A & B posts. Specific qualifications vary by post.
- **Age Limit**: 18 to 30 years (age relaxation as per government norms for SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-Servicemen).

### Salary Structure
Selected candidates will be placed in Pay Level 1 to Level 7 as per the 7th Pay Commission, with a monthly salary ranging from approximately ₹18,000 to ₹1,42,400.

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official Indian Railways recruitment portal (rrb.gov.in) or the respective Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) website.
2. Click on the 'Apply Online' link for the desired post.
3. Register with a valid email ID and mobile number.
4. Fill in the application form with personal, educational, and other details.
5. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required documents.
6. Pay the application fee online (if applicable).
7. Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

### Selection Process
The selection process includes a Computer-Based Test (CBT), Skill Test/Typing Test (if applicable), Document Verification, and Medical Examination.

### Important Links
- **Official Website**: [rrb.gov.in](https://www.rrb.gov.in)
- **Detailed Notification**: Available on the official website.

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)
**Q: What are the jobs in the Railway Sector?**
A: Indian Railway jobs include Gazetted (Group 'A' and 'B'), Non-Gazetted (Group 'C' and 'D'), NTPC, Junior Engineer, RPF, RPSF, Act Apprentices, Level 1, and Level 2 posts.

**Q: How to apply for railway recruitment?**
A: Eligible candidates should check qualification-based railway job listings on the official RRB website and apply online.

**Q: What are the qualifications for railway jobs?**
A: Minimum qualifications include passing the 10th class or ITI for Group C & D posts, and holding a Graduate or Post Graduate degree for Group A & B posts.

**Q: How many railway zones are there in India?**
A: There are 21 Railway Zones in India.

**Q: Which is the best job in the Railway?**
A: The best job depends on individual qualifications and preferences. For 10th or 12th pass candidates, popular posts include Clerk, Station Master, and Ticket Collector, while engineers may prefer Group A Engineering Services.

**Q: Is a career in the railway possible after 12th?**
A: Yes, individuals who have passed the 10th or 12th standard are eligible to apply for Group C and Group D railway posts.

**Q: Who is eligible to apply for railway jobs?**
A: Indian citizens who have passed at least Matriculation/10th standard are eligible to apply. Strong technical skills are also preferred.

---
*Stay updated with the latest railway job alerts on our portal.*

### Important Links
- Official Website: Visit respective organization's website.
- Notification PDF: Refer to the official advertisement.

### FAQs
**Q: What are the Government Jobs available in India?**
A: More than two lakh government vacancies are available in 2026-27. Top jobs include UPSC Civil Services, SSC CGL, Railway NTPC, IBPS Banking, Police, PSU, etc.

**Q: How can I apply for government jobs online?**
A: Visit IndGovtJobs blog, click Govt Jobs column, select your qualification and designation based notification, read the advertisement, and apply online.

**Q: What is the age eligibility for Government Jobs?**
A: Minimum 18 years, maximum 56 years (varies by post). Age relaxation: SC/ST 5 years, OBC 3 years, PwD 10 years.

**Q: What is the minimum Qualification for Government Jobs?**
A: Minimum 8th pass, 10th, 12th, ITI, Diploma, Degree, or Post Graduation depending on the post.

**Q: Which government job is easy to get in India?**
A: Railway, Teaching, and Banking jobs are relatively easier to apply and get.

**Q: Why government jobs are the best in India?**
A: Government jobs offer security, respect, prestige, and benefits like medical, home loan, travel, and retirement benefits.

## RRB Section Controller Recruitment 2026 – 119 Vacancies

The Ministry of Railways, through various Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs), has released an Indicative Notice for recruitment to the post of Section Controller under CEN No. 03/2026. This article provides complete information based on the indicative notice.

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Total Vacancies (Tentative) | Pay Scale |
|-----------|-----------------------------|-----------|
| Section Controller | 119 | Level-6 (₹35,400 + Allowances) |

### Eligibility Criteria
| Post | Age Limit (as on 01.07.2026) | Qualification |
|------|------------------------------|---------------|
| Section Controller | 20 – 33 years (Age relaxations as per Govt Rules) | Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline from recognized university or its equivalent |

### Application Fee
Fee details will be specified in the Detailed CEN No. 03/2026. Standard exemptions for SC/ST/Female/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen candidates are expected as per RRB norms.

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Indicative Notification | 27 June 2026 |
| Opening of Online Registration | 15 July 2026 (Tentative) |
| Closing of Online Registration | 14 August 2026 (23:59 Hrs) (Tentative) |

### Selection Process
The selection process will be notified in the Detailed CEN No. 03/2026. It is expected to include:
- Computer Based Test (CBT)
- Document Verification / Medical Examination

### How to Apply
Eligible candidates must apply online only through the official RRB portal once the detailed notification is released. Steps:
1. Visit https://www.rrbapply.gov.in when the Detailed CEN No. 03/2026 is published.
2. Register using Aadhaar (Name & Date of Birth must exactly match 10th Class certificate).
3. Fill the online application form carefully and upload required documents.
4. Pay the application fee online (if applicable).
5. Submit the application before the closing date and keep the registration number for future reference.

**Note:** This is only an Indicative Notice. The complete details regarding educational qualification, syllabus, exam pattern, reservation, and selection process will be available in the Detailed CEN No. 03/2026.

### Important Links
- [RRB Section Controller Short/Indicative Notification PDF](#)
- [RRB Section Controller Detailed Notification 2025 PDF](#)
- [Official RRB Websites (for Detailed CEN)](https://www.rrbapply.gov.in)

### FAQs
**Q: What is the total number of vacancies?**
A: 119 posts (Tentative) for Section Controller.

**Q: What is the age limit?**
A: 20 – 33 years as on 01.07.2026 with applicable relaxations.

**Q: What is the pay scale?**
A: Level-6 of 7th CPC Pay Matrix – Initial Pay ₹35,400 + Allowances.

**Q: What is the selection process?**
A: Likely includes Computer Based Test and Document Verification.

**Q: What is the application fee?**
A: Fee details will be provided in the Detailed CEN No. 03/2026.

**Q: What are the important dates?**
A: Opening: 15 July 2026 | Closing: 14 August 2026 (Tentative).

title: Indian Navy SSC Officer Recruitment 2026
overview: The Indian Navy has announced the Short Service Commission (SSC) Officer Recruitment 2026 for 275 vacancies in Executive, Education, and Technical branches. This is a prestigious opportunity for unmarried men and women to serve as officers in the Indian Navy.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech or M.Sc. with minimum 60% marks (branch-wise). Age limit varies by branch: generally born between 02 Jul 2002 and 01 Jan 2008. Candidates must be unmarried.

salary: ₹1,10,000 per month (approx.) as Sub Lieutenant + allowances

content:
## Indian Navy SSC Officer Recruitment 2026 – 275 Vacancies

The Indian Navy invites applications from eligible unmarried men and women for Short Service Commission (SSC) in Executive, Education, and Technical Branches. The course commences in June 2027 at Indian Naval Academy (INA), Ezhimala, Kerala.

### Vacancy Details
| Branch | Number of Vacancies |
|--------|-------------------|
| Executive Branch | 172 |
| Education Branch | 90 |
| Technical Branch | 13 |
| **Total** | **275 (Tentative)** |

### Eligibility Criteria
| Branch | Age Limit (Born Between) | Qualification |
|--------|--------------------------|---------------|
| Executive Branch (GS/Hydro/Logistics) | 02 Jul 2002 – 01 Jan 2008 | B.E./B.Tech in any discipline with 60% marks |
| Executive Branch (Pilot/NAOO/ATC) | As per detailed notification | B.E./B.Tech with 60% marks + specific physical standards |
| Education Branch | 02 Jul 2002 – 01 Jan 2008 (or later for PG) | First Class M.Sc./MA or B.E./B.Tech/M.Tech with 60% marks |
| Technical Branch | 02 Jul 2002 – 01 Jan 2008 | B.E./B.Tech in relevant engineering with 60% marks |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates | Nil |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Online Registration Starts | 25 June 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Application | 27 July 2026 |
| Course Commencement | June 2027 |

### Selection Process
1. Shortlisting based on normalized percentage of marks in qualifying degree
2. SSB Interview (Stage-I & Stage-II – Intelligence Test, Psychological Test, Group Tasks & Interview)
3. Medical Examination
4. Final Merit List & Allotment to Branches

### How to Apply
Eligible candidates must apply online through the official Join Indian Navy website. Steps:
1. Visit https://www.joinindiannavy.gov.in and register.
2. Login and fill the application form.
3. Upload required documents.
4. Submit and print confirmation page.

### Important Links
- **Official Website:** [Join Indian Navy](https://www.joinindiannavy.gov.in)
- **Online Application Portal:** [Apply Online](https://www.joinindiannavy.gov.in)

### FAQs
**Q: What is the total number of vacancies?**
A: 275 posts (Executive – 172, Education – 90, Technical – 13) – Tentative.

**Q: What is the age limit?**
A: Varies by branch (generally born between 02 Jul 2002 to 01 Jan 2008).

**Q: What is the pay scale?**
A: Approximately ₹1,10,000 per month as Sub Lieutenant + allowances.

**Q: What is the selection process?**
A: Shortlisting → SSB Interview → Medical Examination → Final Merit List.

**Q: Is there any application fee?**
A: No application fee (Nil) for all candidates.

**Q: What are the important dates?**
A: Online Registration: 25 June 2026 to 27 July 2026 | Course Commencement: June 2027.

A: Eligible candidates can apply online through official bank websites. IndGovtJobs.in provides daily updates.

**Q2: Why choose government bank jobs?**
A: They offer job security, attractive salary, allowances, and career growth.

**Q3: What bank jobs are available after 12th?**
A: Clerk, Office Assistant, Cashier, Peon, Customer Service roles.

**Q4: What are the major upcoming bank exams?**
A: IBPS Clerk, IBPS PO, IBPS RRB, SBI Clerk, SBI PO, RBI Assistant, RBI Grade B.

**Q5: What is the selection process?**
A: Online written exam + interview for officer posts; only written exam for clerical.

meta_description: The Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board (UPPRPB) is set to release the Admit Cards for the Constable recruitment examination, offering a s
content:
## UP Police Constable Admit Card 2026 Released

The Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board (UPPRPB) has announced the release of admit cards for the upcoming Constable recruitment examination for a massive 32,679 vacancies. This is a critical update for all candidates who have applied and are eagerly awaiting their chance to serve in the Uttar Pradesh Police force. The admit card is a mandatory document that provides all necessary details about the examination, including the candidate's roll number, examination center, date, and time.

### Overview of the Recruitment

| Particulars                 | Details                                              |
| :-------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------- |
| **Recruiting Body**         | Uttar Pradesh Police Recruitment and Promotion Board (UPPRPB) |
| **Post Name**               | Constable                                            |
| **Total Vacancies**         | 32,679                                               |
| **Admit Card Status**       | Released                                             |
| **Examination Mode**        | To be announced (likely Offline/Online)              |
| **Selection Process**       | Written Exam, Physical Standard Test (PST), Physical Efficiency Test (PET), Document Verification |
| **Job Location**            | Uttar Pradesh                                        |
| **Official Website**        | [https://uppbpb.gov.in/](https://uppbpb.gov.in/)    |

### Important Dates and Schedules

Candidates should mark these important dates related to the UP Police Constable 2026 recruitment process:

| Event                      | Date (Tentative)                  |
| :------------------------- | :-------------------------------- |
| Application Start Date     | To be announced (2026)            |
| Application End Date       | To be announced (2026)            |
| Admit Card Release Date    | Soon (Expected 2026)              |
| Written Exam Date          | To be announced (Expected 2026)   |
| Result Declaration         | To be announced                   |
| PST/PET Dates              | To be announced                   |

### Exam Day Guidelines and Instructions

Candidates appearing for the UP Police Constable examination must adhere to the following guidelines:

*   **Admit Card:** Carry a printout of your admit card to the examination center. Without it, entry will be denied.
*   **Photo ID:** Bring a valid photo identification proof (e.g., Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Driving License, Passport, Voter ID) in original format along with a photocopy.
*   **Photographs:** Carry two passport-size photographs, preferably the same as uploaded in the application form.
*   **Reporting Time:** Reach the examination center well before the specified reporting time to avoid last-minute rush and complete verification formalities.
*   **Prohibited Items:** Do not carry any electronic gadgets like mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, or any study material into the examination hall.
*   **Rough Work:** Use only the rough sheets provided by the invigilators for any calculations or rough work.
*   **COVID-19 Protocols:** Follow all government-mandated COVID-19 safety protocols, including wearing a mask, maintaining social distancing, and carrying a personal hand sanitizer.

### Verification Documents

Upon successful completion of the written exam, candidates qualifying for the Physical Standard Test (PST) and Document Verification (DV) rounds will need to present the following documents in original along with self-attested photocopies:

*   UP Police Constable Admit Card (final stage)
*   High School (10th) Mark Sheet and Certificate
*   Intermediate (12th) Mark Sheet and Certificate
*   Caste Certificate (if applicable, for SC/ST/OBC candidates)
*   Domicile Certificate of Uttar Pradesh
*   Photo ID Proof (Aadhar Card, PAN Card, etc.)
*   Recent Passport-size Photographs
*   Any other relevant certificates as specified in the official notification.

Candidates are strongly advised to regularly check the official UPPRPB website for the latest announcements and updates regarding the examination process.

Every year, over 20,000 Multi-Tasking Staff vacancies are announced across Central and State Government offices, Public Sector Companies, Railways, Banking, and other Government services.

| Scouts and Guide Quota | 12 | 19 July 2026 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Educational Qualification**: Varies by post. Minimum 10th pass/ITI for Group C & D; Graduate/Post Graduate for Group A & B.
- **Age Limit**: 18-33 years (relaxation as per rules).

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official website of the concerned RRB or organization.
2. Find the recruitment notification and click on 'Apply Online'.
3. Register and fill the application form.
4. Upload documents and pay fee.
5. Submit and print confirmation.

### Frequently Asked Questions
**Q: What are the jobs in the Railway Sector?**
A: Indian Railway jobs include Gazetted (Group A & B), Non-Gazetted (Group C & D), NTPC, Junior Engineer, RPF, RPSF, Act Apprentices, Level 1, and Level 2 posts.

**Q: How to apply for railway recruitment?**
A: Visit the official RRB website, check qualification-based listings, and apply online.

**Q: What are the qualifications for railway jobs?**
A: Minimum 10th pass or ITI for Group C & D; Graduate/Post Graduate for Group A & B.

**Q: How many railway zones are there?**
A: 21 Railway Zones across India.

**Q: Is a career in railway possible after 12th?**
A: Yes, 10th/12th pass candidates can apply for Group C and D posts.

**Q: Who is eligible to apply?**
A: Indian citizens with at least Matriculation/10th pass. Strong technical skills preferred.

meta_description: The Indian Air Force (IAF) is gearing up to release the official notification for the recruitment of Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) and other Group C Civilian p
content:
### Indian Air Force MTS Recruitment 2026: Apply for Group C Civilian Posts

The Indian Air Force (IAF) is set to release the official notification for the recruitment of Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS) and various other Group C Civilian posts for the year 2026. This recruitment drive offers a significant opportunity for eligible Indian citizens to join the esteemed Indian Air Force and contribute to the nation in crucial administrative and support roles. Candidates are strongly advised to regularly check the official IAF website for the detailed advertisement, exact vacancies, and the opening date for online applications.

#### Vacancy Details

While the precise number of vacancies and post-wise distribution will be announced in the official notification, this recruitment drive is typically for a range of Group C Civilian posts. Below is an indicative list:

| Post Name                      | Number of Vacancies (Expected) |
| :----------------------------- | :----------------------------- |
| Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS)      | To be announced                |
| Other Group C Civilian Posts   | To be announced                |
| **Total Vacancies**            | **To be announced**            |

#### Eligibility Criteria

To be eligible for the IAF MTS and other Group C Civilian posts, candidates must fulfill the following criteria. Exact details will be in the official notification.

**1. Educational Qualification:**
*   **For Multi-Tasking Staff (MTS):** Candidates are generally required to have passed Matriculation (10th Class) or equivalent from a recognized Board/University.
*   **For Other Group C Posts:** Educational qualifications will vary per post, ranging from 10th pass to 12th pass, or possessing relevant ITI/Diploma certifications. Refer to the official notification for specific post requirements.

**2. Age Limit (As on the crucial date mentioned in the notification):**
*   **Minimum Age:** 18 years
*   **Maximum Age:** 25 years (for Unreserved/General categories)
*   **Age Relaxation:**
    *   OBC candidates: 3 years
    *   SC/ST candidates: 5 years
    *   Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD): 10 years
    *   Ex-Servicemen and other reserved categories: As per Government of India rules.
    *   *Note: Candidates must refer to the official notification for precise age limits and relaxation policies.*

#### Application Fee

The application fee structure will be detailed in the official notification. Candidates are advised to confirm the exact fee and permissible payment methods before initiating their application.

| Category               | Application Fee (Expected)       |
| :--------------------- | :------------------------------- |
| General/OBC Candidates | ₹100 - ₹250 (Approx.)            |
| SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen | Exempted                         |
| Women Candidates       | Exempted                         |
| **Payment Mode**       | Online (Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking) or Offline (Challan) |

#### Important Dates

The exact timeline for the application process and examination will be published with the release of the official notification.

| Event                           | Date                  |
| :------------------------------ | :-------------------- |
| Official Notification Release   | To be announced       |
| Online Application Start Date   | To be announced       |
| Online Application End Date     | To be announced       |
| Last Date for Fee Payment       | To be announced       |
| Admit Card Release Date         | To be announced       |
| Written Examination Date        | To be announced       |
| Result Declaration Date         | To be announced       |

#### Selection Process

The selection process for IAF Group C Civilian posts typically involves a multi-stage approach:

1.  **Written Examination:** A comprehensive written test covering General Intelligence & Reasoning, Numerical Aptitude, General English, and General Awareness.
2.  **Skill/Practical/Physical Test:** For certain posts, candidates may be required to qualify a skill, practical, or physical efficiency test.
3.  **Document Verification:** Shortlisted candidates will undergo verification of their original educational and other relevant documents.
4.  **Medical Examination:** Final selection is contingent upon clearing a prescribed medical examination.

#### How to Apply for IAF MTS Recruitment 2026

Interested and eligible candidates must apply online through the official Indian Air Force recruitment portal. Follow these general steps:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Navigate to the official Indian Air Force recruitment website (the precise link will be provided in the official notification).
2.  **Locate the Recruitment Link:** Search for the notification titled "Recruitment for Group C Civilian Posts 2026" or "IAF MTS Recruitment 2026" and click on the 'Apply Online' link.
3.  **New Registration:** If you are a first-time applicant, complete the new registration process by providing essential details like name, email, and mobile number to generate login credentials.
4.  **Fill Application Form:** Log in using your registered credentials and meticulously fill out the online application form. Ensure all personal, educational, and communication details are accurate.
5.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, and any other required documents in the specified format and size.
6.  **Pay Application Fee:** Proceed to pay the application fee online, if applicable, using the available payment gateways (Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking).
7.  **Review and Submit:** Thoroughly review all the information entered in the application form before final submission. Make any necessary corrections.
8.  **Print Application:** After successful submission, download and print a copy of your completed application form for future reference and records.

#### Important Links

*   **Official Notification (PDF):** [Link will be activated upon release]
*   **Apply Online:** [Link will be activated upon application commencement]
*   **Official Indian Air Force Website:** [https://indianairforce.nic.in/ or careerindianairforce.cdac.in]

content:
## Rajasthan CET 12th Level Notification 2026: Key Details

The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSMSSB) has announced the Common Eligibility Test (CET) for 12th Level candidates for the year 2026. This examination is a mandatory prerequisite for various Group C and Group D government posts across Rajasthan. Candidates are advised to thoroughly review the official notification upon its release to understand the complete application process, eligibility criteria, and examination structure.

### Important Dates & Schedules

Candidates should regularly check the official RSMSSB website for the most up-to-date information regarding the application process and examination.

| Event                                 | Date                    |
| :------------------------------------ | :---------------------- |
| Application Start Date                | To be announced         |
| Last Date to Apply Online             | To be announced         |
| Last Date for Fee Payment             | To be announced         |
| Admit Card Release Date               | To be announced         |
| Rajasthan CET 12th Level Exam Date    | To be announced         |
| Result Declaration                    | To be announced         |

### Application Fee

The application fee is a crucial part of the online application process. Candidates must pay the prescribed fee as per their category to successfully submit their application. Details will be updated once the full notification is released.

| Category                          | Application Fee (Tentative) |
| :-------------------------------- | :-------------------------- |
| General/OBC (Creamy Layer)        | As per Official Notification |
| OBC/EWS (Non-Creamy Layer)        | As per Official Notification |
| SC/ST/PwBD                        | As per Official Notification |
| Payment Mode                      | Online (Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI) |

### Eligibility Criteria & Post Qualifications

To be eligible for the Rajasthan CET 12th Level 2026, candidates must meet the following criteria:

*   **Educational Qualification:** Applicants must have successfully passed the 12th standard (Intermediate) examination from a board recognized by the Government of Rajasthan or the Central Government.
*   **Age Limit:** The age criteria will be specified in the detailed official notification. Generally, candidates are expected to be within a certain age bracket (e.g., 18 to 40 years) with relaxations applicable for reserved categories as per Rajasthan Government rules. Exact age limits and relaxation details will be provided in the full notification.

### Vacancy Details

The Rajasthan CET is an eligibility test. The specific number of vacancies for various Group C and Group D posts will be released by the respective departments of the Rajasthan Government, subsequent to the CET results. Passing the CET makes candidates eligible to apply for these departmental recruitments.

### How to Apply for Rajasthan CET 12th Level 2026

Follow these systematic steps to ensure a smooth online application process once the official portal is active:

1.  **Visit the Official RSMSSB Website:** Go to the official website of the Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSMSSB).
2.  **Locate the Recruitment Section:** Find the 'Recruitment' or 'Latest Notifications' section on the homepage and click on the link for 'Rajasthan CET 12th Level Notification 2026'.
3.  **Read the Official Notification:** Before proceeding, download and carefully read the entire official notification PDF to understand all instructions, eligibility conditions, and required documents.
4.  **New Registration:** If you are a first-time applicant, click on the 'Apply Online' link and complete the one-time registration process by providing your basic personal and contact details.
5.  **Fill the Application Form:** Log in with your registration credentials. Accurately fill in all sections of the online application form, including personal information, educational qualifications, and other relevant details.
6.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your passport-sized photograph, signature, and any other required documents in the specified format and size.
7.  **Pay Application Fee:** Proceed to pay the application fee as per your category using the available online payment gateways (Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI).
8.  **Review and Submit:** Thoroughly review all the information entered in the application form to ensure accuracy and correctness. Once satisfied, click on the 'Submit' button.
9.  **Print Application:** After successful submission, download and print a copy of your filled application form and the e-receipt of the fee payment for your records.

3. Click the “Apply Online” button on the official website.
4. Register / Login and fill the application form.
5. Upload required documents and pay the application fee (if any).
6. Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

### Why Government Jobs?

- High job security till retirement
- Competitive salary + DA + HRA
- Medical facilities, pension, gratuity
- Respect and prestige in society
- Good work-life balance

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

**What are the Government Jobs available in India?**
More than two lakh government job vacancies are available in 2026-27. Top exams include UPSC Civil Services, SSC CGL, Railway NTPC, IBPS Banking, Police Constable, and PSU recruitments.

**How can I apply for government jobs online?**
Visit IndGovtJobs blog, click on the desired job notification, read the details, and click the 'Apply Online' link to register and submit your application before the deadline.

**What is the age eligibility for Government Jobs?**
Minimum 18 years for most fresher jobs; maximum 56 years for deputation. Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, and 10 years for PwD.

**What is the minimum Qualification for Government Jobs?**
Minimum 8th pass; common qualifications include 10th, 12th, ITI, Diploma, Bachelor's degree, and Postgraduate degrees.

**Which government job is easy to get?**
Railway, Teaching, and Banking jobs are relatively easier to apply and get selected, especially at lower levels (Group C, D) where selection is based on written exams.

*Stay tuned to IndGovtJobs for daily updates on sarkari naukri alerts!*

content:
# Forest Government Jobs 2026: Central & State Departments Recruitment

## Overview

This comprehensive job alert brings together the latest recruitment notifications for various Forest and allied Government jobs across India for the year 2026. Opportunities are available in Central and State Government Forestry Departments, dedicated to the control and management of forests and wildlife. Aspiring candidates can find roles such as Forest Guard, Forester, Forest Driver, and even top-tier positions like Indian Forest Service (IFS) officers, among others. This alert also includes related government job opportunities from Defence and other sectors.

## Latest Vacancy Details & Important Dates

Below is a consolidated list of some of the active recruitment drives mentioned, along with their respective last dates for application. Candidates are advised to refer to official notifications for complete details.

| Post Name / Department | Total Vacancies | Last Date to Apply |
| :--------------------- | :-------------- | :----------------- |
| UPSSSC Forest Guard | 708 | 2026-07-20 |
| FRI Dehradun (Various Posts) | 161 | 2026-06-03 |
| 39 Gorkha Rifles (Forest Guard & Forester) | 271 | 2026-05-23 |
| Tripura Forest Department | Not Specified | 2026-05-31 |
| Andaman and Nicobar Police (Group B and Group C Posts) | 495 | 2026-05-17 |
| Cordite Factory Aruvankadu (Project Assistants) | 12 | 2026-05-15 |
| Ordnance Factory Dehu Road (Graduate / Diploma Project Engineer) | 13 | 2026-05-22 |
| CRPF (Constable - Technical & Tradesmen and Pioneer) | 9195 | 2026-05-19 |
| Border Roads Organisation (BRO) (Group ‘C’ Posts) | 899 | 2026-05-31 |

## Eligibility Criteria

### Educational Qualification
The minimum educational qualifications for various forest and allied government jobs typically range from a 10th Pass or 12th Pass certificate for roles like Forest Guard and Driver, to a Bachelor's degree in relevant disciplines (e.g., Science, Engineering, Forestry) for Forester, Project Engineer, and Group B/C positions. Specific requirements will be detailed in the respective official recruitment notifications.

### Age Limit
Candidates usually need to be within an age bracket of 18 to 30 years, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories (SC/ST/OBC/PWD) as per government rules. The exact age limits vary significantly for each post and recruiting department, so applicants must check the official advertisements for precise details.

### Physical Standards
For many Forest Guard and Defence roles, candidates may need to meet specific physical standards, including height, chest measurements, and a physical efficiency test (e.g., walking, running). Details will be provided in individual job notifications.

## Application Fee

The application fee for these government jobs is not uniform and varies depending on the specific recruitment notification and category of the applicant. Generally, fees can range from ₹100 to ₹500 for unreserved categories, with concessions or exemptions often provided for SC/ST/PWD candidates and women. 

| Category | Tentative Application Fee |
| :------- | :---------------------- |
| General/OBC | ₹100 - ₹500 |
| SC/ST/PWD | Exempted / Concessional |
| Women | Exempted / Concessional |

*Please refer to the official notification for each specific job for accurate fee details and payment methods.*

## Exam Schedules & Timelines

The examination dates for these various posts will be announced separately by the respective recruiting bodies after the application process concludes. Candidates are advised to regularly visit the official websites of the departments for updates on written exams, physical efficiency tests (PET), and interviews.

| Event | Tentative Dates |
| :---- | :-------------- |
| Application Start Date | Varies by post |
| Application Last Date | Refer to "Latest Vacancy Details" table above |
| Admit Card Release | To be announced |
| Written Examination | To be announced |
| Interview (if applicable) | To be announced |
| Result Declaration | To be announced |

## How to Apply for Forest & Allied Government Jobs 2026

Given that this alert covers multiple recruitment drives, the application process will vary for each specific post. However, a general step-by-step guide is provided below to help you navigate the application procedure:

1.  **Identify Desired Post:** Review the list of vacancies and choose the specific post(s) you are eligible and interested in.
2.  **Access Official Notification:** Visit the official website of the concerned department (e.g., UPSSSC, FRI, Tripura Forest Dept, CRPF) to download and thoroughly read the detailed official recruitment notification.
3.  **Check Eligibility:** Ensure you meet all the specified eligibility criteria, including educational qualifications, age limits, and physical standards (if applicable).
4.  **Register Online (if required):** For most online applications, you will first need to register on the recruitment portal using a valid email ID and mobile number.
5.  **Fill Application Form:** Complete the online application form with all necessary personal, educational, and other relevant details.
6.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, caste certificate (if applicable), and any other required documents in the prescribed format and size.
7.  **Pay Application Fee:** Pay the application fee through the available online modes (Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI) as per your category. Retain the e-receipt for future reference.
8.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the entered information before final submission. Make any necessary corrections.
9.  **Print Application Form:** After successful submission, take a printout of the completed application form for your records.

*Always refer to the official notification for precise instructions, links, and deadlines for each individual job opening.*

content:
## Indian Railway Recruitment 2026: A Comprehensive Overview

Indian Railways, a cornerstone of the nation's infrastructure and economy, is gearing up for a major recruitment drive in 2026, offering a plethora of opportunities for job seekers across the country. With a staggering **6997 vacancies** announced, this is an excellent chance for both freshers and experienced professionals to secure a stable and rewarding career in the central government sector. This overview consolidates information on various ongoing and upcoming railway job notifications, examinations, eligibility criteria, and application procedures.

### Latest Railway Jobs 2026 - Notification List

Here is a snapshot of the current and upcoming recruitment notifications within the Indian Railways sector:

| Post Name                      | Total Vacancies | Application Last Date | Recruitment Board/Reference |
| :----------------------------- | :-------------- | :-------------------- | :-------------------------- |
| Section Controller             | 119             | 14 August 2026        | Railway Recruitment Boards  |
| Technician                     | 6565            | 29 July 2026          | RRB Technician 2026         |
| Junior Engineers               | 175             | 14 July 2026          | NHSRCL                      |
| Deputy Engineer and Other Posts| 34              | 14 July 2026          | NHSRCL                      |
| Hospitality Monitor            | 92              | 24 June 2026          | IRCTC North Zone            |
| Scouts and Guide Quota         | 12              | 19 July 2026          | Northeast Frontier Railway  |
| Engineer Posts                 | --              | 30 June 2026          | BMRC                        |

### Upcoming Railway Exams 2026 List

Beyond the direct recruitment, Indian Railways also conducts various competitive examinations for different posts. Candidates should keep an eye on these significant upcoming exams:

*   **RRB NTPC (Non-Technical Popular Categories):** For various non-technical graduate and undergraduate posts.
*   **RRB JE (Junior Engineer):** For the recruitment of junior engineers in various technical departments.
*   **RRB Group D:** For various posts in the Group D category, including track maintainers, helpers, and assistants.
*   **RRB SSE (Senior Section Engineer):** For the recruitment of senior engineers in specialized fields.
*   **RRB ALP (Assistant Loco Pilot):** For the recruitment of assistant loco pilots.
*   **RRB Paramedical:** For various paramedical posts in Indian Railways hospitals and health units.
*   **RPF Constable:** For recruitment in the Railway Protection Force (RPF) as constables.
*   **RPF Sub-Inspector:** For higher-level positions in the Railway Protection Force (RPF) and Railway Protection Special Force (RPSF).
*   **RRB Ministerial and Isolated Categories:** For various ministerial posts and isolated categories requiring specific skills.

### Eligibility Criteria

**1. Educational Qualification:**
*   **Group C & D Posts:** Minimum 10th Class (Matriculation) pass or ITI qualification.
*   **Group A & B Posts:** Graduate or Post Graduate degree from a recognized university.
*   Specific posts may require additional technical diplomas or degrees.

**2. Nationality:**
*   Applicants must be Indian Citizens.

**3. Technical Skills (Preferred):**
*   Strong technical skills are often preferred, especially for engineering and technical roles.

### Age Limit

Age limits for railway jobs vary significantly based on the specific post, recruitment board, and category. While general guidelines exist, candidates are **strongly advised to consult the individual official notifications** for the exact minimum and maximum age requirements. Age relaxations are applicable for candidates belonging to reserved categories (SC/ST, OBC, PwD, Ex-Servicemen) as per Government of India rules.

### Application Fee

Details regarding the application fees for various posts are specific to each individual recruitment notification and are **not provided in this consolidated overview**. Candidates must refer to the respective official notifications released by the Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs) or other railway entities for precise fee structures, payment methods, and any exemptions.

### Railway Jobs Against Quota

Indian Railways ensures equitable opportunities by implementing various quotas in its recruitment process:

*   **General Recruitment:** Open to all eligible candidates based on merit, typically involving examinations conducted by RRBs.
*   **Scheduled Castes (SC) and Scheduled Tribes (ST) Quota:** Reserved seats for SC/ST candidates, offering benefits such as age relaxation and lower cut-off marks.
*   **Other Backward Classes (OBC) Quota:** Reserved positions for OBC candidates, with similar benefits as SC/ST (excluding Creamy Layer).
*   **Ex-Servicemen Quota:** Positions reserved for individuals who have served in the armed forces, including age relaxations.
*   **Sports Quota:** Recruitment based on outstanding achievements in sports, requiring candidates to meet specific criteria at national or international levels.
*   **Persons with Disabilities (PwD) Quota (Divyang Quota):** Reservations for candidates with physical disabilities, along with additional advantages and specific provisions for different types of disabilities.
*   **Nursing Quota:** Reserved for candidates with nursing qualifications, especially in paramedical roles.
*   **Culture Quota:** For individuals with notable contributions in cultural fields, allowing them to apply for specific positions.

### List of Railway Job Vacancies (Group-wise)

Indian Railway jobs are broadly categorized into groups based on their responsibilities and entry qualifications:

*   **Group 'A' Posts:** These gazetted posts are primarily filled through competitive examinations conducted by the Union Public Service Commission (UPSC), including the Civil Services Exam, Engineering Services Exam, and Combined Medical Services Examination.
*   **Group 'B' Posts:** These are gazetted posts that are generally not open for direct recruitment. Group 'B' positions are typically filled by upgrading Group 'C' railway employees on a deputation basis.
*   **Group 'C' Posts:** This is a vast category encompassing both technical and non-technical positions. Examples include Clerk, Station Master, Ticket Collector, Commercial Apprentice, Traffic Apprentice, and various engineering roles (Civil, Mechanical, Electrical, Signal & Telecommunication).
*   **Group 'D' Posts:** Positions in this group cover various essential support disciplines, such as Trackman, Helper, Assistant Points Man, Safaiwala/Safaiwali, Gunman, and Peon.
*   **Other Posts:** This category includes specialized recruitments like ITI Apprentices, Sports Quota, Cultural Quota, and Scouts and Guides Quota, among others.

### Important Dates / Exam Schedule

Given the diverse nature of recruitment drives, specific dates vary by post. Here are some key application end dates mentioned:

| Event                       | Date/Period          |
| :-------------------------- | :------------------- |
| Section Controller (Start)  | 15 July 2026         |
| Section Controller (End)    | 14 August 2026       |
| Technician (End)            | 29 July 2026         |
| Junior Engineers (End)      | 14 July 2026         |
| NHSRCL Dy. Engineer (End)   | 14 July 2026         |
| Hospitality Monitor (End)   | 24 June 2026         |
| Scouts & Guide Quota (End)  | 19 July 2026         |
| BMRC Engineer Posts (End)   | 30 June 2026         |

For upcoming examinations like RRB NTPC, JE, Group D, etc., the exact notification release and exam dates will be announced by the respective Railway Recruitment Boards (RRBs) in due course. Candidates are advised to regularly check official RRB websites for updates.

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

**Q1: What are the jobs in the Railway Sector?**
A1: Indian Railway jobs include Gazetted (Group 'A' and 'B'), Non-Gazetted (Group 'C' and 'D'), NTPC, Junior Engineer, RPF, RPSF, Act Apprentices, Level 1, and Level 2 posts.

**Q2: What are the qualifications for railway jobs?**
A2: Minimum qualifications include passing the 10th class or ITI for Group C & D posts, and holding a Graduate or Post Graduate degree for Group A & B posts.

**Q3: How many railway zones are there in India?**
A3: There are 21 Railway Zones in India: Ahmedabad, Ajmer, Allahabad, Bangalore, Bhopal, Bhubaneshwar, Bilaspur, Chandigarh, Chennai, Gorakhpur, Guwahati, Jammu, Kolkata, Malda, Mumbai, Muzaffarpur, Patna, Ranchi, Secunderabad, Siliguri, and Trivandrum.

**Q4: How many types of railway jobs are there?**
A4: Group 'A' Posts (appointed through UPSC exams), Group 'B' Posts (upgraded from Group 'C' employees), Group 'C' Posts (technical and non-technical cadre posts), Group 'D' Posts (various discipline posts including Trackman, Helper, etc.), and Other Posts (ITI Apprentices, Sports Quota, etc.).

**Q5: Which is the best job in the Railway?**
A5: The 'best' job depends on individual qualifications and preferences. For 10th or 12th pass candidates, popular posts include Clerk, Station Master, and Ticket Collector, while engineers may prefer Group A Engineering Services.

**Q6: How many jobs are there in the Indian Railways?**
A6: Each year, more than one lakh vacancies open up in the Railway sector, with the current overview listing 6997 vacancies for 2026.

**Q7: Is a career in the railway possible after 12th?**
A7: Yes, individuals who have passed the 10th or 12th standard are eligible to apply for various Group C and Group D railway posts.

**Q8: Who is eligible to apply for railway jobs?**
A8: Indian citizens who have passed at least Matriculation/10th standard are generally eligible to apply. Strong technical skills are also preferred for specific roles.

content:
## Rajasthan RSSB Forester Admit Card 2026 Released

The Rajasthan Staff Selection Board (RSSB) has activated the download link for the Forester Examination 2026 admit cards. This marks a significant development for all applicants, as the admit card is a mandatory document required for entry into the examination hall. Candidates are urged to download their hall tickets without delay to avoid any last-minute issues.

### Important Dates

| Event                      | Date/Status     |
| :------------------------- | :-------------- |
| Admit Card Release Date    | Active          |
| Forester Exam Date (2026)  | To be Announced |

### Steps to Download Rajasthan RSSB Forester Admit Card 2026

Follow these simple steps to successfully download your Forester Hall Ticket:

1.  **Visit the Official Portal:** Open your web browser and go to the Rajasthan Staff Selection Board's recruitment website: `recruitment.rajasthan.gov.in`.
2.  **Locate Admit Card Section:** On the homepage, find and click on the 'Admit Card' or 'Download Hall Ticket' section.
3.  **Select Examination:** Look for the link related to 'Forester Admit Card 2026' and click on it.
4.  **Enter Login Credentials:** You will be prompted to enter your Application/Registration Number and Date of Birth (or Password) as per your application details.
5.  **Access Admit Card:** After providing the correct details, your Forester Admit Card 2026 will be displayed on the screen.
6.  **Verify and Print:** Carefully check all the information on the admit card. Download the PDF file and take at least two clear printouts for examination day and future reference.

### Essential Exam Day Guidelines

Candidates appearing for the Forester Examination 2026 must adhere to the following strict guidelines:

*   **Admit Card is Mandatory:** No candidate will be allowed to enter the examination hall without a valid printed admit card.
*   **Valid Photo ID:** Carry an original, valid photo identification proof (e.g., Aadhaar Card, Voter ID, PAN Card, Driving License, Passport) along with a photocopy.
*   **Reporting Time:** Report to the examination center well in advance of the scheduled reporting time to complete biometric verification and other formalities.
*   **Prohibited Items:** Mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, electronic gadgets, any form of study material, and other unauthorized items are strictly prohibited inside the examination premises.
*   **Conduct:** Maintain decorum and follow all instructions given by the invigilators during the examination.

### Documents Required for Verification

On the day of the examination, ensure you have the following documents ready for verification:

*   **Rajasthan RSSB Forester Admit Card 2026:** A clear and legible printout.
*   **Original Photo Identity Proof:** Any one of the following government-issued photo IDs:
    *   Aadhaar Card
    *   PAN Card
    *   Voter ID Card
    *   Driving License
    *   Passport

### Important Links

*   **Official Website:** [https://recruitment.rajasthan.gov.in](https://recruitment.rajasthan.gov.in)
*   **Admit Card Download Link:** [https://recruitment.rajasthan.gov.in](https://recruitment.rajasthan.gov.in)

meta_description: Pawan Hans Limited, a premier Government of India Enterprise, has announced a recruitment drive for 22 skilled professionals. This presents a golden opport
content:
Pawan Hans Limited (A Govt. of India Enterprise) invites applications from dynamic and eligible Indian citizens for various Technician, Assistant, and other posts. This recruitment drive aims to fill 22 vacancies on both Regular and Contract basis. Candidates with relevant qualifications and experience are encouraged to apply.

### Vacancy Details

The distribution of 22 vacancies across different posts is as follows:

| Post Name                  | Type      | Number of Posts |
| :------------------------- | :-------- | :-------------- |
| Assistant (HR&A)           | Regular   | 1               |
| Junior Engineer (Civil)    | Contract  | 1               |
| Quality Assistant          | Contract  | 2               |
| Assistant (CAMO)           | Contract  | 2               |
| Assistant (HR&A)           | Contract  | 1               |
| Station-in-Charge          | Contract  | 2               |
| Trainee Technician         | Contract  | 13              |
| **Total Vacancies**        |           | **22**          |

### Post-wise Qualifications and Experience

Detailed eligibility criteria for each post are provided below:

*   **Assistant (HR&A) – Regular (1 Post):**
    *   **Qualification:** Graduate with 3 years of experience OR MBA/PG Diploma in HR with 1 year of experience.
*   **Junior Engineer (Civil) – Contract (1 Post):**
    *   **Qualification:** Diploma in Civil Engineering with 5 years of relevant experience.
*   **Quality Assistant – Contract (2 Posts):**
    *   **Qualification:** Diploma in AME/Aeronautical/B.Sc Aviation with 3 years of aviation experience in Quality (CAR-145).
*   **Assistant (CAMO) – Contract (2 Posts):**
    *   **Qualification:** Diploma in AME/Aeronautical/B.Sc Aviation with 3 years of experience in CAMO.
*   **Assistant (HR&A) – Contract (1 Post):**
    *   **Qualification:** Graduate with 3 years of experience OR Graduate with Diploma in IR&PM with 1 year of experience.
*   **Station-in-Charge – Contract (2 Posts):**
    *   **Qualification:** Graduate with 3 years of experience OR PG/Diploma in Marketing/Finance/Aviation with 1 year of experience.
*   **Trainee Technician – Contract (13 Posts):**
    *   **Qualification:** Diploma in Mechanical/Aeronautical/Electronics/Electrical or AME Course (B1.3/B2) from a DGCA recognized Institute. Freshers can apply. Preference for B2 Category & DGCA Modules passed.

### Age Limit

The age limit for candidates is generally between 25 and 28 years as on July 10, 2026. Age relaxation for reserved categories (SC/ST/OBC/PwD/Ex-servicemen) will be applicable as per Government of India rules.

### Pay Scale / Emoluments

The remuneration details for the recruited posts are as follows:

*   **Trainee Technician:** ₹16,500 (All Inclusive)
*   **Other Posts:** ₹24,000 – 1,07,000 / ₹27,000 – 1,13,000 (IDA) + Dearness Allowance (DA), House Rent Allowance (HRA) & Perquisites as per company rules.

### Selection Process

The selection of candidates for the Pawan Hans Limited Recruitment 2026 will involve the following stages:

1.  **Written Test:** Candidates will undergo a written examination to assess their aptitude and technical knowledge relevant to the applied post.
2.  **Document Verification:** Shortlisted candidates from the written test will be called for document verification to confirm their eligibility, qualifications, and other details.

### Application Fee

Candidates are required to pay an application fee, details of which are provided below:

| Category                 | Application Fee (Inclusive of 18% GST) |
| :----------------------- | :------------------------------------- |
| General / OBC / EWS      | ₹354/-                                 |
| SC / ST / PwD Candidates | Exempted                               |

The fee can be paid through a Demand Draft or Online mode, as per the instructions in the official notification.

### Important Dates

Key dates related to the Pawan Hans Limited Recruitment 2026 are as follows:

| Event                          | Date           |
| :----------------------------- | :------------- |
| Date of Notification           | 24 June 2026   |
| Last Date for Receipt of Application | 10 July 2026   |
