meta_description: BEML Limited, a premier Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India, has announced a significant recruitment drive for exp
content:
### BEML Executive Recruitment 2026 - Detailed Information

BEML Limited invites highly experienced and qualified professionals for its latest Executive Recruitment drive in Finance and Company Secretary disciplines. This is a golden opportunity for seasoned individuals to join a premier Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India. Candidates are advised to review all details thoroughly before applying online.

#### **I. Vacancy Details**

| Post Name                                 | Group    | Vacancies |
| :---------------------------------------- | :------- | :-------- |
| Chief General Manager (Finance)           | Gr. IX   | 1         |
| General Manager (Finance)                 | Gr. VIII | 1         |
| Deputy General Manager (Company Secretary)| Gr. VII  | 1         |
| **Total Vacancies**                       |          | **03**    |

#### **II. Post-wise Eligibility Criteria**

Candidates must meet the specific qualification and experience requirements for each post as detailed below:

**1. Chief General Manager (Gr. IX) – Finance**
*   **Qualification:** CA / CMA / 2 years Full-Time First-Class MBA in Finance.
*   **Experience:** Minimum 21 years Post Qualification Experience (PQE) with at least 5 years at a senior management level in the last 10 years, preferably in the manufacturing sector.
*   **Age Limit:** Maximum 51 years.

**2. General Manager (Gr. VIII) – Finance**
*   **Qualification:** CA / CMA / 2 years Full-Time First-Class MBA in Finance.
*   **Experience:** Minimum 19 years Post Qualification Experience (PQE) with at least 5 years at a mid-management level in the last 10 years.
*   **Age Limit:** Maximum 48 years.

**3. Deputy General Manager (Gr. VII) – Company Secretary**
*   **Qualification:** Qualified Company Secretary (Membership of ICSI). A Graduate in Law or MBA will be considered an added advantage.
*   **Experience:** Minimum 16 years Post Qualification Experience (PQE), preferably from large listed corporates with expertise in statutory compliance and Stock Exchange filings.
*   **Age Limit:** Maximum 45 years.

*Note: Age relaxations will be applicable as per Government of India guidelines.*

#### **III. Pay Scale**

The selected candidates will be offered an attractive pay scale as per the company's structure:

| Post Name                                 | Pay Scale (IDA Pattern)           |
| :---------------------------------------- | :-------------------------------- |
| Chief General Manager (Gr. IX) – Finance  | ₹1,20,000 – 2,80,000              |
| General Manager (Gr. VIII) – Finance      | ₹1,00,000 – 2,60,000              |
| Deputy General Manager (Gr. VII) – Company Secretary | ₹90,000 – 2,40,000 |

#### **IV. Application Fee**

| Category       | Application Fee |
| :------------- | :-------------- |
| All Candidates | Nil             |

*No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates can apply online free of cost.*

#### **V. Selection Process**

The selection process for BEML Executive posts will involve the following stages:
1.  **Shortlisting:** Candidates will be shortlisted based on their eligibility criteria and experience.
2.  **Video Conference (VC) Interview:** Shortlisted candidates will undergo a Video Conference Interview.
3.  **Pre-employment Medical Examination & Document Verification:** Final selected candidates will be subject to medical examination and verification of original documents.

#### **VI. Important Dates**

Candidates should note the following key dates for the recruitment process:

| Event                               | Date                               |
| :---------------------------------- | :--------------------------------- |
| Date of Notification                | 19 June 2026                       |
| Last Date for Online Application    | 26 June 2026 (up to 6:00 PM)       |
| Date of Video Conference Interview  | 29 June 2026                       |

#### **VII. How to Apply for BEML Executive Recruitment 2026**

Eligible and interested candidates are required to apply online only through the BEML career portal. Follow the steps below to complete your application:

1.  **Visit Career Page:** Go to the official BEML career page (www.bemlindia.in) and locate the "Apply Online" link for advertisement number KP/S/11/2026.
2.  **Register/Login:** If you are a new user, register yourself; otherwise, log in using your credentials.
3.  **Fill Application Form:** Complete the online application form with all necessary personal, educational, experience, and other required details accurately.
4.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, and all mandatory documents such as ID proof, age proof, qualification certificates, experience certificates, caste certificate (if applicable), etc.
5.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the entered details before final submission to ensure accuracy.
6.  **Print Application:** After successful submission, take a printout of the submitted application form for your future reference.

*Shortlisted candidates will receive the Video Conference interview link via email.*

content:
## NIT Mizoram Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026: Apply Now

National Institute of Technology (NIT) Mizoram invites applications from eligible and highly motivated candidates for Temporary Faculty positions in various engineering departments. This recruitment drive aims to fill 04 vacancies with dynamic professionals committed to quality teaching and research.

### Vacancy Details

| Post Name         | Department                                  | Total Vacancies |
| :---------------- | :------------------------------------------ | :-------------- |
| Temporary Faculty | Electronics & Communication Engineering (ECE) | 01              |
| Temporary Faculty | Electrical Engineering (EE)                 | 01              |
| Temporary Faculty | Computer Science & Engineering (CSE)        | 01              |
| Temporary Faculty | Civil Engineering (CE)                      | 01              |
| **Total**         |                                             | **04**          |

### Eligibility Criteria

**Essential Qualification (Common for all Departments):**
*   Ph.D. in the relevant or equivalent discipline.
*   First Class in B.E./B.Tech and M.E./M.Tech.
*   Consistently good academic record with commitment to quality teaching and research potential.

**Department-wise Specialization (Desirable):**
*   **ECE:** Communication Engineering
*   **EE:** Control and Instrumentation
*   **CSE:** Any specialization in Computer Science & Engineering
*   **CE:** Any specialization in Civil Engineering

**Period of Engagement:** Initially for one semester, extendable by one more semester up to a maximum of 5 semesters.

### Age Limit

Candidates' age will be considered as per NIT Mizoram norms. Specific age limits are not explicitly mentioned in the notification.

### Remuneration

Selected candidates for Temporary Faculty positions will receive a consolidated remuneration of **₹70,000/- per month (Fixed)**.

### Application Fee

Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application fee as detailed below. Fee must be paid through Online Payment only to the bank account specified in the official notification.

| Category               | Application Fee |
| :--------------------- | :-------------- |
| General / OBC / EWS    | ₹500            |
| SC / ST                | ₹200            |
| Women Candidates       | Fully Exempted  |
| Persons with Disabilities (PwD) | Fully Exempted  |

### Selection Process

The selection process for NIT Mizoram Temporary Faculty Recruitment 2026 will involve the following stages:
1.  **Shortlisting:** Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications and experience as per the eligibility criteria.
2.  **Interview:** Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview, which will be conducted in a Hybrid Mode at NIT Mizoram.
3.  **Final Selection:** Final selection will be based on the candidate's performance in the interview.

### Important Dates

Candidates should note the following key dates for the recruitment process:

| Event                           | Date             |
| :------------------------------ | :--------------- |
| Date of Notification            | 19 June 2026     |
| Last Date for Receipt of Application | 10 July 2026     |

### How to Apply

Eligible and interested candidates must apply through the prescribed application form only by following these steps:

1.  **Download Form:** Download the Official Notification PDF and the Prescribed Application Form (Annexure-II) from the official website of NIT Mizoram (www.nitmz.ac.in).
2.  **Fill Application:** Carefully and completely fill out the application form with all the required details.
3.  **Pay Fee:** Pay the application fee online (if applicable) and clearly mention the transaction details in the designated section of the application form.
4.  **Attach Documents:** Attach self-attested copies of all necessary documents, including academic mark sheets, degree certificates (B.E./B.Tech, M.E./M.Tech, Ph.D.), experience certificates, caste certificates (if applicable), and any other relevant testimonials.
5.  **Email Submission:** Send the complete application form along with all supporting documents as a single PDF attachment via email to **recruitmentfaculty@nitmz.ac.in** on or before **10 July 2026**.
    *   **Note:** The subject of the email should clearly mention the Department applied for (e.g., "Application for Temporary Faculty in ECE Department"). Applications received after the last date will not be considered.

### Important Links

*   **Official Website of NIT Mizoram:** [https://www.nitmz.ac.in/](https://www.nitmz.ac.in/)

content:
## NIA Pune Faculty Recruitment 2026: Apply for 03 Assistant Professor & Professor of Practice Posts

The National Insurance Academy (NIA) Pune has announced a recruitment drive for 03 Faculty positions, inviting applications from eligible candidates for Assistant Professor (IT) (Regular) and Professor of Practice (IT, Marketing & Sales) (On Contract) roles. This is a golden opportunity for academic and industry professionals looking to contribute to a premier institution in the insurance sector. Candidates are advised to read the complete notification carefully before applying.

### Vacancy Details

| Post Name                                    | Vacancies | Nature of Post |
| :------------------------------------------- | :-------- | :------------- |
| Assistant Professor (Information Technology) | 01        | Regular        |
| Professor of Practice (Information Technology) | 01        | On Contract    |
| Professor of Practice (Marketing & Sales)    | 01        | On Contract    |
| **Total**                                    | **03**    |                |

### Eligibility Criteria & Post Qualifications

Candidates must ensure they meet the specific eligibility requirements for each post as detailed below:

**1. Assistant Professor (Information Technology)**
*   **Education**: Ph.D. in a relevant academic area is mandatory. First class or equivalent at the preceding degree with a very good academic record throughout.
*   **Experience**: Fresh Ph.D. with exceptional records may be considered, OR minimum 2 years of post-Ph.D. Teaching/Industry experience.
*   **Publications**: At least 2 publications in ABDC / Scopus indexed journals after Ph.D.

**2. Professor of Practice (Information Technology)**
*   **Education**: M.Tech. / M.E. / M.S. (Computer Science) or equivalent.
*   **Experience**: IT professionals with more than 10 years of experience in a senior management position.
*   **Term**: 1 year on contract, extendable subject to satisfactory performance.

**3. Professor of Practice (Marketing & Sales)**
*   **Education**: PG / MBA (Marketing) / PGDM (Insurance, Risk & Management) or equivalent.
*   **Experience**: Marketing professionals with more than 10 years of experience in a senior management position. Exposure to Insurance Marketing is desirable.
*   **Term**: 1 year on contract, extendable subject to satisfactory performance.

### Age Limit

*   **Assistant Professor (IT)**: Not more than 45 years.
*   **Professor of Practice (IT & Marketing)**: Not more than 62 years.
*   *Age relaxation is applicable for deserving candidates as per NIA norms and government rules.*

### Remuneration / Salary

| Post Name                                    | Salary Details                                                                     |
| :------------------------------------------- | :--------------------------------------------------------------------------------- |
| Assistant Professor (Information Technology) | Level-10 (₹70,900) + Dearness Allowance (DA) as per CFTI Pay Matrix                |
| Professor of Practice (IT & Marketing)       | Consolidated ₹1,10,000/- per month                                                 |

### Application Fee

No application fee is required for the NIA Pune Faculty Recruitment 2026. Candidates only need to submit their filled application form along with self-attested documents.

| Category       | Fee Amount |
| :------------- | :--------- |
| All Candidates | Nil        |

### Selection Process

The selection process for the NIA Pune Faculty positions will involve the following stages:
1.  **Application Assessment**: All eligible applications received will be thoroughly assessed by a dedicated Search-cum-Selection Committee.
2.  **Shortlisting**: Candidates who meet the criteria and are deemed suitable will be shortlisted for the next stage.
3.  **Interview**: Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview.
4.  **Final Selection**: The final selection will be made based on the performance in the interview process.

### Important Dates

Candidates should note the following crucial dates for the NIA Pune Faculty Recruitment 2026:

| Event                       | Date                      |
| :-------------------------- | :------------------------ |
| Notification Published Date | 23 June 2026              |
| Last Date for Applications  | 15 July 2026 (upto 6:00 PM) |

### How to Apply for NIA Pune Faculty Recruitment 2026

Eligible and interested candidates must apply in the prescribed format only. Follow the steps below to complete your application:

1.  **Download Application Form**: Visit the official NIA website (`https://niapune.org.in/`) and download the prescribed application format for Faculty positions.
2.  **Fill Application Form**: Carefully fill out the application form with all personal, educational, experience, and other required details. Ensure accuracy in all entries.
3.  **Attach Documents**: Self-attest and attach copies of all relevant documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, publications, and any other supporting testimonials.
4.  **Submit via Email & Post**: Send the completed application form along with self-attested documents both by email and by post.
    *   **Email**: Send to `recruitment@niapune.org.in`
    *   **Postal Address**:
        Ms. Anita Date
        ES to Director / Chief Manager Estb.
        Chief Administrator (Addnl. Charge)
        National Insurance Academy
        25, Balewadi, Baner Road, NIA P.O.
        Pune – 411045.
5.  **Subject Line/Envelope Marking**: Clearly mention the "Post Applied For" (e.g., "Application for Assistant Professor (IT)" or "Application for Professor of Practice (Marketing & Sales)") in the subject line of your email and on the top of the envelope for postal submission.

### Important Links

*   **Official Website**: [https://niapune.org.in/](https://niapune.org.in/)
*   **Official Notification & Application Format**: *Available on the official website*

### Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)

1.  **What is the total number of vacancies in NIA Pune Faculty Recruitment 2026?**
    Total 03 Faculty posts are to be filled.
2.  **What are the posts available in NIA Pune Recruitment 2026?**
    Assistant Professor (IT) – 1 Post (Regular), Professor of Practice (IT) – 1 Post (On Contract) and Professor of Practice (Marketing & Sales) – 1 Post (On Contract).
3.  **What is the eligibility for Assistant Professor (IT) post?**
    Ph.D. is mandatory + First class academic record + Minimum 2 publications in ABDC/Scopus journals post-Ph.D. + up to 2 years post-Ph.D. experience (fresh Ph.D. with exceptional record may also apply). Age limit: 45 years.
4.  **What is the eligibility for Professor of Practice posts?**
    M.Tech/M.E./M.S. (for IT) or MBA/PGDM (for Marketing) + more than 10 years senior management experience in relevant field. Age limit: 62 years. Consolidated salary ₹1,10,000 per month on 1-year contract (extendable).
5.  **What is the last date to apply for NIA Pune Faculty Recruitment 2026?**
    Last date for receipt of applications is 15 July 2026 upto 6:00 PM.
6.  **How to apply for NIA Pune Faculty posts?**
    Candidates have to send the filled application form along with documents both by email (recruitment@niapune.org.in) and by post to the given address before the last date.

title: NBA Professional Recruitment 2026
overview: The National Biodiversity Authority (NBA) has announced a significant recruitment drive for experienced professionals under the GoI-UNDP-GEF-7 Biodiversity Project. A total of 03 contractual positions are available, including key roles such as Admin, Operations and Finance Officer, National Project Officer (Biodiversity Expert), and Procurement, Admin and Finance Officer. content:
# NBA Professional Recruitment 2026: Apply for 03 Officer Posts

The National Biodiversity Authority (NBA) has released a recruitment notification for the engagement of qualified and experienced professionals for 03 vacancies under the GoI-UNDP-GEF-7 Biodiversity Project. These positions are on a purely contractual and temporary basis, offering a unique opportunity to contribute to significant biodiversity conservation efforts.

## Vacancy Details

Qualified individuals are invited to apply for various professional posts as detailed below:

| S.No. | Post Name                                     | Vacancies | Job Location      |
| :---- | :-------------------------------------------- | :-------- | :---------------- |
| 1     | Admin, Operations and Finance Officer         | 01        | MoEFCC, New Delhi |
| 2     | National Project Officer (Biodiversity Expert) | 01        | NBA, Chennai      |
| 3     | Procurement, Admin and Finance Officer        | 01        | NBA, Chennai      |

## Eligibility Criteria

Detailed educational qualifications, required experience, and other specific eligibility criteria for each post are comprehensively provided in the official notification available on the National Biodiversity Authority's website. Candidates are advised to review these details carefully before applying.

## Age Limit

The age limit for applicants will be as per the norms specified in the detailed official notification for the GoI-UNDP-GEF-7 Biodiversity Project recruitment.

## Remuneration

Selected professionals will be offered a consolidated contractual remuneration in line with the established norms of the GoI-UNDP-GEF-7 Biodiversity Project. Specific details are available in the official notification.

## Application Fee

There is no application fee required for any category of candidates applying for these positions.

| Category         | Application Fee |
| :--------------- | :-------------- |
| All Candidates   | NIL             |

## Selection Process

The selection process for NBA Professional Recruitment 2026 will involve:

1.  **Shortlisting of Applications:** Candidates will be shortlisted based on their qualifications, experience, and suitability for the respective posts as per the criteria mentioned in the detailed notification.
2.  **Interview:** Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview.

## Important Dates

Candidates should note the following key dates for the NBA Professional Recruitment 2026:

| Event                                   | Date           |
| :-------------------------------------- | :------------- |
| Date of Notification                    | 24 June 2026   |
| Last Date for Submission of Application | 24 July 2026   |

## How to Apply

Interested and eligible candidates are required to submit their applications offline in the prescribed format. Please follow the instructions below:

1.  **Download Application Form:** Visit the official website of the National Biodiversity Authority (www.nbaindia.org) to download the prescribed application format.
2.  **Complete the Form:** Fill in all required personal, educational, and professional details accurately and completely in the downloaded application form.
3.  **Attach Required Documents:** Gather and attach self-attested copies of all necessary supporting documents, including educational certificates, experience certificates, identity proof, etc., as per the checklist in the official notification.
4.  **Superscribe the Envelope:** Clearly write the 'Name of the Post Applied For' on the top of the envelope.
5.  **Send to Address:** Send the duly filled application form along with all enclosures to the following address via post or courier, ensuring it reaches by the closing date, 24 July 2026:

    The Administrative Officer,
    National Biodiversity Authority (NBA),
    5th Floor, TICEL Bio Park, CSIR Road,
    Taramani, Chennai – 600113, Tamil Nadu, India.

## Important Links

*   **Official Website:** [https://www.nbaindia.org](https://www.nbaindia.org)

content:
# Banking Sector Recruitment 2026: Your Gateway to a Government Banking Career

The Indian banking sector, a cornerstone of the nation's financial system, is currently inviting applications for a multitude of positions across various public sector banks and financial institutions. With over 5000 new vacancies announced, this is an unparalleled opportunity for individuals seeking stable and rewarding government banking careers.

This comprehensive guide provides a consolidated overview of the latest job openings, upcoming examinations, eligibility criteria, and the application process to help you navigate your journey into the banking world.

## Latest Bank Job Vacancies 2026

Explore the recent recruitment notifications from leading banks and financial bodies. Detailed post-wise vacancies and application deadlines are provided below:

| Post Name                               | Total Vacancies | Last Date    | Bank/Organization                         |
| :-------------------------------------- | :-------------- | :----------- | :---------------------------------------- |
| Probationary Officers (PO)              | 1500            | 2026-07-08   | State Bank of India                       |
| Manager Level Posts in C&IC Department  | 86              | 2026-07-06   | Bank of Baroda                            |
| Professionals in C&IC Department        | 65              | 2026-07-06   | Bank of Baroda                            |
| Young Professional                      | 12              | 2026-07-06   | Reserve Bank of India                     |
| VP, DVP Posts in IT Department          | 05              | 2026-07-10   | Bank of Baroda                            |
| Defence Banking Advisor                 | 05              | 2026-07-08   | State Bank of India                       |
| Cloud CoE & AI Engineers                | 08              | 2026-06-28   | Punjab and Sind Bank                      |
| Trainee Officers                        | 139             | 2026-07-01   | MSC Bank                                  |
| IT Officers                             | 26              | 2026-07-08   | MSC Bank                                  |
| Treasury Specialized Officer            | 07              | 2026-07-08   | MSC Bank                                  |
| Junior Assistant, Driver & Other Posts  | 82              | 2026-06-30   | Bellary DCC Bank                          |
| Management Trainee                      | 05              | To be updated| Exim Bank                                 |
| Specialist                              | 08              | 2026-07-13   | NABARD                                    |

## Upcoming Bank Exams 2026

Stay ahead with the schedule of major banking recruitment exams conducted by IBPS, SBI, RBI, and other prominent public sector banks. These exams are crucial for securing prestigious officer and clerical positions.

| Exam / Post Name                            | Registration Month | Conducting Body                          |
| :------------------------------------------ | :----------------- | :--------------------------------------- |
| Specialist Officers (SO)                    | July 2026          | IBPS                                     |
| Probationary Officers / Management Trainees | July 2026          | IBPS                                     |
| Officer, Assistant Posts (RRBs)             | September 2026     | IBPS (Regional Rural Banks)              |
| Clerk                                       | August 2026        | IBPS                                     |
| Grade B Officers                            | August 2026        | RBI                                      |
| Pharmacist                                  | Upcoming           | SBI                                      |
| Specialist Officers                         | Upcoming           | IDBI Bank                                |
| Local Bank Officers                         | To be announced    | Union Bank of India                      |
| Executives                                  | To be announced    | IDBI Bank                                |

## Eligibility Criteria

To be eligible for banking positions, candidates must fulfill certain requirements:

### Educational Qualifications

*   **For Clerical/Junior Associate/Customer Service Roles (e.g., Clerk, Office Assistant, Peon):** Minimum 10th or 12th pass from a recognized board.
*   **For Probationary Officer (PO) / Management Trainee (MT) / Officer Roles:** A Bachelor's degree (Graduation) in any discipline from a recognized university.
*   **For Specialist Officer (SO) Roles (e.g., IT Officer, Law Officer, HR Officer):** A Bachelor's or Master's degree in the relevant specialized field.

### Age Limit

*   **General Age Range:** Typically between 20 to 30 years.
*   **Age Relaxation:** Permissible relaxation in the upper age limit is provided for candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes (SC), Scheduled Tribes (ST), Other Backward Classes (OBC), Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD), Ex-servicemen, and other categories as per Government of India guidelines. Refer to the specific notification for detailed age relaxation rules.

## Application Fee

Application fees vary based on the post, bank, and candidate category. Generally, fees range from INR 100 to INR 850. SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-servicemen candidates often receive concessions or exemptions. **Please refer to the official notification of each individual recruitment drive for exact application fee details and payment methods.**

## Selection Process

The selection process for most bank jobs typically involves:

1.  **Online Written Examination:** This usually comprises preliminary and main exams testing quantitative aptitude, reasoning ability, English language, general awareness, and computer knowledge.
2.  **Interview:** Shortlisted candidates from the written exam are called for a personal interview (especially for Officer-level posts).
3.  **Document Verification & Medical Examination:** Final selection is subject to successful document verification and a medical fitness test.

## How to Apply for Bank Jobs 2026

Follow these general steps to apply for banking vacancies:

1.  **Identify Opportunities:** Regularly check official bank websites and reliable government job portals for the latest recruitment notifications.
2.  **Review Eligibility:** Carefully read the official notification for the specific post you are interested in, ensuring you meet all eligibility criteria (age, qualification, experience).
3.  **Online Registration:** Visit the official application portal (usually linked in the notification) and complete the initial registration, which generates a registration ID and password.
4.  **Fill Application Form:** Log in with your credentials and accurately fill out the detailed application form with personal, educational, and contact information.
5.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, and any other required documents as per the specified format and size.
6.  **Pay Application Fee:** Pay the requisite application fee online through the provided payment gateway (Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, etc.).
7.  **Submit & Print:** Review your application for any errors and submit it. After successful submission, take a printout of the e-receipt and the completed application form for future reference.

## Important Advice

*   Always refer to the official notifications released by the respective banks or recruiting bodies for the most accurate and up-to-date information.
*   Prepare thoroughly for competitive examinations as the banking sector jobs are highly sought after.
*   Stay updated by joining official channels or reputable job alert services.

title: Bank of Baroda VP & DVP Recruitment 2026
overview: Bank of Baroda, one of India's largest public sector banks, invites online applications from eligible professionals for recruitment of Vice Presidents (VP) and Deputy Vice Presidents (DVP) on Fixed Term Employment basis in the IT Department. The Bank of Baroda VP & DVP Recruitment 2026 for 05 Vacancies Online Application process starts from 20th June 2026 and closes on 10th July 2026. This article provides complete information about Bank of Baroda IT Professionals Posts 2026, including post-wise vacancies, detailed eligibility criteria, selection process, and direct links to the official notification and application portal.
eligibility: B.E./B.Tech in Computer Science/IT/Electronics & Tele Communication/Electrical & Electronics or MCA with relevant IT experience. Post-wise experience: VP – Head AI: Minimum 12 years (6 years in AI/NLP); VP – Head Platform Engineering: Minimum 12 years (preferably 6 years in Cloud Computing); DVP – Dy. Head Cloud CoE: Minimum 10 years (5 years in Cloud Computing); DVP – Dy. Head IT Infrastructure: Minimum 10 years (5 years in Infrastructure Management); DVP – Dy. Head Platform Engineering: Minimum 10 years (preferably 5 years in Cloud Computing/Platform Engineering).
age_limit: VP level: 38 to 48 years; DVP level: 35 to 45 years
salary: Market-linked remuneration based on qualifications, experience, last drawn salary, and market benchmark.
how_to_apply:
Eligible candidates must apply online only through the Bank of Baroda career portal. The application steps are as follows:

Step 1: Visit https://www.bankofbaroda.bank.in → Career section → Current Opportunities.

Step 2: Click on the link for “RECRUITMENT OF PROFESSIONALS ON FIXED TERM EMPLOYMENT BASIS IN IT DEPARTMENT” (Advertisement No. BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/12).

Step 3: Register and fill the online application form carefully with all required details.

Step 4: Upload the following documents in PDF format (each file ≤ 500 KB, A4 size): Resume, 10th marksheet/certificate (DOB proof), All Educational Certificates (single PDF), Work Experience Certificates, Caste/Category Certificate (if applicable), and PWD certificate (if applicable).

Step 5: Submit the application before 10 July 2026 and take a printout of the application form for future reference.

## Bank of Baroda VP & DVP Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for 05 Posts

Bank of Baroda, a leading public sector bank, has announced the recruitment of Vice Presidents (VP) and Deputy Vice Presidents (DVP) in its IT Department on a fixed-term employment basis. This is a great opportunity for experienced IT professionals to join a prestigious organization. Below are the complete details.

### Vacancy Details

| Post Name | No. of Vacancies |
|-----------|------------------|
| VP – Head AI | 01 |
| VP – Head Platform Engineering | 01 |
| DVP: Dy. Head Cloud CoE | 01 |
| DVP: Dy. Head IT Infrastructure | 01 |
| DVP: Dy. Head Platform Engineering | 01 |

### Eligibility Criteria

| Post Name | Age Limit | Educational Qualification & Experience |
|-----------|-----------|----------------------------------------|
| VP – Head AI | 38-48 years | B.E./B.Tech in CS/IT or MCA; Min 12 years IT exp (6 years in AI/NLP) |
| VP – Head Platform Engineering | 38-48 years | B.E./B.Tech in CS/IT/ECE/EEE or MCA; Min 12 years IT exp (pref 6 years in Cloud) |
| DVP: Dy. Head Cloud CoE | 35-45 years | B.E./B.Tech in CS/IT/ECE/EEE or MCA; Min 10 years IT exp (5 years in Cloud) |
| DVP: Dy. Head IT Infrastructure | 35-45 years | B.E./B.Tech in CS/IT/ECE/EEE or MCA; Min 10 years IT exp (5 years in Infra Mgmt) |
| DVP: Dy. Head Platform Engineering | 35-45 years | B.E./B.Tech in CS/IT/ECE/EEE or MCA; Min 10 years IT exp (pref 5 years in Cloud/Platform) |

### Application Fee

| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Categories | Nil |

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Online Registration Starts | 20 June 2026 |
| Last Date for Submission | 10 July 2026 |

### Selection Process

The selection will be based on:
- Interview
- Document Verification

### How to Apply

1. Visit the official Bank of Baroda career portal: [https://www.bankofbaroda.bank.in](https://www.bankofbaroda.bank.in)
2. Go to the Career section and click on Current Opportunities.
3. Find the advertisement for "RECRUITMENT OF PROFESSIONALS ON FIXED TERM EMPLOYMENT BASIS IN IT DEPARTMENT" (Advt No. BOB/HRM/REC/ADVT/2026/12).
4. Register and fill the online application form with accurate details.
5. Upload required documents (Resume, educational certificates, experience certificates, etc.) in PDF format (max 500 KB each).
6. Submit the application before 10 July 2026 and take a printout for future reference.

### Important Links

- [Official Notification PDF](#) (Link not available)
- [Apply Online](https://www.bankofbaroda.bank.in)
- [Official Website](https://www.bankofbaroda.bank.in)

### FAQs

**Q1: What is the total number of vacancies?**
A: 05 posts.

**Q2: What is the age limit?**
A: VP: 38-48 years; DVP: 35-45 years.

**Q3: What is the salary?**
A: Market-linked remuneration.

**Q4: What is the selection process?**
A: Interview and Document Verification.

**Q5: Is there any application fee?**
A: No, nil for all categories.

**Q6: What are the important dates?**
A: Online registration from 20 June 2026 to 10 July 2026.

content:
## SBI SCO BMO Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 35 Bank Medical Officer Posts

State Bank of India (SBI) invites online applications from eligible candidates for the post of Bank Medical Officer (BMO) under Specialist Cadre Officer (SCO) recruitment. A total of 35 vacancies are to be filled. Candidates must possess an MBBS degree and should be registered with the Medical Council of India or State Medical Council. The selection process includes a shortlisting based on qualifications and experience, followed by an interview.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee Amount |
|----------|------------|
| General / OBC / EWS | Rs. 750 |
| SC / ST / PwD | Rs. 0 (Nil) |
| Payment Mode | Online (Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking) |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Start of Online Application | 24 June 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply | 14 July 2026 |
| Last Date for Fee Payment | 14 July 2026 |
| Interview Date | To be announced |

### Vacancy Details
| Post | Vacancies |
|------|-----------|
| Bank Medical Officer (BMO) | 35 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Educational Qualification:** MBBS degree from a recognized university. Candidates must have completed the internship.
- **Registration:** Must be registered with the Medical Council of India or State Medical Council.
- **Experience:** Minimum 2 years of experience in a hospital or clinic (preferred).

### Age Limit (as on 01 June 2026)
- Minimum Age: 30 years
- Maximum Age: 40 years
- Age Relaxation: As per government norms for SC/ST/OBC/PwD.

### Salary
Selected candidates will be placed in the pay scale of Rs. 1,00,000 - 1,50,000 per month (including allowances).

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official SBI website: [sbi.bank.in](https://sbi.bank.in).
2. Go to the 'Careers' section and click on 'Current Openings'.
3. Find the notification for 'SCO BMO Recruitment 2026' and click 'Apply Online'.
4. Register with a valid email ID and mobile number.
5. Fill in the application form with personal, educational, and professional details.
6. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required documents.
7. Pay the application fee online.
8. Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.

### Selection Process
- Shortlisting based on qualifications and experience.
- Interview.

### Important Links
- **Apply Online:** [SBI Careers](https://sbi.bank.in/careers)
- **Official Notification:** Not yet released (check SBI website for updates).

## PSSSB Junior Scale Stenographer Skill Test Admit Card 2026

The Punjab Subordinate Service Selection Board (PSSSB) has released the admit card for the Junior Scale Stenographer Skill Test. The exam is scheduled for **26 June 2026**. Candidates must download their admit card from the official website and follow the exam-day guidelines.

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Admit Card Release | To be announced |
| Skill Test Date | 26 June 2026 |

### Exam Day Guidelines

- Carry a printed copy of the admit card along with a valid photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Passport, etc.).
- Reach the exam center at least 30 minutes before the reporting time.
- Follow all COVID-19 protocols if applicable.
- Electronic devices, bags, and study materials are strictly prohibited.
- Candidates must bring their own stationery as specified in the instructions.

### Documents to Carry

- PSSSB Admit Card
- One passport-size photograph (same as on application)

meta_description: The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has announced a significant recruitment drive for the contractual position of Medical Officer in 2026.
content:
# ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026: Apply Offline

The Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) invites applications for the contractual post of Medical Officer for the year 2026. This recruitment offers a unique opportunity for qualified MBBS professionals to contribute their expertise within a vital central government initiative. Interested and eligible candidates are advised to go through the detailed notification and apply offline before the last date.

## Vacancy Details

The ECHS Medical Officer recruitment aims to fill the following positions:

| Post Name      | Total Vacancies |
| :------------- | :-------------- |
| Medical Officer | 01              |

## Eligibility Criteria

### Educational Qualification

Candidates must possess an **MBBS Degree** from a University recognized by the Medical Council of India (MCI) and have valid registration with the MCI/State Medical Council.

### Age Limit

Specific age limits for this contractual position are generally outlined in the official notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the detailed ECHS notification for exact age criteria, including any relaxation for reserved categories.

## Application Fee

The application fee details for this recruitment are typically specified in the official notification. Candidates should refer to the official document for accurate fee information and payment methods.

| Category         | Application Fee       |
| :--------------- | :-------------------- |
| General/OBC      | As per Official Notification |
| SC/ST/PwBD/Female | As per Official Notification |
| Payment Mode     | Offline (DD/Cash if applicable) |

## Important Dates

Candidates should note the following important dates regarding the ECHS Medical Officer Recruitment 2026:

| Event                           | Date            |
| :------------------------------ | :-------------- |
| Last Date for Offline Application | July 20, 2026   |
| Interview/Selection Dates       | To be announced |

## Selection Process

The selection process for the Medical Officer position under ECHS typically involves:

1.  **Scrutiny of Applications:** Applications received will be screened for eligibility based on the criteria mentioned in the notification.
2.  **Interview:** Shortlisted candidates will be called for an interview to assess their knowledge, experience, and suitability for the contractual post.

## How to Apply

Eligible and interested candidates must apply offline by following these steps:

1.  **Download Application Form:** Obtain the prescribed application form from the official ECHS website (echs.gov.in) or from the detailed recruitment notification PDF.
2.  **Fill the Form:** Carefully fill in all the required details in the application form without any errors. Ensure all information provided is accurate and verifiable.
3.  **Attach Documents:** Prepare self-attested photocopies of the following documents:
    *   Educational Qualification Certificates (MBBS Degree, Marksheets, etc.)
    *   Medical Council Registration Certificate
    *   Experience Certificates (if any)
    *   Proof of Date of Birth (e.g., Matriculation Certificate)
    *   Aadhaar Card/PAN Card
    *   Recent passport-size photographs (as specified)
    *   Any other relevant documents as specified in the official notification.
4.  **Enclose in Envelope:** Place the duly filled application form and all self-attested copies of required documents in a sealed envelope.
5.  **Submission:** Submit the application either by registered post/speed post or in person to the address mentioned in the official ECHS notification, typically the concerned ECHS Polyclinic or Regional Centre. Ensure it reaches the designated authority on or before July 20, 2026.
6.  **Keep Copy:** It is advisable to keep a copy of the submitted application form and postal receipt for future reference.

Candidates are strongly advised to thoroughly read the official ECHS recruitment notification for 2026 before applying to ensure compliance with all requirements and deadlines.

|-------|------|

| Post Name | No. of Posts | Pay Scale | Age Limit | Qualification |
|-----------|--------------|-----------|-----------|---------------|

The selection will be done through Written Test followed by Document Verification.

Total 22 posts including Assistant, Junior Engineer, Quality Assistant, Station-in-Charge and Trainee Technician.

Assistant (HR&A), Junior Engineer (Civil), Quality Assistant, Assistant (CAMO), Station-in-Charge and Trainee Technician posts.

₹354/- for General/OBC/EWS candidates. SC/ST and PwD candidates are exempted from fee payment.

Selection will be done through Written Test followed by Document Verification.

This is a consolidated update for MBA freshers and experienced professionals seeking government employment.
eligibility: MBA or equivalent PGDM from AICTE/UGC recognized institution. Specific posts may require specialization in Finance, HR, Marketing, Operations, etc. Experience requirements vary by post.

salary: Varies by post; typically Level 7 to Level 14 pay matrix (approx. ₹44,900 – ₹2,18,200 per month).
how_to_apply: 1. Visit the official website of the respective organization. 2. Read the detailed notification. 3. Click on the application link. 4. content:
## MBA Govt Jobs 2026 – 500+ Vacancies

Government jobs for MBA graduates are available across multiple central government departments, PSUs, and financial institutions. Below is the list of current openings.

### Application Fee

| Category | Fee (₹) |
|----------|---------|
| General / OBC | 500 – 1000 (varies by post) |
| SC / ST / PWD | 0 – 250 (varies by post) |
| Female | 0 – 500 (varies by post) |

*Note: Fee details are indicative. Refer to individual notifications.*

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Last Date for Manager Posts (EPI Limited) | 03/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Executive (Finance, HR) – NEEPCO | 13/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Specialist – NABARD | 13/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Various Manager Posts – IIM Mumbai | 09/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Assistant (HR&A) – Pawan Hans | 10/07/2026 |
| Last Date for General Managers – BEML | 26/06/2026 |
| Last Date for Professor of Practice – NIA Pune | 15/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Deputy General Manager, etc. – IIM Shillong | 20/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Finance Officers – NBA India | 24/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Vice President, etc. – Bank of Baroda | 06/07/2026 |
| Last Date for General Manager (AHL) – UPMSCL | 01/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Manager Level Posts – TCIL | 30/06/2026 |
| Last Date for Manager Level Posts – Mumbai Port Authority | 06/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Various Manager Posts – Vadodara Gas Limited | 07/07/2026 |
| Last Date for Manager Level Posts – Pune Peoples Bank | 19/06/2026 |
| Last Date for General Manager (Finance & Accounts) – BSNL | 24/06/2026 |
| Last Date for Executive Posts – Hindustan Copper Limited | 25/06/2026 |
| Last Date for Various Group A and B Posts – AYJNISHD | 29/06/2026 |

### Vacancy Details

| Post Name | Organization | Total Vacancies |
|-----------|--------------|----------------|
| Manager Posts | EPI Limited | 10+ |
| Executive (Finance, HR) | NEEPCO | 10+ |
| Specialist | NABARD | 08 |
| Various Manager Posts | IIM Mumbai | 10+ |
| Assistant (HR&A) | Pawan Hans Limited | 01 |
| General Managers | BEML Limited | 03 |
| Professor of Practice (Marketing & Sales) | NIA Pune | 01 |
| Deputy General Manager, Senior Manager, Manager & Assistant Manager | IIM Shillong | 07 |
| Finance Officers | NBA India | 03 |
| Vice President, Assistant Vice President, Deputy Vice President | Bank of Baroda | 65 |
| General Manager (AHL) | UPMSCL | 01 |
| Manager Level Posts | TCIL | 06 |
| Manager Level Posts | Mumbai Port Authority | 10 |
| Various Manager Posts | Vadodara Gas Limited | 16 |
| Manager Level Posts | Pune Peoples Bank | 33 |
| General Manager (Finance & Accounts) | BSNL | 15 |
| Executive Posts | Hindustan Copper Limited | 70 |
| Executive (Corporate Communication / Materials & Contracts) | Hindustan Copper Limited | 10+ |
| Various Group A and B Posts | AYJNISHD | 25 |

### Eligibility Criteria

- **Educational Qualification:** MBA or PGDM from AICTE/UGC recognized institution. Specialization in Finance, HR, Marketing, Operations, etc. as per post requirement.
- **Age Limit:** Varies by post; generally 18-45 years. Relaxation as per government norms.
- **Experience:** Freshers and experienced candidates can apply; some posts require 2-10 years of relevant experience.

### How to Apply

1. Visit the official website of the respective organization.
2. Read the detailed notification.
3. Click on the application link.
4. Fill in personal, educational, and experience details.
5. Upload scanned documents and photo.
6. Pay application fee (if applicable).
7. Submit and take a printout.

### Selection Process

Selection typically involves a written test, group discussion, and/or personal interview. Some posts may have skill tests or document verification.

### Important Links

- **Official Notification:** Refer to individual organization websites.
- **Apply Online:** Links available on respective official portals.

*Stay updated with this page for more MBA government job alerts.*

content:
## WBPSC WBCS Prelims Answer Key 2026

The West Bengal Public Service Commission (WBPSC) has released the preliminary answer key for the West Bengal Civil Service (WBCS) Examination 2026. Candidates who appeared for the prelims can now download the official answer key PDF from the commission's website. The answer key allows candidates to estimate their scores and check the correctness of their responses. This is a crucial step before the final result declaration.

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Prelims Exam Date | To be announced |
| Answer Key Release Date | 2026 |
| Last Date to Raise Objections | To be announced |
| Final Result Declaration | To be announced |

### How to Download Answer Key

1. Visit the official WBPSC website at [wbpsc.gov.in](https://wbpsc.gov.in).
2. Click on the 'Answer Key' link on the homepage.
3. Find the link for 'WBCS Prelims 2026 Answer Key' and click on it.
4. The answer key PDF will open. Download and save it for reference.
5. Compare your responses with the official answer key to calculate your probable score.

### Exam Day Guidelines

- Carry a printed copy of the admit card and a valid photo ID to the exam center.
- Reach the exam center at least 30 minutes before the reporting time.
- Follow all COVID-19 protocols if applicable.
- Electronic devices, bags, and study materials are not allowed inside the exam hall.

### Documents Required for Verification (if shortlisted)

- Admit Card
- Educational qualification certificates
- Age proof (Birth certificate/10th marksheet)
- Caste certificate (if applicable)
- Disability certificate (if applicable)
- Recent passport-size photographs

### Cut-off Marks and Result Updates

The cut-off marks will be released along with the final result. Candidates can check the official website for updates. The answer key is provisional; final marks may vary after objection resolution.

title: NTPC ACT Recruitment 2026 for Assistant Chemist Trainee
overview: NTPC Limited, India's largest energy conglomerate, has announced the recruitment of Assistant Chemist Trainees (ACT) for 2026. This is a golden opportunity for chemistry graduates to join a Maharatna company and contribute to the nation's power sector. The recruitment drive aims to fill 40 vacancies across various NTPC plants and projects. Selected candidates will undergo training and enjoy a lucrative pay scale along with benefits.
eligibility: Bachelor's degree in Chemistry (B.Sc. with Chemistry as a main subject) from a recognized university. Minimum 60% marks (55% for SC/ST/PwBD).
age_limit: 18 to 30 years (age relaxation as per government norms)
salary: During training: Stipend as per company rules. After training: Pay scale of ₹30,000 - ₹1,20,000 per month (E-1 grade) plus allowances.
how_to_apply: 1. Visit the official NTPC careers portal at https://careers.ntpc.co.in. 2. Register with a valid email and mobile number. 3. Fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and other details. 4. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required documents. 5. Pay the application fee online (if applicable). 6. Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.

meta_description: NTPC Limited, India's largest energy conglomerate, has announced the recruitment of Assistant Chemist Trainees (ACT) for 2026. This is a golden opportunity
content:
## NTPC ACT Recruitment 2026: Assistant Chemist Trainee

NTPC Limited has released the official notification for the recruitment of Assistant Chemist Trainees (ACT) for 2026. A total of 40 vacancies are available for chemistry graduates. Below are the key details.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| General / OBC / EWS | ₹300 |
| SC / ST / PwBD / Female | Nil |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Start of Online Application | 1st January 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply | 31st January 2026 |
| Exam Date (Tentative) | March 2026 |

### Vacancy Details
| Post | Vacancies |
|------|-----------|
| Assistant Chemist Trainee | 40 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Educational Qualification:** B.Sc. with Chemistry as a main subject from a recognized university with minimum 60% marks (55% for SC/ST/PwBD).
- **Age Limit:** 18 to 30 years as of the application start date. Age relaxation as per government rules.

### Salary & Benefits
Selected candidates will receive a stipend during training. After successful completion, they will be placed in the E-1 grade with a pay scale of ₹30,000 - ₹1,20,000 per month, along with dearness allowance, house rent allowance, medical benefits, and other perks as per NTPC norms.

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official NTPC careers website: https://careers.ntpc.co.in.
2. Click on the 'Apply Online' link for ACT Recruitment 2026.
3. Register with your email and mobile number.
4. Fill in the application form with accurate details.
5. Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, and certificates.
6. Pay the application fee (if applicable) via online mode.
7. Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

### Selection Process
The selection will be based on a written test (objective type) followed by a personal interview. The written test will cover Chemistry, General Awareness, and Reasoning. Shortlisted candidates will be called for document verification and interview.

For more details, refer to the official notification on the NTPC website.

content:
## BPSC Factory Inspector Document Verification Schedule 2026

The Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has released the Document Verification (DV) schedule for the post of Factory Inspector. Candidates who have cleared the written examination can now check their roll numbers and report for verification between July 7 and August 24, 2026. The DV will be conducted in shifts, and candidates must bring all required original documents along with self-attested copies.

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| DV Start Date | July 7, 2026 |
| DV End Date | August 24, 2026 |

### Documents Required

- Admit Card for the written examination
- Mark sheets and certificates of all educational qualifications
- Caste certificate (if applicable)
- Age proof (Birth certificate / 10th mark sheet)
- Domicile certificate (if required)
- Any other relevant documents as mentioned in the official notification

### How to Check Your Roll Number and Schedule

1. Visit the official BPSC website: [https://www.bpsc.bih.nic.in](https://www.bpsc.bih.nic.in)
2. Click on the link for 'Factory Inspector DV Schedule 2026'.
3. Download the PDF and search for your roll number.
4. Note the date, time, and venue for your document verification.

### Important Instructions

- Candidates must report on time as per the schedule.
- Original documents must be produced; no photocopies will be accepted.
- Failure to appear for DV will result in cancellation of candidature.
- Keep multiple self-attested copies of all documents ready.

title: TNPSC Combined Technical Services (Non-Interview Posts) 2026 – 461 Posts
overview: The Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (TNPSC) has announced the Combined Technical Services Examination (Non-Interview Posts) 2026, inviting online applications for 461 vacancies across various technical and non-interview posts. This recruitment drive includes positions such as Assistant Engineer, Assistant Geologist, Horticultural Officer, Drug Inspector, Archaeological Officer, and many others, offering a prestigious career opportunity in the Government of Tamil Nadu. Candidates with relevant educational qualifications (B.E./B.Tech, M.Sc., PG Degree, etc.) and age between 21-45 years (as per post) are eligible to apply. The online application process begins on 27 May 2026 and closes on 25 June 2026.
eligibility: Educational qualification varies by post: Assistant Engineer (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical): B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch; Assistant Geologist: M.Sc. Geology/Applied Geology/Hydrogeology; Horticultural Officer: B.Sc. Horticulture; Drug Inspector: Degree in Pharmacy/Pharmaceutical Sciences/Medicine; Archaeological Officer: PG in Ancient History & Archaeology/Epigraphy; other posts as per notification.
age_limit: 21-32 years for most posts (OC); SC/SC(A)/ST/MBC/DC/BC/BCM: no upper age limit (should not have completed 60 years); special posts up to 42 years; age concessions as per rules.
salary: Pay Level 8 to Level 20 (₹19,900 – ₹1,77,500 per month) plus DA, HRA, Medical Allowance, and other benefits as per Tamil Nadu Government rules.
how_to_apply: 1. Visit the official TNPSC portal www.tnpscexams.in. 2. Complete One Time Registration (OTR) if not already registered. 3. Login and fill the online application form. 4. Choose the subject paper(s) as per your educational qualification. 5. Upload scanned photograph, signature, and required documents. 6. Pay the application fee online (₹100 per subject paper; free for eligible categories). 7. Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

## TNPSC CTS Non Interview Posts 2026 – Apply Online for 461 Engineer, Geologist, Assistant & Other Posts

The Tamil Nadu Public Service Commission (TNPSC) has officially released the Advertisement No. 734 / Notification No. 04/2026 dated 20 May 2026 for the Combined Technical Services Examination (Non-Interview Posts) 2026. A total of 461 vacancies are announced for various technical and non-interview posts including Assistant Engineer (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical), Assistant Geologist, Horticultural Officer, Drug Inspector, Archaeological Officer and many others across multiple departments of Government of Tamil Nadu. This is one of the largest technical recruitment drives in Tamil Nadu in 2026.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All candidates | ₹100 per subject paper |
| SC/SC(A)/ST/MBC/DC/BC/BCM, Ex-Servicemen, PwD, Destitute Widow | Two free chances (exempted from fee) |
| Payment mode | Online (Net Banking / Credit / Debit Card / UPI) |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Date of Notification | 20 May 2026 |
| Online Application Start Date | 27 May 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply Online | 25 June 2026 (23:59 hours) |
| Application Correction Window | 29 June to 01 July 2026 |
| Exam Date (Tentative) | To be announced |

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Vacancies |
|-----------|-----------|
| Assistant Engineer (Various Disciplines) | 167+ |
| Assistant Geologist | 19 |
| Horticultural Officer | 17 |
| Drug Inspector | 9 |
| Archaeological Officer / Assistant Archaeological Officer | 20 |
| Block Health Statistician / Assistant Statistical Investigator | 75 |
| Junior Photographer | 23 |
| Assistant Tourist Officer Grade-II | 4 |
| Other Posts | As per notification |

### Eligibility Criteria
**Age Limit (as on 01.07.2026):**
- Most posts: 21–32 years (OC)
- SC/SC(A)/ST/MBC/DC/BC/BCM: No maximum age limit (should not have completed 60 years)
- Special posts (e.g., Junior Photographer): Up to 42 years
- Age concessions: PwD +10 years, Ex-Servicemen +18 years (no upper limit for most posts), Destitute Widow – No maximum age limit

**Educational Qualification (post-wise examples):**
- Assistant Engineer (Civil/Mechanical/Electrical): B.E./B.Tech in relevant branch
- Assistant Geologist: M.Sc. Geology / Applied Geology / Hydrogeology
- Horticultural Officer: B.Sc. Horticulture
- Drug Inspector: Degree in Pharmacy / Pharmaceutical Sciences / Medicine
- Archaeological Officer: PG in Ancient History & Archaeology / Epigraphy

### Selection Process
1. Written Examination – Paper I (OMR) + Paper II (CBT)
2. Onscreen Certificate Verification
3. Physical Certificate Verification & Counselling (wherever applicable)

### Exam Pattern
| Paper | Subject | Standard | Questions | Marks | Duration | Mode |
|-------|---------|----------|-----------|-------|----------|------|
| Paper I | Part A – Tamil Eligibility Test | SSLC | 100 | 150 | 3 Hours | OMR |
| Paper I | Part B – General Studies | Degree | 75 | 150 | | |
| Paper I | Part C – Aptitude & Mental Ability | SSLC | 25 | 150 | | |
| Paper II | Subject Paper (chosen by candidate) | Degree/PG | 200 | 300 | | CBT |
| **Total** | (Part B + Part C of Paper I + Paper II) | | | **450** | | |

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official TNPSC portal www.tnpscexams.in
2. Complete One Time Registration (OTR) if not already registered
3. Login and fill the online application form
4. Choose the subject paper(s) as per your educational qualification
5. Upload scanned photograph, signature and required documents
6. Pay the application fee online
7. Submit the form and take a printout for future reference

### Important Links
- [Official Notification PDF](#) (Link not available)
- [Apply Online](https://www.tnpscexams.in)
- [All Tamil Nadu Govt Jobs 2026](#)

### FAQs
**Q1. How many vacancies are announced in TNPSC CTS Non Interview Posts 2026?**
A1. Total 461 vacancies have been announced for various technical and non-interview posts.

**Q2. What is the last date to apply for TNPSC CTS 2026?**
A2. The last date to submit online application is 25 June 2026 (23:59 hours).

**Q3. What is the educational qualification required for TNPSC CTS posts?**
A3. Qualification varies by post – B.E./B.Tech for Assistant Engineer posts, M.Sc. for Geologist / Scientific posts, PG Degree for Archaeological / Horticultural Officer etc.

**Q4. What is the selection process for TNPSC CTS Non Interview 2026?**
A4. Written Examination (Paper-I OMR + Paper-II CBT) followed by Certificate Verification.

**Q5. Is there negative marking in TNPSC CTS exam?**
A5. No negative marking is mentioned in the notification. Minimum qualifying marks apply as per category.

title: Tamil Nadu PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026 – 760 Posts
overview: The Public Works Department (PWD), Tamil Nadu has announced a massive recruitment drive for 760 Apprentice positions under the Apprenticeship (Amendment) Act, 1973 for the year 2026-27. This is a golden opportunity for engineering graduates, diploma holders, and non-engineering graduates who passed out between 2022 and 2025 and are domiciled in Tamil Nadu. The apprenticeship offers a monthly stipend of ₹8,000 to ₹9,000 and provides hands-on training in various disciplines. Online applications are invited through the NATS portal from 20th May 2026 to 25th June 2026. Selection will be based on merit in the qualifying examination followed by certificate verification.
eligibility: Graduate Apprentices (Engineering): B.E/B.Tech/B.Arch (Full Time) in relevant discipline from a recognized University/Institution. Technician (Diploma) Apprentices: Diploma in Engineering/Technology (Full Time) in relevant discipline from a recognized Board/University. Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices: B.A/B.Sc/B.Com/BBA/BCA/BBM or any other Graduate degree (Full Time) from a recognized University. Candidates must have passed the qualifying examination in the years 2022, 2023, 2024 or 2025 only.
how_to_apply: 1. Visit the NATS Portal at https://nats.education.gov.in. 2. New users must register as a Student and complete enrollment to get a 12-digit Enrollment Number. 3. Login with registered Email ID and Password. 4. Go to 'Apply against advertised vacancies' and search for 'PUBLIC WORKS DEPARTMENT TAMILNADU'. 5. Click on Apply and upload required documents (Provisional Certificate / Consolidated Marksheet). 6. Submit the application. Ensure correct percentage of marks is entered.

content:
## Tamil Nadu PWD Apprentice Recruitment 2026 – 760 Posts

The Public Works Department (PWD), Tamil Nadu invites online applications from eligible candidates for engagement as Apprentices for the year 2026-27. Below are the complete details.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates | No Application Fee |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Commencement of Online Registration | 20 May 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Application | 25 June 2026 |
| Declaration of Shortlisted List | 03 July 2026 |
| Certificate Verification at PWD, Chennai | 15 to 17 July 2026 (Tentative) |

### Vacancy Details
#### Category I – Graduate Apprentices (Engineering)
| Discipline | No. of Posts | Stipend |
|------------|--------------|---------|
| Civil Engineering | 360 | ₹9,000/- |
| Electrical and Electronics Engineering | 28 | ₹9,000/- |
| Architecture | 12 | ₹9,000/- |
| **Total** | **400** | **₹9,000/-** |

#### Category II – Technician (Diploma) Apprentices
| Discipline | No. of Posts | Stipend |
|------------|--------------|---------|
| Civil Engineering | 150 | ₹8,000/- |
| Electrical and Electronics Engineering | 05 | ₹8,000/- |
| Architecture | 05 | ₹8,000/- |
| **Total** | **160** | **₹8,000/-** |

#### Category III – Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices
| Discipline | No. of Posts | Stipend |
|------------|--------------|---------|
| B.A / B.Sc / B.Com / BBA / BCA / BBM etc. | 200 | ₹9,000/- |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Graduate Apprentices (Engineering):** B.E / B.Tech / B.Arch (Full Time) in relevant discipline from a recognized University / Institution.
- **Technician (Diploma) Apprentices:** Diploma in Engineering / Technology (Full Time) in relevant discipline from a recognized Board / University.
- **Non-Engineering Graduate Apprentices:** B.A / B.Sc / B.Com / BBA / BCA / BBM or any other Graduate degree (Full Time) from a recognized University.
- Candidates must have passed the qualifying examination in the years 2022, 2023, 2024 or 2025 only.

### Age Limit
No age limit specified.

### Selection Process
Selection will be made on the basis of:
- Shortlisting based on percentage of marks obtained in the qualifying examination.
- Certificate Verification at PWD, Chennai (for shortlisted candidates).

### How to Apply
1. Visit the NATS Portal → https://nats.education.gov.in
2. New users should register as Student and complete enrollment to get 12-digit Enrollment Number.
3. Login with registered Email ID and Password.
4. Go to “Apply against advertised vacancies” and search for “PUBLIC WORKS DEPARTMENT TAMILNADU”.
5. Click on Apply and upload the required documents (Provisional Certificate / Consolidated Marksheet).
6. Submit the application. You will see the status as “Applied”.

**Note:** Candidates must enter the correct percentage of marks in the NATS portal. Failure to do so will result in rejection of the application.

### Important Links
- [Apply Online (NATS Portal)](https://nats.education.gov.in)
- [Detailed Notification PDF](#) (Link not available)

### FAQs
**Q: What is the total number of vacancies?**
A: 760 Apprenticeship posts (400 Graduate + 160 Diploma + 200 Non-Engineering).

**Q: What is the stipend?**
A: Graduate & Non-Engineering Graduates: ₹9,000 per month; Diploma: ₹8,000 per month.

**Q: What is the duration of training?**
A: One Year.

**Q: Who can apply?**
A: Candidates who passed Degree/Diploma in 2022, 2023, 2024 or 2025 from Tamil Nadu and have not undergone previous apprenticeship training.

**Q: Last date to apply?**
A: 25 June 2026.

**Q: How to apply?**
A: Only through NATS Portal.

|------------|----------|----------|----------|-------|
| Mining | 7 | 5 | 0 | 12 |
| Geology | 2 | 3 | 0 | 5 |
| Environment Management | 3 | 3 | 0 | 6 |
| Safety & Fire Services | 4 | 4 | 0 | 8 |
| Concentrator (Mineral Processing) | 3 | 3 | 0 | 6 |
| Electrical | 4 | 5 | 0 | 9 |
| Instrumentation | 3 | 3 | 0 | 6 |
| Mechanical | 4 | 2 | 2 | 8 |
| Civil | 3 | 3 | 0 | 6 |
| Systems | 1 | 1 | 0 | 2 |
| Medical & Health Services | 2 | 1 | 0 | 3 |
| HR | 4 | 4 | 0 | 8 |
| Finance | 4 | 1 | 2 | 7 |
| Corporate Communication | 1 | 1 | 0 | 2 |
| Materials & Contracts | 2 | 2 | 0 | 4 |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| General / OBC / EWS | ₹500 |
| SC / ST / PwBD / Internal | Nil (Exempted) |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Opening Date for Online Application | 05 June 2026 (11:00 AM) |
| Last Date to Apply Online | 25 June 2026 (Midnight) |

### Eligibility Criteria
**Age Limit (as on last date of application):**
- E2 Grade: Maximum 40 years
- E3 Grade: Maximum 42 years
- E4 Grade: Maximum 47 years

**Educational Qualification (discipline-wise essential):**
- Mining: BE/BTech in Mining Engg. (For E4 – First Class Mine Manager’s Certificate mandatory)
- Geology: PG Degree in Geology / Applied Geology
- Environment Management: BE/BTech in Env. Engg. OR BE/BTech + PG Diploma/Degree in Env. Science/Management
- Safety & Fire Services: BE/BTech + PG Diploma/Degree in Safety OR BTech in Safety/Fire Engg.
- Electrical / Mechanical / Civil / Instrumentation: BE/BTech in relevant branch
- Systems: BE/BTech (IT/CS) or MCA
- Medical & Health Services: MBBS + PG Diploma / PG Degree (MS/MD/DNB)
- HR: Graduation + MBA (Personnel) / PG Diploma in PM & IR / Social Work
- Finance: CA / CMA (ICAI / ICMAI)
- Corporate Communication / Materials & Contracts: Graduation + PG Diploma / MBA in relevant field

**Post-Qualification Experience:**
- E2: 3 years
- E3: 6 years
- E4: 9 years

### Salary & Benefits
- E2 – Deputy Manager: ₹50,000 – ₹1,60,000 (Gross approx. ₹93,400/- PM)
- E3 – Manager: ₹60,000 – ₹1,80,000 (Gross approx. ₹1,12,080/- PM)
- E4 – Senior Manager: ₹70,000 – ₹2,00,000 (Gross approx. ₹1,30,760/- PM)
Selected candidates will also get DA, HRA, PF, Medical facilities, Gratuity, Performance Related Pay and other attractive benefits as per HCL rules.

### Selection Process
- Personal Interview (100% weightage)
- Document Verification

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official website www.hindustancopper.com → Career Section.
2. Register and login to the online application portal.
3. Fill all details correctly (qualification, experience, percentage of marks etc.).
4. Upload scanned photograph, signature and all supporting documents.
5. Pay the application fee (if applicable) through the payment gateway.
6. Submit the form and note the Application Number.
7. Take printout of the submitted application and acknowledgement for future reference.

### Important Links
- [Official Notification PDF](https://www.hindustancopper.com/career/notification.pdf)
- [Apply Online](https://www.hindustancopper.com/career)

### FAQs
**Q1. How many vacancies are announced in HCL Executive Recruitment 2026?**
A1. Total 70 vacancies have been announced in E2, E3 and E4 grades across various disciplines.

**Q2. What is the last date to apply for HCL Executive 2026?**
A2. The last date to apply online is 25 June 2026 (Midnight).

**Q3. What is the educational qualification required?**
A3. BE/BTech / PG Degree / MBA / CA / MBBS + PG as per the specific discipline (detailed in notification).

**Q4. What is the salary in HCL Executive Recruitment 2026?**
A4. Gross monthly salary ranges from ₹93,400 (E2) to ₹1,30,760 (E4) plus other allowances.

**Q5. What is the selection process for HCL Executive posts?**
A5. Personal Interview (100% weightage) followed by Document Verification.

**Q6. Is there any application fee exemption?**
A6. Yes, SC/ST/PwBD and Internal candidates are fully exempted from the application fee.

content:
## NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card Released

The National Testing Agency (NTA) has officially released the Admit Cards for the NEET UG 2026 Re-Examination. This is a critical update for all candidates who are eligible and registered for the re-exam. Access to the admit card is mandatory for appearing in the examination, and it contains vital information such as the candidate's details, exam center address, date, and time of the examination, along with important instructions.

### Important Dates
Candidates should take note of the following important dates related to the NEET UG 2026 Re-Examination:

| Event                      | Date                           |
| :------------------------- | :----------------------------- |
| Admit Card Release Date    | Released (as per notification) |
| NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Date  | To Be Announced Soon           |
| Result Declaration         | To Be Announced Soon           |

### Steps to Download NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card

Follow these instructions to successfully download your admit card:

1.  **Visit Official Website:** Navigate to the official National Testing Agency (NTA) NEET UG portal at `neet.nta.nic.in`.
2.  **Locate Admit Card Link:** On the homepage, find and click on the prominent link titled 'NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card Download'.
3.  **Login Credentials:** You will be prompted to enter your login details. Provide your Application Number and Date of Birth in the specified format.
4.  **Security Pin:** Enter the security pin (captcha) as displayed on the screen.
5.  **Submit and View:** Click on the 'Submit' or 'Login' button to access your admit card.
6.  **Download and Print:** Once your admit card appears, carefully verify all the details. Download the admit card and take multiple printouts for future reference and for carrying to the examination center.

### Exam Day Guidelines and Instructions

Adhering to the exam day guidelines is crucial for a smooth examination experience. Candidates must follow these instructions:

*   **Timely Arrival:** Reach the examination venue well before the gate closing time as specified on your admit card to complete necessary formalities.
*   **Admit Card:** Carry a clear printout of your NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card. Ensure the photograph affixed matches the one uploaded during registration.
*   **Valid ID Proof:** Bring a valid original photo identification card. Acceptable IDs include Aadhar Card, Passport, PAN Card, Driving License, or Voter ID.
*   **Photograph:** Carry an additional passport-size photograph (identical to the one used in the application form) to paste on the attendance sheet.
*   **Prohibited Items:** Do not carry any electronic gadgets (mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators), study material, or any other unauthorized items into the examination hall.
*   **Dress Code:** Follow the prescribed dress code guidelines mentioned in the official information bulletin, if any, to avoid any inconvenience at the entry gate.
*   **Invigilator Instructions:** Strictly follow all instructions given by the invigilators during the examination.

### Documents to Carry to the Exam Centre

Ensure you have the following documents ready for your examination day:

1.  **NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card:** A printed copy of your admit card with a passport-size photograph pasted on it.
2.  **Passport Size Photograph:** One additional passport-size photograph (same as uploaded on the application form) to be affixed on the attendance sheet.
3.  **Valid Photo ID Proof (Original):** Any one of the following: PAN Card, Driving License, Voter ID, Passport, Aadhaar Card (with photograph), E-Aadhaar, Ration Card, Aadhaar Enrolment No. with photo.
4.  **PwBD Certificate (if applicable):** Candidates claiming PwBD status must carry their valid PwBD certificate issued by the competent authority.

### Important Links

| Link Type                  | URL                               |
| :------------------------- | :-------------------------------- |
| Admit Card Download        | [https://neet.nta.nic.in/](https://neet.nta.nic.in/) |
| Official NTA NEET Website  | [https://neet.nta.nic.in/](https://neet.nta.nic.in/) |

content:
## NHSRCL Junior Engineer & Controller Recruitment 2026 – Apply Online for 175 Posts

National High Speed Rail Corporation Limited (NHSRCL) invites applications from Regular/Contractual employees working in Operations & Maintenance departments of Indian Railways, Government owned or operated Railways, Metro Railways, and RRTS for various Junior Engineer and Controller posts on Absorption Basis. The online application process starts from **15th June 2026** and closes on **14th July 2026 (11:59 PM)**.

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | No. of Vacancies |
|-----------|------------------|
| Junior Engineer (Civil/Track) / Facility Controller (Civil & Track) / Junior Engineer (Safety – Civil & Track) | 31 |
| Junior Engineer (Electrical) / Electric Power Controller / Junior Engineer (Safety – Electrical) | 47 |
| Junior Engineer (Signalling & Telecom) / Signalling & Telecom Controller / Junior Engineer (Safety – Signalling & Telecom) | 20 |
| Junior Engineer (Rolling Stock - Electrical) / Rolling Stock Controller / Junior Engineer (Safety – Rolling Stock) | 14 |
| Junior Engineer (Rolling Stock - Mechanical) | 03 |
| Train Manager / Station Manager / Depot Controller / Operations Controller / Junior Engineer (Safety – Operations) | 55 |
| Junior Engineer (Automatic Fare Collection (AFC) Systems) | 05 |
| **Total** | **175** |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Age Limit:** Maximum 45 Years.
- **Qualification & Experience:**
  - Essential Qualification: 03 Years Engineering Diploma / BE / B.Tech in relevant discipline from Government recognized University/Institute.
  - Experience: Minimum 03 years post-qualification experience in relevant field within Operations & Maintenance departments of Indian Railways / Government Railways / Metro Railways / RRTS.
  - Note: Experience of Teaching, Faculty, Apprenticeship, Internship, Proprietorship etc. will not be considered.

### Pay, Emoluments & Surety Bond
- **Pay Scale:** ₹40,000 – ₹1,25,000 (IDA Pay Scale NE-4) + Perks, HRA, Medical, EPF, Gratuity etc.
- **Surety Bond:** Selected candidates will have to execute a surety bond of ₹3,00,000/- to serve the corporation for a minimum period of 4 years.
- **Probation:** 1 Year

### Selection Process
The selection process consists of the following stages:
1. Computer Based Test (CBT)
2. Document Verification
3. Medical Examination

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| UR / EWS / OBC | ₹400/- (exclusive of transaction charges) |
| SC / ST / Women | Nil (Exempted) |

Payment Mode: Online only. Fee once paid will not be refunded under any circumstances.

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Opening Date for Online Registration | 15 June 2026 |
| Closing Date for Online Registration | 14 July 2026 (up to 11:59 PM) |

### How to Apply
Eligible candidates must apply online only. The steps are as follows:
1. Visit the official Apply Online link and register.
2. Fill the online application form carefully.
3. Upload scanned copies of required documents (Photograph, Signature, Educational & Experience Certificates, NOC from current employer, etc.).
4. Pay the application fee online (if applicable) and submit the form.
5. Take a printout of the system-generated application form for future reference.

### Important Links
- **Detailed Notification PDF:** [Click Here](#)
- **Apply Online Link:** [Click Here](#)

### FAQs
**Q1: What is the total number of vacancies in NHSRCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026?**
A: 175 Posts.

**Q2: What is the age limit for NHSRCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026?**
A: Maximum 45 Years.

**Q3: What is the pay scale in NHSRCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026?**
A: ₹40,000 – ₹1,25,000 (IDA Pay Scale NE-4).

**Q4: What is the selection process for NHSRCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026?**
A: Computer Based Test (CBT) + Document Verification + Medical Examination.

**Q5: What is the last date for NHSRCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026?**
A: 14 July 2026 (up to 11:59 PM).

**Q6: Who can apply for NHSRCL Junior Engineer Recruitment 2026?**
A: Regular/Contractual employees working in Operations & Maintenance departments of Indian Railways, Metro Railways or RRTS with minimum 3 years relevant experience.
