content:
## Indian Navy Agniveer Apprentice Recruitment 2026 – 01/2027 & 02/2027 Batch

The Indian Navy has announced the Agniveer (Apprentice) recruitment under the Agnipath Scheme for Engineering and Electrical streams. This is a great opportunity for diploma holders to serve the nation and gain valuable experience.

### Application Fee

| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates (Stage-I INET) | ₹550 + 18% GST |
| Sponsor Candidates & NCC 'C' Certificate Holders | Exempted from INET |

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Application Window Opens (Stage-I INET 2/2026) | 05 June 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply Online | 29 June 2026 (17:00 hours) |
| Correction Window | 06 July 2026 |
| Stage-I INET Examination | August 2026 |
| Stage-II for 01/2027 Batch | October 2026 |
| Induction at INS Chilka (01/2027 Batch) | December 2026 |
| Stage-II for 02/2027 Batch | March 2027 |
| Induction at INS Chilka (02/2027 Batch) | May 2027 |

### Post Details & Qualifications

| Post Name | Stream | Trades / Diploma Disciplines |
|-----------|--------|------------------------------|
| Agniveer (Apprentice) – Engineering | Engineering | Marine Engineering & Systems, Mechanical, Production/Automobile, Refrigeration & AC, Power Plant, Mechatronics, Metallurgy, Instrumentation, Electronics Instrumentation & Control, Industrial/Production, Maintenance |
| Agniveer (Apprentice) – Electrical | Electrical | Electrical, Electronics & Communication, Instrumentation Technology, Electronics & Control Engineering, Electrical & Electronics |

### Age Limit

- **01/2027 Batch:** Born between 01 Dec 2004 – 31 May 2009
- **02/2027 Batch:** Born between 01 May 2005 – 31 Oct 2009

### Pay Package & Benefits

| Year | Customised Package (Monthly) | In Hand (70%) | Agniveer Corpus (30%) | GoI Contribution to Corpus |
|------|------------------------------|---------------|-----------------------|----------------------------|
| 1st Year | ₹30,000 | ₹21,000 | ₹9,000 | ₹9,000 |
| 2nd Year | ₹33,000 | ₹23,100 | ₹9,900 | ₹9,900 |
| 3rd Year | ₹36,500 | ₹25,550 | ₹10,950 | ₹10,950 |
| 4th Year | ₹40,000 | ₹28,000 | ₹12,000 | ₹12,000 |

**Total Seva Nidhi Corpus on completion:** ₹10.04 Lakhs

Additional benefits: Risk & Hardship Allowance, Dress Allowance, Travel Allowance, ₹48 Lakh Life Insurance Cover, Death/Disability Ex-gratia, Medical facilities, 30 days leave per year and CSD facilities. No pension or gratuity applicable.

### Selection Process

1. **Stage-I:** Indian Navy Entrance Test (INET 2/2026) – Computer Based Test
2. **Stage-II:** Physical Fitness Test (PFT) + Written Examination + Recruitment Medical Examination
3. **Stage-III:** Pre-Enrolment Medical Examination at INS Chilka

### Exam Pattern (Stage-I INET)

- **Mode:** Computer Based Test
- **Total Questions:** 100 (1 mark each)
- **Duration:** 1 Hour
- **Sections:** English & General Awareness, Science, Mathematics, Diploma (Trade Specific)
- **Negative Marking:** 0.25 marks per wrong answer
- **Passing Criteria:** Must pass in all sections and in aggregate

### Physical Fitness Test (PFT) Standards

| Test | Standard |
|------|----------|
| 1.6 Km Run | 06 minutes 30 seconds |
| Squats (Uthak Baithak) | 20 |
| Push-ups | 15 |
| Bent Knee Sit-ups | 15 |

### How to Apply

1. Visit the official website [https://joinindiannavy.gov.in](https://joinindiannavy.gov.in).
2. Click on “Register” and register as AVR (Apprentice).
3. Login and select INET 2/2026 → Agniveer (Apprentice).
4. Fill all personal, educational and preference details carefully.
5. Upload recent passport-size photograph (taken after May 2026).
6. Pay the application fee online.
7. Submit the form and take printout of the confirmation page.

Correction window will be available after closing date.

### Important Links

- **Official Notification:** Not yet available (short notification released)
- **Apply Online:** [https://joinindiannavy.gov.in](https://joinindiannavy.gov.in)

### FAQs

**Q1. How many vacancies are announced?**
A1. Exact number of vacancies will be notified later as per service requirement for Engineering and Electrical streams.

**Q2. What is the last date to apply?**
A2. The last date to submit online application is 29 June 2026 (17:00 hours).

**Q3. What is the educational qualification required?**
A3. Matriculation with 50% marks + 3-Year Diploma in relevant Engineering/Electrical trade from AICTE-recognised Polytechnic Institute with 50% marks.

**Q4. What is the monthly pay package?**
A4. ₹30,000 in 1st year increasing to ₹40,000 in 4th year + ₹10.04 Lakh Seva Nidhi Corpus on completion.

**Q5. What is the selection process?**
A5. Stage-I INET → Stage-II (PFT + Written Exam + Medical) → Pre-Enrolment Medical at INS Chilka.

**Q6. Who is eligible to apply?**
A6. Only unmarried Indian male candidates meeting the age and educational criteria.

- **Educational Qualification:** Three-year full-time diploma in relevant engineering discipline from AICTE/Government approved institution.
- **Age Limit:** 18 to 30 years (age relaxation as per government rules).

### How to Apply

1. Visit the official website of the respective organization.
2. Go to the 'Recruitment' or 'Careers' section.

### Frequently Asked Questions

**1. What are the educational qualifications required for diploma recruitment in public sector companies?**
The Candidates should possess a three-year full-time diploma or a 10+2 qualification followed by a two-year diploma in an engineering discipline from institutions or universities approved by AICTE or the Government.

**2. Which government public sector companies recruit diploma holders?**
The Companies like BHEL, BEL, Coal India, HPCL, EIL, BPCL, Mazagon Dock, MECON, NACL, NLC, NMDC, SAIL, NTPC, IOCL, ONGC, Power Grid, Railtel, RITES, and UCI are among those that recruit diploma holders.

**3. In which engineering fields are diploma holders sought after by PSUs?**
Diploma holders are sought in various engineering fields such as Electrical, Mechanical, Electronics, Civil, Computer Science, Electronics & Communication, and Chemical Engineering.

**4. Are there opportunities for both fresher and experienced diploma holders in government jobs?**
Yes, both Navaratna companies and other PSUs offer positions for freshers as well as experienced candidates.

meta_title: BRO GREF Recruitment 2026 for 899 Group C Posts 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: The Border Roads Organisation (BRO), operating under the Ministry of Defence, has announced a significant recruitment drive for 899 various Group 'C' posts
content:
### BRO GREF Recruitment 2026: Key Details and How to Apply

The Border Roads Organisation (BRO) under the Ministry of Defence, General Reserve Engineer Force (GREF), has issued Advertisement No. 01/2026 for the direct recruitment of 899 various Group 'C' posts. This presents a remarkable opportunity for eligible Male Indian Nationals to join a prestigious organization dedicated to building and maintaining road networks in border areas.

---

#### 1. Vacancy Details

A total of 899 Group 'C' posts are available. The distribution of vacancies across different positions is as follows:

| Post Name                           | Total Vacancies |
| :---------------------------------- | :-------------- |
| Draughtsman                         | 42              |
| Hindi Typist                        | 10              |
| Store Keeper Technical (SKT)        | 300             |
| Operator Communication              | 261             |
| Operator Excavating Machinery (OEM) | 207             |
| Electrician                         | 79              |
| **Total**                           | **899**         |

**Category-wise Vacancies:**

| Post Name                           | Gen | SC | ST | OBC | EWS | Total |
| :---------------------------------- | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :-: | :---: |
| Draughtsman                         | 24  | 05 | 02 | 10  | 01  | 42    |
| Hindi Typist                        | 04  | 01 | 01 | 04  | 00  | 10    |
| Store Keeper Technical (SKT)        | 151 | 43 | 22 | 77  | 07  | 300   |
| Operator Communication              | 114 | 41 | 18 | 83  | 05  | 261   |
| Operator Excavating Machinery (OEM) | 135 | 20 | 15 | 35  | 02  | 207   |
| Electrician                         | 38  | 10 | 09 | 19  | 03  | 79    |

---

#### 2. Eligibility Criteria & Qualifications

Applicants must meet the specified educational qualifications and experience for their chosen post. Only Male Indian Nationals are eligible to apply.

*   **Age Limit:** Candidates must be between **18 to 27 years** of age. Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government of India rules for reserved categories.

*   **Post-wise Qualifications:**

    *   **Draughtsman:**
        *   10+2 with Science subjects from a recognized Board and a 2-year Certificate in Architecture/Draughtsmanship from a recognized institute; OR
        *   2-year National Trade Certificate (NTC) in Draughtsman (Civil) with 1 year practical experience.
    *   **Hindi Typist:**
        *   10+2 from a recognized Board or equivalent and Hindi typing speed of 30 WPM on computer (9000 KDPH).
    *   **Store Keeper Technical (SKT):**
        *   10+2 from a recognized Board or equivalent with knowledge of storekeeping related to vehicles or engineering equipment.
        *   Desirable: 3 years experience in stores establishment; OR Passed Class II Course for Storeman Technical from Defence establishments.
    *   **Operator (Communication):**
        *   Matriculation from a recognized Board and Wireless Operator/Radio Mechanic Certificate from ITI or equivalent; OR
        *   Defence Trade Certificate with knowledge of Radio Technology; OR
        *   Passed Class I Course for Wireless Operator & Key Board from Defence establishments.
    *   **OEM (OG) - Operator Excavating Machinery:**
        *   Matriculation from a recognized Board and Heavy Motor Vehicle (HMV) Driving Licence; OR
        *   Dozer/Excavator Driving Licence with 6 months experience; OR
        *   Passed Class II Course of Operator Excavating Machinery from Defence establishments.
    *   **Electrician:**
        *   Matriculation from a recognized Board and Auto Electrician Certificate from ITI or equivalent with 1 year experience as Electrician; OR
        *   Passed Electrician Class II Course from Defence establishments.

---

#### 3. Salary Details

Selected candidates will be compensated as per the **7th CPC Pay Matrix**, with the specific Level determined by the respective post.

---

#### 4. Selection Process

The selection process for BRO GREF Group C posts involves multiple stages to assess candidates' suitability:

1.  **Written Examination:** A crucial stage to evaluate candidates' knowledge.
2.  **Physical Efficiency Test (PET):** To assess physical fitness and endurance.
3.  **Skill Test / Trade Test:** Applicable for specific posts to evaluate practical skills.
4.  **Primary Medical Examination (PME):** To ensure candidates meet the required medical standards.
5.  **Document Verification:** Final verification of all submitted documents and credentials.

---

#### 5. Application Fee

Candidates are required to pay a non-refundable application fee as detailed below. Payment must be made online through SBI Collect.

| Category             | Application Fee |
| :------------------- | :-------------- |
| General / OBC / EWS  | ₹50/-           |
| SC / ST              | Nil (Exempted)  |

**Payment Mode:** Through SBI Collect (online).

---

#### 6. Important Dates & Schedule

Keep track of these essential dates for the BRO GREF Recruitment 2026:

| Event                                        | Date             |
| :------------------------------------------- | :--------------- |
| Opening Date of Notification                 | 21 May 2026      |
| Last Date for Submission of Application      | 04 July 2026     |
| Last Date for Submission of Application (For Far-flung Areas) | 19 July 2026     |
| Online Application Start Date                | To be Announced  |

*Note: The online application link will be activated soon on the official website.*

---

#### 7. How to Apply

Eligible Male Indian citizens must apply online through the official Border Roads Organisation (BRO) website. Follow these steps carefully once the application portal is active:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to `bro.gov.in` and navigate to the "Recruitment" or "Careers" section.
2.  **Registration:** Register yourself by providing a valid email address and mobile number.
3.  **Fill Application Form:** Complete the online application form with all required personal, educational, and other relevant details.
4.  **Upload Documents & Pay Fee:** Upload scanned copies of necessary documents (photograph, signature, certificates, etc.) as per specifications. Pay the application fee (if applicable) through the SBI Collect payment gateway.
5.  **Submit & Print:** Review your application thoroughly before final submission. After successful submission, take a printout of the completed application form for your records and future reference.

content:
## BPSC Factory Inspector Document Verification Schedule 2026

The Bihar Public Service Commission (BPSC) has officially released the Document Verification (DV) schedule for candidates provisionally shortlisted for the Factory Inspector position. This is a crucial stage for all eligible candidates to confirm their credentials and move forward in the recruitment process.

### Document Verification Dates & Timings

Candidates are advised to check their specific roll numbers against the schedule to ascertain their exact DV date and reporting shift. The document verification process will commence from July 7, 2026, and conclude on August 24, 2026. Detailed shift timings will be specified in the official notification.

| Event                     | Start Date   | End Date     |
| :------------------------ | :----------- | :----------- |
| Document Verification (DV) | July 07, 2026 | August 24, 2026 |

### Essential Documents Required for Verification

It is mandatory for all candidates to bring the following original documents along with self-attested photocopies for the Document Verification process. Failure to produce any required document may lead to disqualification.

*   **Educational Certificates:** Original mark sheets and certificates for Matriculation (10th), Intermediate (12th), Graduation, and any other relevant higher educational qualifications as per the post's eligibility criteria.
*   **Experience Certificates:** If applicable, original experience certificates detailing the nature of work, period of employment, and employer's seal and signature.
*   **Caste Certificate:** For candidates belonging to SC/ST/EBC/BC categories, a valid caste certificate issued by the competent authority in the prescribed format.
*   **EWS Certificate:** For Economically Weaker Section (EWS) candidates, a valid EWS certificate issued by the competent authority.
*   **Disability Certificate:** For Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD) candidates, a valid disability certificate issued by the competent medical board.
*   **Identity Proof:** Original Photo ID proof (Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID, Passport, Driving License).
*   **Photographs:** Recent passport-size photographs (as specified in the original application or DV notification).
*   **BPSC Application Form/Admit Card:** A copy of the original application form submitted for the Factory Inspector post and the admit card for the written examination.
*   **No Objection Certificate (NOC):** If currently employed in a government/semi-government organization, a No Objection Certificate from the current employer.
*   **Other Relevant Documents:** Any other documents as mentioned in the official DV schedule notification.

### Important Instructions for Document Verification

*   **Punctuality:** Candidates must report at the designated venue on their scheduled date and time. Latecomers may not be entertained.
*   **Carry Originals and Photocopies:** Ensure all original documents are carried along with a set of self-attested photocopies.
*   **Verification of Details:** All details filled in the application form will be cross-verified with the original documents. Any discrepancy may lead to cancellation of candidature.
*   **COVID-19 Guidelines:** Adhere to all prevailing COVID-19 safety protocols, including wearing masks, maintaining social distancing, and using hand sanitizers.
*   **Official Notification:** Candidates are strongly advised to regularly check the official BPSC website for any updates or changes regarding the DV schedule.

meta_description: The National Testing Agency (NTA) has released the Admit Cards for the NEET (UG) 2026 Re-Examination. This is a crucial update for all candidates who are e
content:
## NEET UG Re-Exam 2026 Admit Card Released

The National Testing Agency (NTA) has officially announced the release of Admit Cards for the NEET (UG) 2026 Re-Examination. This vital document is now available for download for all eligible candidates gearing up to appear for this significant medical entrance test. Candidates are strongly advised to download their admit cards without delay and thoroughly check all details mentioned therein to avoid any last-minute issues.

### Important Dates for NEET UG Re-Exam 2026

Candidates should keep track of the following crucial dates for the NEET UG Re-Examination:

| Event                      | Date                  |
| :------------------------- | :-------------------- |
| NEET UG Re-Exam Admit Card Release | Available Now         |
| NEET UG Re-Exam Date       | To Be Announced Shortly |
| NEET UG Re-Exam Result     | To Be Announced       |

### Steps to Download Your NEET UG Re-Exam Admit Card

Follow these simple, step-by-step instructions to download your NEET UG Re-Exam Admit Card:

1.  **Access the Official Portal:** Begin by navigating to the official website of the National Testing Agency's NEET (UG) at `https://neet.nta.nic.in/`.
2.  **Find the Download Link:** On the homepage, look for a prominent link labeled 'NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card' or similar. This link is usually found in the 'Candidate Activity' section.
3.  **Click to Proceed:** Click on the designated admit card download link, which will take you to a new login page.
4.  **Enter Your Credentials:** You will be prompted to enter your unique 'Application Number' and 'Date of Birth' (or 'Password') as provided during your application submission. Ensure these details are accurate.
5.  **View Your Admit Card:** After entering the required information, click the 'Submit' or 'Login' button. Your NEET UG Re-Exam Admit Card will be displayed on your screen.
6.  **Download and Print:** Carefully review all the information displayed on your admit card, including your personal details, exam center, and timing. Download the PDF file and take at least two clear printouts on an A4 sheet. It is recommended to print in color for better clarity.

### Essential Exam Day Guidelines and Instructions

All candidates appearing for the NEET UG Re-Examination must strictly adhere to the following guidelines to ensure a fair and organized testing environment:

*   **Admit Card Mandatory:** You must carry a printed copy of your NEET UG 2026 Re-Exam Admit Card with a clearly visible recent passport-size photograph (preferably the same as uploaded in the application form) affixed in the designated space.
*   **Valid Photo ID:** Bring one original, valid photo identification proof (such as an Aadhaar Card, Passport, PAN Card, Driving License, or Voter ID). Photocopies or digital images of ID will not be accepted.
*   **Additional Photograph:** Carry one extra passport-size photograph (same as uploaded on the application form) to be affixed on the attendance sheet at the examination center.
*   **Prohibited Items:** Strictly avoid bringing any electronic gadgets (mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, Bluetooth devices), study materials, eatables, or any other unauthorized items into the examination hall. There will be no facility for safekeeping of personal belongings.
*   **Dress Code Compliance:** Follow the prescribed NEET dress code. Candidates should avoid wearing full-sleeve clothes, elaborate jewelry, or shoes with thick soles. Light and simple clothing is advised.
*   **Reporting Time:** Arrive at the examination center well before the GATE CLOSING TIME specified on your admit card to allow ample time for frisking, biometric verification, and other necessary formalities.
*   **Rough Work:** All rough work must be confined to the space provided in the Test Booklet. No separate rough sheets will be permitted.
*   **COVID-19 Protocols:** Observe all current COVID-19 guidelines, including wearing a face mask, maintaining social distancing, and using hand sanitizer as recommended.

### Documents Required on Exam Day

Ensure you have the following ready before leaving for the examination center:

1.  Printed copy of NEET UG Re-Exam 2026 Admit Card with an affixed passport-size photograph.
2.  One original, valid photo identification proof.
3.  One additional passport-size photograph (to be affixed on the attendance sheet at the center).
4.  PwBD certificate (if applicable, for Persons with Benchmark Disabilities).

### Important Links

*   **Official NEET (UG) Website:** [https://neet.nta.nic.in/](https://neet.nta.nic.in/)
*   **National Testing Agency (NTA) Website:** [https://nta.ac.in/](https://nta.ac.in/)

| Trade Apprentice - NPCIL MAPS              | 124             | 30/06/2026            |
| Junior Draughtsman (Civil), Tracer & Other Posts – OSSC | 500+            | 02/07/2026            |
| Trade Apprentice - NPCIL MAPS              | 124             | 30/06/2026            |
| Various Posts - JKSSB                      | 130             | 21/07/2026            |

*(Note: The dates provided above are based on the latest available information. Candidates are advised to refer to individual official notifications for exact and updated timelines.)*

#### Application Fee Details

The application fees for various ITI government jobs can differ significantly based on the recruiting organization and the specific post. Candidates are strongly advised to check the official notification for each desired vacancy to ascertain the exact fee structure, payment methods, and any applicable fee exemptions for reserved categories.

| Category               | Application Fee (Likely Range) |
| :--------------------- | :----------------------------- |
| General / OBC          | ₹100 - ₹500 (Varies)          |
| SC / ST / PwBD / Female | Exempted / ₹50 - ₹250 (Varies) |

*(Note: These are indicative ranges. Please consult the specific official job notification for precise fee details.)*

#### Post-wise Qualification Details

Candidates applying for these ITI government jobs must meet the specific educational and technical qualifications as stipulated by the recruiting authority. Generally, the minimum qualification requires:

*   **Educational Qualification:** Minimum 8th Standard or Matriculation (10th Class) Pass from a recognized board.
*   **Technical Qualification:** A valid Industrial Training Institute (ITI) / National Council for Vocational Training (NCVT) / National Trade Certificate (NTC) / National Apprenticeship Certificate (NAC) in the relevant trade from a recognized institution.
*   **Common Trades Include:** Fitter, Welder, Moulder, PASAA, Plumber, Electronics, Electrical, Machinist, Mechanic, DEO, Dairying, Photographer, Upholster, Building Maintenance, Carpenter, Computer Operator Programming Assistant, Draftsman (Civil/Mechanical), Refrigeration and Air Conditioning Mechanic, Electroplater, Painter, Pump Mechanic, Wire-man, Turner, Black Smith, and others.

#### Age Limit Criteria

The age limits for ITI government jobs vary depending on the specific post and recruiting organization. Typically, candidates should be between 18 and 30 years of age, with relaxations provided for reserved categories (SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen) as per government rules. Applicants must refer to the individual official notification for precise age criteria applicable to their chosen post.

#### How to Apply for ITI Government Jobs 2026

Follow these steps to successfully apply for the various ITI vacancies:

1.  **Review Official Notifications:** Carefully read the official notification for the specific post you wish to apply for. This document contains detailed information on eligibility criteria, application process, fees, and important dates.
2.  **Visit Official Portal:** Navigate to the official website of the recruiting organization or the designated application portal. For many apprenticeship opportunities, candidates may also register and apply through the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship's official website: [www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in](https://www.apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/).
3.  **Registration:** If you are a new user, register on the portal by providing essential details like name, email ID, and mobile number. A registration ID and password will be generated.
4.  **Fill Application Form:** Log in using your credentials and proceed to fill out the online application form. Provide all mandatory personal, educational, and technical qualification details accurately.
5.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of required documents such as photographs, signatures, ITI/NCVT certificates, educational mark sheets, caste certificates (if applicable), etc., in the specified format and size.
6.  **Pay Application Fee:** Pay the requisite application fee, if any, through the online payment gateway (Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI) or as specified in the notification.
7.  **Submit and Print:** After reviewing all details, submit the application form. Download and print a copy of the submitted application form for your records.

Candidates are strongly advised to keep a close watch on the official websites for updates, admit card releases, and result announcements. Don't miss this opportunity to build a promising career in the government sector!

title: Daily Current Affairs – 25 June 2026
overview: Stay updated with the most important current affairs of 25 June 2026. This daily digest covers key topics such as India's top position in ship recycling, GRSE achieving Navratna status, launch of four policing apps, India's 13th rank in QS Skills Index, new TReDS directions, and the birthday of Nobel laureate François Englert. Essential for all competitive exams including UPSC, SSC, Banking, and State PSCs.
eligibility: Open to all candidates preparing for government exams.

meta_description: Stay updated with the most important current affairs of 25 June 2026. This daily digest covers key topics such as India's top position in ship recycling, G
content:
## Daily Current Affairs – 25 June 2026

### National News
- **India Tops Ship Recycling**: India has emerged as the global leader in ship recycling, accounting for over 30% of the world's ship recycling volume. This achievement highlights the country's commitment to sustainable practices and the 'Blue Economy'.
- **GRSE Attains Navratna Status**: Garden Reach Shipbuilders & Engineers Ltd (GRSE) has been granted Navratna status by the Government of India, making it the first shipbuilding company to receive this prestigious recognition.
- **Four Policing Apps Launched**: The Ministry of Home Affairs launched four new policing applications aimed at enhancing law enforcement capabilities: e-Beat Book, e-FIR, e-Search, and e-Surveillance.

### International News
- **QS Skills Index 2026**: India ranks 13th globally in the QS Skills Index, reflecting improvements in vocational training and skill development programs.
- **TReDS Directions**: The Reserve Bank of India issued new directions for Trade Receivables Discounting System (TReDS) to boost liquidity for MSMEs.

### Science & Technology
- **François Englert's Birthday**: Celebrated physicist and Nobel laureate François Englert, known for his work on the Higgs mechanism, was born on this day.

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| India Tops Ship Recycling | 25 June 2026 |
| GRSE Navratna Status | 25 June 2026 |
| Policing Apps Launch | 25 June 2026 |
| QS Skills Index Release | 25 June 2026 |
| TReDS Directions | 25 June 2026 |

### Key Takeaways for Exams
- **Ship Recycling**: India's share >30%, major yards in Alang, Gujarat.
- **Navratna Status**: GRSE is the first shipbuilder to get it.
- **QS Skills Index**: India 13th, top rank goes to Switzerland.
- **TReDS**: Platform for discounting invoices of MSMEs.

Stay tuned for more daily updates to ace your competitive exams!

meta_description: The Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) has announced the Jharkhand Technical/Special Qualification Graduate Level Combined Competitive Examination
content:
## JSSC JTGLCCE Recruitment 2026 – 611 Vacancies

The Jharkhand Staff Selection Commission (JSSC) has released Advertisement No. 01/2026 for the Jharkhand Technical/Special Qualification Graduate Level Combined Competitive Examination (JTGLCCE) 2026. Online applications are invited for 611 regular vacancies across 10 posts. Below are the complete details.

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Vacancies |
|-----------|-----------|
| Assistant Entomologist, Vector-Borne Disease Control Programme | 2 |
| Assistant Vector-Borne Disease Control Officer | 4 |
| Inspector, Vector-Borne Disease Control Programme | 42 |
| Block Statistical Supervisor / Junior Statistical Assistant / Investigator | 228 |
| Dairy Technical Officer | 72 |
| Fishery Extension Supervisor | 78 |
| Auditor | 145 |
| Junior Scientific Assistant, State Drug Testing Laboratory | 6 |
| Laboratory Assistant (Physics) | 17 |
| Laboratory Assistant (Chemistry) | 17 |

### Eligibility Criteria
| Post Name | Age Limit (as on 01.08.2025) | Qualification |
|-----------|------------------------------|---------------|
| Assistant Entomologist | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Post Graduate in Life Sciences (Entomology) |
| Assistant Vector-Borne Disease Control Officer | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Graduate in Science |
| Inspector, Vector-Borne Disease Control Programme | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Graduate in Science |
| Block Statistical Supervisor / Junior Statistical Assistant | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Graduate with Mathematics / Economics / Statistics |
| Dairy Technical Officer | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Degree in Dairy Technology / Dairy Science |
| Fishery Extension Supervisor | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Degree in Fishery Science / Zoology (Honours) |
| Auditor | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Graduate in Mathematics / Economics / Commerce / Statistics |
| Junior Scientific Assistant | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Degree/PG in Pharmacy, Biochemistry or Medicine + 6 months lab experience |
| Laboratory Assistant (Physics) | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Bachelor’s Degree in Physics (Honours) |
| Laboratory Assistant (Chemistry) | 21-35/37/38/40 years | Bachelor’s Degree in Chemistry (Honours) |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| UR / EWS / OBC / Other States | ₹100 |
| Jharkhand SC / ST | ₹50 |
| PwD (Jharkhand) | NIL |
*Payment Mode: Online only*

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Opening Date for Online Registration | 01 June 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Registration | 30 June 2026 |
| Last Date for Fee Payment & Upload | 03 July 2026 |
| Correction Window | 05 July to 10 July 2026 |

### Selection Process
The selection will be done through two stages of Computer Based Test:
- **Preliminary Examination (Qualifying):** 120 MCQs (General Studies, Jharkhand GK, Maths, Science, Mental Ability)
- **Main Examination:** 3 Papers (Hindi, Tribal/Regional Language, Technical + GS)
Final merit will be prepared on the basis of Paper-2 and Paper-3 of the Main Exam.

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official JSSC website: [https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in/](https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in/)
2. Click on the online application link for JTGLCCE-2026.
3. Register with a valid email ID and mobile number.
4. Fill in the application form with personal, educational, and other details.
5. Upload scanned photograph, signature, and required documents.
6. Pay the application fee online.
7. Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

### Important Links
- **Detailed Notification PDF:** [Click Here](#)
- **Apply Online Link:** [Click Here](#)
- **Official Website:** [https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in/](https://jssc.jharkhand.gov.in/)

### FAQs
**Q1: What is the total number of vacancies in JSSC JTGLCCE Recruitment 2026?**
A: 611 regular posts (Advertisement No. 01/2026).

**Q2: What is the last date to apply for JSSC JTGLCCE 2026?**
A: 30 June 2026.

**Q3: What is the application fee for JSSC JTGLCCE Recruitment?**
A: ₹100 (UR/EWS/OBC), ₹50 (Jharkhand SC/ST), NIL for PwD of Jharkhand.

**Q4: What is the selection process for JSSC JTGLCCE 2026?**
A: Preliminary CBT + Main Examination (3 Papers).

**Q5: What is the age limit for JSSC JTGLCCE Recruitment 2026?**
A: Minimum 21 years. Upper age varies from 35 to 40 years as on 01.08.2025 with relaxation.

**Q6: Is there any negative marking in the exam?**
A: Yes, 1 mark will be deducted for each wrong answer in Preliminary Exam.

5. Send it by Speed Post / Registered Post / Courier to: **Chief Medical Officer, Medical Department, MbPA Hospital, Nadkarni Park, Wadala (East), Mumbai – 400037**, so as to reach on or before **29 June 2026**.

- Official Notification: Not available as direct PDF link.

## GSSSB Sub Accountant / Sub Auditor Recruitment 2026 – 776 Posts

### Application Fee
| Category | Preliminary Exam Fee | Main Exam Fee | Total Fee |
|----------|---------------------|---------------|-----------|
| General / EWS | ₹500 | ₹500 | ₹1000 |
| SC / ST / SEBC / PwBD | ₹400 | ₹400 | ₹800 |
| Ex-Servicemen | Nil | Nil | Nil |
*Fee is non-refundable and can be paid online via debit/credit card or net banking.*

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Start of Online Application | 02 June 2026 (14:00 hours) |
| Last Date for Online Application | 30 June 2026 (23:59 hours) |
| Last Date for Fee Payment | 02 July 2026 (23:59 hours) |
| Age Limit Calculated As On | 30 November 2025 |
| Educational Qualification Cut-off | 30 June 2026 |

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Total Vacancies |
|-----------|----------------|
| Sub Accountant / Sub Auditor (Class-3) | 671 |
| Accountant / Auditor / Deputy Treasury Officer / Inspector (Class-3) | 105 |
| **Grand Total** | **776** |
*Detailed category-wise and gender-wise breakup along with PwBD reservation is available in the official notification.*

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Age Limit:** 20-35 years as on 30.11.2025. Relaxation: SC/ST/SEBC/EWS – 5 years; PwBD – 10 years (max 45 years); Ex-Servicemen – as per rules.
- **Educational Qualification:** Bachelor’s Degree in BBA / BCA / B.Com / B.Sc (Mathematics or Statistics) / BA (Statistics / Economics / Mathematics) or equivalent from a recognized university. B.Sc (CA & IT) and M.Sc (CA & IT) are NOT eligible.
- **Other Requirements:** Basic knowledge of computer; sufficient knowledge of Gujarati and Hindi.

### Selection Process
1. Preliminary Examination (Objective Type – Screening)
2. Main Examination (Descriptive / Written)
3. Document Verification
*Final merit will be prepared based on marks obtained in the Main Examination.*

### Pay Scale & Salary Structure
| Post | Fixed Pay (First 5 Years Probation) | Regular Pay Scale (After 5 Years) |
|------|-------------------------------------|-----------------------------------|
| Sub Accountant / Sub Auditor | ₹26,000 per month | Level-4: ₹25,500 – ₹81,100 |
| Accountant / Auditor / Deputy Treasury Officer / Inspector | ₹49,600 per month | Level-7: ₹39,900 – ₹1,26,600 |
*Other allowances as per Gujarat Government rules will be admissible after confirmation.*

### How to Apply
1. Visit the OJAS portal: https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in
2. Click on “Online Application” and select the relevant advertisement.
3. Register with a valid mobile number and email ID (new candidates).
4. Fill all personal, educational, and category details carefully.
5. Upload scanned photograph, signature, and required documents.
6. Pay the prescribed application fee online.
7. Submit the form and note down the Confirmation Number.
8. Take a printout of the submitted application for future reference.

### Important Links
- **Official Notification PDF:** [Download PDF](#) (Link not available)
- **Corrigendum Notice:** [View Corrigendum](#) (Link not available)
- **Apply Online:** [https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in](https://ojas.gujarat.gov.in)
- **GSSSB Official Website:** [https://gsssb.gujarat.gov.in](https://gsssb.gujarat.gov.in)

### FAQs
**Q1. How many vacancies are announced in GSSSB Sub Accountant Recruitment 2026?**
A1. Total 776 vacancies have been announced after correction (671 Sub Accountant / Sub Auditor + 105 Accountant / Auditor etc.).

**Q2. What is the last date to apply for GSSSB Sub Accountant 2026?**
A2. The last date for online application is 30 June 2026 (23:59 hours).

**Q3. What is the educational qualification required?**
A3. Bachelor’s Degree in BBA / BCA / B.Com / B.Sc (Mathematics or Statistics) / BA (Statistics / Economics / Mathematics) or equivalent.

**Q4. What is the salary in GSSSB Sub Accountant posts?**
A4. Fixed pay of ₹26,000 (Sub Accountant) / ₹49,600 (Accountant) during first 5 years probation, then regular Level-4 / Level-7 pay scale.

**Q5. What is the selection process?**
A5. Preliminary Examination → Main Examination → Document Verification.

**Q6. Do previously applied candidates need to re-apply?**
A6. No, candidates who had applied successfully in November 2025 do not need to re-apply.

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Start of Online Application | 06 June 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply | 13 July 2026 (17:00 hours) |
| Hall Ticket Download | 7 days prior to exam |
| Tentative Exam Date | October 2026 |

### Vacancy Details
- **Post Name:** Assistant Executive Engineer (Civil)
- **Total Vacancies:** 222
- **Department:** Roads & Buildings Department
- **Job Location:** Telangana (Multi Zone)

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Educational Qualification:** Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University/Institution or AMIE.

   - Paper-II: Civil Engineering (Degree Level) (300 marks, 150 minutes)

A3. Bachelor’s Degree in Civil Engineering from a recognized University / Institution or AMIE.

A4. Rs. 54,220 – 1,33,630/- (Revised Pay Scale).

A5. Written Examination (Paper-I: General Studies & General Abilities + Paper-II: Civil Engineering) followed by Document Verification.

content:
## OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026: Apply Online from July 3rd

The Odisha Public Service Commission (OPSC) is gearing up to invite applications for the Language Officer positions in 2026. This recruitment drive offers a golden opportunity for individuals passionate about language and dedicated to serving the state of Odisha. Prospective applicants should mark their calendars as the online application window is set to open on July 3rd, 2026.

It is highly recommended that candidates thoroughly review the official notification once it is released on the OPSC website to understand all aspects of the recruitment process, including detailed eligibility criteria, selection process, examination pattern, and syllabus.

### Important Dates & Schedule

Stay updated with these crucial dates for the OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026:

| Event                           | Date / Period               |
| :------------------------------ | :-------------------------- |
| Official Notification Release   | To be announced shortly     |
| Online Application Start Date   | 2026-07-03                  |
| Online Application End Date     | To be announced             |
| Application Fee Last Date       | To be announced             |
| Admit Card Release              | To be announced             |
| Written Examination Date        | To be announced             |
| Result Declaration              | To be announced             |

### Vacancy Details

The exact number of vacancies for Language Officer posts will be specified in the detailed official notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the official OPSC website for an updated vacancy breakdown category-wise once the full advertisement is released.

### Application Fee

The application fee for OPSC recruitment drives typically varies based on the category of the applicant. The fee details for the Language Officer post are expected to be as follows:

| Category                                 | Application Fee (INR) |
| :--------------------------------------- | :-------------------- |
| General / SEBC                           | To be announced       |
| SC / ST (Odisha Domicile)                | Exempted              |
| Persons with Disabilities (PwD)          | Exempted              |

*Note: The fee is non-refundable. Payment can generally be made online through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking, or other specified payment gateways.* Please check the official notification for precise fee amounts and payment methods.

### Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must fulfill the following eligibility criteria to be considered for the OPSC Language Officer position:

*   **Educational Qualification:** Applicants are generally required to possess a Master's degree in a relevant language (such as Odia, Hindi, English, or as specified) from a recognized University. Further details on specific subjects, percentage requirements, or additional qualifications will be provided in the official notification.
*   **Age Limit:** As of the cut-off date (to be specified in the notification), candidates must typically be between **21 and 38 years** of age. Age relaxation will be applicable for reserved categories (SC/ST/SEBC/Women/PwD) as per the existing rules of the Government of Odisha.
*   **Domicile:** Candidates must be a citizen of India and fulfill the domicile requirements for the state of Odisha where applicable.

### How to Apply for OPSC Language Officer Recruitment 2026

Follow these steps to successfully apply online for the OPSC Language Officer positions:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the official website of the Odisha Public Service Commission (OPSC) at `www.opsc.gov.in` on or after July 3rd, 2026.
2.  **Registration:** Click on the 'Apply Online' link for the Language Officer Recruitment 2026. If you are a new user, you will need to register by providing basic details like name, email ID, and mobile number. A registration ID and password will be generated.
3.  **Login:** Log in using your registered credentials.
4.  **Fill Application Form:** Carefully fill in all the required details in the online application form, including personal information, educational qualifications, and contact details.
5.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, caste certificate (if applicable), and other required documents in the specified format and size.
6.  **Pay Application Fee:** Proceed to pay the application fee online through the available payment options (Debit Card/Credit Card/Net Banking). Keep the transaction receipt for future reference.
7.  **Review and Submit:** Before final submission, review all the entered information to ensure accuracy. No changes will be allowed after final submission.
8.  **Print Application:** After successful submission, take a printout of the completed application form for your records.

how_to_apply: The application process will primarily be online. meta_title: DRDO DEAL Apprentices Recruitment 2026-27 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: The Defence Electronics Application Laboratory (DEAL), a prominent laboratory under the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), has announced
content:
## DRDO DEAL Apprentices Recruitment 2026-27: A Gateway to Defence Technology

The Defence Electronics Application Laboratory (DEAL), Dehradun, a constituent of the Defence Research and Development Organisation (DRDO), invites applications from eligible and enthusiastic Indian citizens for the Apprenticeship Training program for the academic session 2026-27. This initiative aims to impart practical training and skill development in various technical disciplines, preparing candidates for future challenges in the defence sector. A total of 77 vacancies are available across different categories of apprenticeships.

### Vacancy Details

DRDO DEAL is recruiting for 77 Apprentice positions. The specific distribution of vacancies across Graduate, Technician, and Trade Apprentices will be provided in the detailed official notification.

### Important Dates

| Event                      | Date (Tentative)                  |
| :------------------------- | :-------------------------------- |
| Application Start Date     | To be announced (Expected 2026)   |
| Application Last Date      | To be announced (Expected 2026)   |
| Merit List/Interview Date  | To be announced                   |
| Document Verification      | To be announced                   |
| Commencement of Training   | To be announced (Expected 2026-27)|

_Candidates are advised to regularly check the official DRDO website for precise dates and updates._

### Application Fee

| Category         | Application Fee (INR) |
| :--------------- | :-------------------- |
| General/OBC      | As per notification   |
| SC/ST/PwBD/Women | As per notification   |

_Note: Apprenticeship applications often have no fee or a nominal fee. Exact details will be mentioned in the official notification._

### Eligibility Criteria

#### Post-wise Qualifications

Candidates must possess the requisite educational qualifications from a recognized University/Institution/Board:

*   **Graduate Apprentice:** Bachelor's Degree (B.E./B.Tech) in relevant engineering disciplines (e.g., Electronics & Communication Engineering, Computer Science Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, etc.).
*   **Technician Apprentice:** Diploma in relevant engineering disciplines (e.g., Electronics Engineering, Computer Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Electrical Engineering, etc.).
*   **Trade Apprentice:** ITI Certificate in designated trades (e.g., Fitter, Electrician, Machinist, COPA, etc.) from a recognized NCVT/SCVT institution.

_Candidates who have passed their qualifying examination in the last three years (e.g., 2024, 2025, 2026 for 2026-27 recruitment) are generally eligible. Those who have already undergone apprenticeship training or are currently undergoing training under the Apprentices Act are not eligible._

#### Age Limit

*   **Minimum Age:** 18 years
*   **Maximum Age:** 24 years
*   **Age Relaxation:**
    *   SC/ST candidates: 5 years
    *   OBC candidates: 3 years
    *   PwBD candidates: 10 years
    *   Other relaxations as per Government of India rules.

### Stipend

Selected candidates will receive a monthly stipend as per the Apprenticeship Act, 1961, and subsequent amendments/guidelines issued by the Ministry of Skill Development and Entrepreneurship. The approximate stipend rates are typically:

*   **Graduate Apprentices:** ₹9,000/- per month
*   **Technician Apprentices:** ₹8,000/- per month
*   **Trade Apprentices:** As per relevant ITI trade stipend norms (usually ₹7,000- ₹7,700/- per month)

### How to Apply for DRDO DEAL Apprenticeship 2026-27

The application process will be conducted online. Follow the steps below to successfully submit your application:

1.  **Registration on NATS/NAPS Portal:**
    *   **For Graduate & Technician Apprentices:** First, register yourself on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal at `www.mhrdnats.gov.in`. Ensure your registration is complete and accurate.
    *   **For Trade Apprentices:** Register on the National Apprenticeship Promotion Scheme (NAPS) portal at `apprenticeshipindia.gov.in`.
2.  **Visit DRDO Official Website:** Once the official notification is released, visit the official DRDO website (www.drdo.gov.in) to find the 'Careers' or 'Recruitment' section.
3.  **Locate the Advertisement:** Search for the 'DRDO DEAL Apprenticeship Recruitment 2026-27' notification and click on the 'Apply Online' link.
4.  **Fill Application Form:** Carefully fill in all the required details in the online application form, including personal information, educational qualifications, and apprenticeship registration number.
5.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of necessary documents such as educational certificates, mark sheets, age proof, caste certificate (if applicable), passport-sized photograph, and signature, as per the specified format and size.
6.  **Review and Submit:** Before final submission, review all the entered details to ensure accuracy. No changes will be allowed after submission.
7.  **Print Application:** After successful submission, take a printout of the completed application form for your records.

### Important Links

*   **Official Notification:** To be released on `www.drdo.gov.in`
*   **Apply Online:** To be activated on `www.drdo.gov.in` (after notification release)
*   **NATS Portal (for Graduate/Technician Apprentices):** [https://portal.nats.gov.in/](https://portal.nats.gov.in/)
*   **NAPS Portal (for Trade Apprentices):** [https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/](https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/)
*   **DRDO Official Website:** [www.drdo.gov.in](https://www.drdo.gov.in)

age_limit: 18 to 37 years (as on 01.01.2026)
salary: ₹19,900 (Basic Pay) + allowances as per PSPCL rules
how_to_apply:
Eligible candidates must apply online only through the official PSPCL portal. The online application steps are as follows:

Step 1: Visit the official PSPCL recruitment portal and click on “Recruitment for the post of Assistant Lineman against CRA 318/26”.

content:
## AIIMS Deoghar Manpower Recruitment 2026 – Apply for 06 Contractual Posts

The Department of Evidence Synthesis (DOES), All India Institute of Medical Sciences (AIIMS) Deoghar has released a notification for the recruitment of 06 contractual manpower positions under the DHR–Health Technology Assessment in India (HTAIn) Project. Eligible candidates can apply offline by 15 July 2026.

### Vacancy Details
| Sl. No. | Post Name | No. of Posts | Consolidated Remuneration (Per Month) | Age Limit |
|---------|-----------|--------------|---------------------------------------|-----------|
| 1 | Health Economist (Scientist C) | 01 | ₹67,000 + HRA | 40 years |
| 2 | Scientist D / Senior Research Officer | 01 | ₹78,000 + HRA | 45 years |
| 3 | Scientist C / Research Officer | 01 | ₹67,000 + HRA | 40 years |
| 4 | Administrative Officer | 01 | ₹40,000 | Not exceeding 50 years |
| 5 | Field Officer | 01 | ₹25,000 – ₹30,000 | 35 years |
| 6 | Field Investigator | 01 | ₹30,000 – ₹32,000 | 35 years |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates | Nil |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Notification Release | 02 June 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply | 15 July 2026 (5:00 PM) |
| Publication of Eligibility List | 30 July 2026 |
| Written Test / Skill Test / Interview | August 2026 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Health Economist (Scientist C):** Master’s in Health Economics/Economics/Public Health + 2 years (Junior) / 6 years (Senior) experience. Ph.D. desirable.
- **Scientist D / Senior Research Officer:** Medical – MD/MS/DNB/MPH after MBBS with 6 years OR Ph.D. with experience; Non-Medical – Ph.D. / Master’s with relevant experience + 2 years R&D project management.
- **Scientist C / Research Officer:** Medical – MBBS with 6 years OR MD with 4 years; Non-Medical – M.Sc./MPH/MHA with 4 years experience.
- **Administrative Officer:** Bachelor’s Degree + 3 years experience in Govt./Autonomous bodies OR Retired Section Officer/Under Secretary. Proficiency in MS Office essential.
- **Field Officer & Field Investigator:** Graduate in Science/relevant subject with 3 years experience OR Master’s / Pharm D.

### Selection Process
1. Screening / Shortlisting of Applications
2. Written Test / Skill Test (if applicable)
3. Personal Interview (physical mode)

### How to Apply
1. Download the prescribed application format from the official AIIMS Deoghar website.
2. Fill the application form carefully.
3. Attach self-attested copies of required documents.
4. Superscribe the envelope with “Post Applied For: ____________”.
5. Send the complete application via Registered/Speed Post to: Dr. Seshadri Reddy Varikasuvu, Associate Professor, Department of Biochemistry, AIIMS Deoghar, Jharkhand – 814117.
6. Ensure it reaches by 15 July 2026 (5:00 PM).
7. Keep a photocopy for future reference.

### Important Links
- [Official Notification PDF](#) (Link not available)
- [Application Form](#) (Link not available)
- [AIIMS Deoghar Official Website](https://www.aiimsdeoghar.edu.in)

### FAQs
**Q1. How many vacancies are announced?**
A1. Total 06 contractual vacancies.

**Q2. What is the last date to apply?**
A2. 15 July 2026 (5:00 PM).

**Q3. What is the application mode?**
A3. Offline via Registered/Speed Post.

**Q4. What is the remuneration?**
A4. ₹25,000 – ₹78,000 + HRA per month.

**Q5. What is the selection process?**
A5. Shortlisting, Written Test/Skill Test, Interview.

**Q6. Is there any application fee?**
A6. No, fee is Nil.

Udupi Cochin Shipyard Limited (UCSL), Malpe, Karnataka, a wholly owned subsidiary of Cochin Shipyard Limited, Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways, Government of India, has released a vacancy notification for recruitment of 05 Executive posts on permanent rolls. - Deputy Manager (Mechanical): Maximum 35 years (born on or after 01 July 1991)

Desirable: 5 years as team lead / section head.
- **Deputy Manager (Mechanical) – E2:** Degree in Mechanical / Marine / Naval Architecture Engineering OR 3-year Diploma in Mechanical / Marine / Shipbuilding Engineering with 7 years (Degree holders) / 10 years (Diploma holders) post-qualification managerial experience in relevant shipbuilding / ship repair / offshore / petrochemical / marine engineering fields.

3. Personal Interview

A1. Total 05 vacancies (02 Assistant General Manager + 03 Deputy Manager).

**Q2. What is the last date to apply for UCSL Engineering 2026?**
A2. The last date to apply online is 30 June 2026.

**Q3. What is the educational qualification required?**
A3. Degree in Mechanical / Naval Architecture / Marine / Production Engineering (AGM) or Degree/Diploma in Mechanical / Marine / Naval Architecture / Shipbuilding Engineering (DM) with minimum required post-qualification experience.

**Q4. What is the salary in UCSL Engineering Recruitment 2026?**
A4. E5 Grade: ₹80,000 – ₹2,20,000 and E2 Grade: ₹50,000 – ₹1,60,000 plus other benefits.

A5. Power Point Presentation on work experience → Group Discussion → Personal Interview.

A6. ₹1,000 for General/OBC/EWS candidates. SC/ST candidates are exempted.

title: UKMSSB Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026
overview: The Uttarakhand Medical Service Selection Board (UKMSSB) has announced the recruitment of 196 Nursing Officers (Female & Male) for the year 2026. This is a golden opportunity for candidates holding B.Sc. Nursing or GNM qualifications to secure a government job in the healthcare sector of Uttarakhand. The online application process begins on 12 June 2026 and ends on 02 July 2026. Selected candidates will be placed in Pay Level-07 with a salary range of ₹44,900 to ₹1,42,400 per month, along with other allowances as per state government norms.
eligibility: B.Sc. Nursing OR GNM from a recognized University/Institution. Registration with Uttarakhand/Indian Nursing Council is mandatory.
age_limit: 21 to 42 years (as on 01.07.2025)
salary: Pay Level-07: ₹44,900 – ₹1,42,400 per month
how_to_apply: 1. Visit the official UKMSSB website at https://ukmssb.org/. 2. Click on the link for 'Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026'. 3. Register using a valid Email ID and Mobile Number. 4. Fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and category details. 5. Upload scanned photograph, signature, and required certificates. 6. Pay the application fee online. 7. Submit the form and take a printout of the confirmation page for future reference.

meta_description: The Uttarakhand Medical Service Selection Board (UKMSSB) has announced the recruitment of 196 Nursing Officers (Female & Male) for the year 2026. This is a
content:
## UKMSSB Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Category | UR | SC | ST | OBC | EWS | Total |
|-----------|----------|----|----|----|-----|-----|-------|
| Nursing Officer (Female) Diploma Holder | | 99 | 12 | 03 | 07 | 05 | 126 |
| Nursing Officer (Female) Degree Holder | | 23 | 04 | 01 | 02 | 01 | 31 |
| Nursing Officer (Male) Diploma Holder | | 24 | 04 | 00 | 02 | 01 | 31 |
| Nursing Officer (Male) Degree Holder | | 07 | 01 | 00 | 00 | 00 | 08 |
| **Grand Total** | | **153** | **21** | **04** | **11** | **07** | **196** |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee (₹) |
|----------|----------|
| General / OBC | 300 |
| SC / ST / EWS | 150 |
| PH (Divyang) | 150 |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Notification Date | 03 June 2026 |
| Starting Date for Online Application | 12 June 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Application | 02 July 2026 (17:00 hours) |
| Last Date for Fee Payment | 02 July 2026 |
| Application Correction Window | 04 – 07 July 2026 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Age Limit:** 21-42 years as on 01.07.2025 (age relaxation as per Uttarakhand Government rules)
- **Educational Qualification:** B.Sc. Nursing OR GNM from a recognized University/Institution
- **Registration:** Must be registered with Uttarakhand/Indian Nursing Council

### Selection Process
1. Written Examination (Computer Based Test)
2. Medical Examination
3. Document Verification

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official UKMSSB website: [https://ukmssb.org/](https://ukmssb.org/)
2. Click on the link for 'Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026'
3. Register using a valid Email ID and Mobile Number
4. Fill the online application form with all personal, educational, and category details
5. Upload scanned photograph, signature, and required certificates
6. Pay the application fee online
7. Submit the form and take a printout of the confirmation page for future reference

### Important Links
- **Official Notification PDF:** [Download PDF](#) (Link not available)
- **Apply Online:** [https://ukmssb.org/](https://ukmssb.org/)
- **Official Website:** [https://ukmssb.org/](https://ukmssb.org/)

### FAQs
**Q1. How many vacancies are announced in UKMSSB Nursing Officer Recruitment 2026?**
A1. Total 196 vacancies have been announced for Nursing Officer (Female & Male) posts.

**Q2. What is the last date to apply for UKMSSB Nursing Officer 2026?**
A2. The last date to apply online is 02 July 2026 (17:00 hours).

**Q3. What is the educational qualification required?**
A3. B.Sc. Nursing OR GNM from a recognized University/Institution.

**Q4. What is the salary for Nursing Officer posts?**
A4. Pay Level-07 (₹44,900 – ₹1,42,400).

**Q5. What is the selection process?**
A5. Written Examination + Medical Examination + Document Verification.

**Q6. Is there any application fee exemption?**
A6. PH (Divyang) candidates have to pay ₹150/- only.

title: UPSC Recruitment 2026 for 450 Drug Inspector, Assistant Engineer and More Posts
overview: The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has announced a massive recruitment drive for 450 vacancies across various posts including Drug Inspector, Assistant Engineer, and others. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as B.Pharma, B.Tech/B.E, LLB, or M.Sc can apply online through the official UPSC website. The application window is open until 17 July 2026. This is a golden opportunity for aspirants seeking central government jobs in technical and regulatory fields.
eligibility: Candidates must possess B.Pharma, B.Tech/B.E, LLB, or M.Sc from a recognized university or institution. Specific post-wise qualifications are detailed in the official notification.
age_limit: Varies by post; typically 18 to 30 years for most posts. Age relaxation as per government rules.
salary: Pay Level as per 7th CPC; varies by post (e.g., Level 7 to Level 10).
how_to_apply:
1. Visit the official UPSC website at upsc.gov.in.
2. Click on the 'Recruitment' tab and find the notification for UPSC Recruitment 2026.
3. Register with a valid email ID and mobile number.
4. Fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and other details.
5. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required documents.

7. Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.

title: RBI Young Professional Recruitment 2026
overview: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has announced the recruitment of Young Professionals (YP) for 12 vacancies across various central office departments in Mumbai. This engagement offers a fixed monthly remuneration of ₹1,50,000 and is open to candidates with postgraduate or engineering degrees in relevant disciplines. The application process is entirely via email, starting from 15th June 2026 and closing on 6th July 2026. Selection will be based on shortlisting and interview.
eligibility: Master’s Degree / B.E/B.Tech / M.E/M.Tech in relevant discipline as per post-wise requirements.
age_limit: 21 to 30 years (as on 06.07.2026)
salary: ₹1,50,000 per month (Fixed)
how_to_apply: 1. Download the application form from the official RBI website. 2. Fill the form and prepare required documents (CV, academic transcripts, statement of interest, writing sample, recommendation letter). 3. Send scanned application and documents via email to yphrmdco@rbi.org.in with subject line 'YP Application – Post Code – Name of the Candidate'. 4. For multiple posts, send separate emails.
meta_title: RBI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 2026: Online Form, Eligibility & Benefits
meta_description: The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) has announced the recruitment of Young Professionals (YP) for 12 vacancies across various central office departments in Mum
content:
## RBI Young Professional Recruitment 2026 – 12 Vacancies

The Reserve Bank of India (RBI) invites applications from eligible candidates for engagement as Young Professionals (YP) in various Central Office Departments located at Mumbai. This is a prestigious opportunity for young graduates and postgraduates to work with India's central bank.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates | Nil |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Notification Release | 15 June 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply | 06 July 2026 |

### Vacancy Details
| Post Code | Job Area | No. of Posts |
|-----------|----------|--------------|
| YP0626DOS01 | Cyber Security and Information Technology Risk | 1 |
| YP0626DOS02 | Policy Analytics (DoS) | 1 |
| YP0626DOR01 | Climate Change Risk and Sustainable Finance | 1 |
| YP0626DOR02 | Credit Risk Analytics & Regulatory Policy | 1 |
| YP0626DPS01 | Payment Ecosystem | 1 |
| YP0626DPS02 | Policy and Research in Domestic & Cross-Border Payment Systems | 1 |
| YP0626DEP01 | Policy and Research (DEPR) | 1 |
| YP0626FIN01 | Artificial Intelligence | 1 |
| YP0626FIN02 | Quantum Technology | 1 |
| YP0626FMO01 | Data Analysis | 1 |
| YP0626FMR01 | Financial Markets | 1 |
| YP0626CEP01 | Data Analytics and Policy Research | 1 |
| **Total** | | **12** |

### Eligibility Criteria
#### Educational Qualification (Post-wise)
- **Cyber Security & IT Risk**: PG in Cyber Security / InfoSec / CS / IT / Data Science / AI
- **Policy Analytics (DoS)**: B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.Tech (CS/IT) or Masters in Statistics / Data Science
- **Climate Change Risk & Sustainable Finance**: Masters/PG in Climate / Environment / Economics / Finance / Statistics / Data Science / Public Policy
- **Credit Risk Analytics & Regulatory Policy**: Masters in Economics / Econometrics / Statistics / Finance / Maths / Data Science
- **Payment Ecosystem & Cross-Border Payments**: PG in Economics / Statistics / Finance / Commerce / Public Policy / Data Science or B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.Tech or CA
- **Policy & Research (DEPR)**: Masters / PhD in Economics (with Maths / Statistics / Econometrics)
- **Artificial Intelligence**: PG in AI / CS / Public Policy / Data Science
- **Quantum Technology**: PG in Quantum Computing / Physics / Electronics / CS / Technology Policy
- **Data Analysis & Financial Markets**: PG in Statistics / Economics / Operations Research / Finance / Maths
- **Data Analytics and Policy Research**: B.E/B.Tech/M.E/M.Tech or PG in Maths / Statistics / CS / Economics / Data Analytics

#### Age Limit (as on 06.07.2026)
| Category | Age Limit |
|----------|-----------|
| All Categories | 21 – 30 years |

### Selection Process
1. Scrutiny of Applications
2. Shortlisting of Candidates
3. Interview

### How to Apply
Eligible candidates must apply through email only. Follow these steps:
1. Download the Application Form from the official RBI website.
2. Fill the application form and prepare the following documents in PDF format:
   - Curriculum Vitae (CV)
   - Academic transcripts / Degree certificates
   - Statement of interest
   - Sample of academic or policy writing
   - Reference / Recommendation letter
3. Send the scanned application and documents via email to **yphrmdco@rbi.org.in**.
4. Use the subject line: **“YP Application – Post Code – Name of the Candidate”**.
5. Candidates applying for multiple posts must send separate emails for each post.

### Important Links
- [Official RBI Website](https://www.rbi.org.in)
- [Detailed Notification](https://www.rbi.org.in/Scripts/BS_ViewNotification.aspx?Id=12345) *(Placeholder – replace with actual link)*
- [Application Form](https://www.rbi.org.in/Scripts/BS_ViewNotification.aspx?Id=12345) *(Placeholder – replace with actual link)*

### FAQs
**Q1: What is the total number of vacancies?**
A: 12 Posts.

**Q2: What is the age limit?**
A: 21 to 30 years (as on 06.07.2026).

**Q3: What is the remuneration?**
A: ₹1,50,000/- per month (Fixed).

**Q4: What is the selection process?**
A: Shortlisting of Applications + Interview.

**Q5: What is the last date to apply?**
A: 06 July 2026.

**Q6: How to apply?**
A: Send application along with required documents via email to yphrmdco@rbi.org.in.

### How to Apply

1. Visit the official notification link for the desired post.
2. Read the full advertisement carefully (eligibility, age limit, fee, documents).
3. Click the “Apply Online” button on the official website.
4. Register / Login and fill the application form.
5. Upload required documents and pay the application fee (if any).
6. Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

### Why Government Jobs?

- High job security till retirement
- Competitive salary + DA + HRA
- Medical facilities, pension, gratuity
- Respect and prestige in society
- Good work-life balance

### FAQs

**What are the Government Jobs available in India?**
More than two lakh government job vacancies are available in 2026-27. Top jobs include UPSC Civil Services, SSC CGL, Railway NTPC, IBPS Banking, Police, and PSU jobs.

**How can I apply for government jobs online?**
Visit IndGovtJobs blog, click Govt Jobs column, find your qualification-based notification, read details, and apply online before the closing date.

**What is the age eligibility?**
Minimum 18 years for most fresher jobs, maximum 56 years for deputation. Age relaxation: 5 years for SC/ST, 3 years for OBC, plus 10 years for PwD.

**What is the minimum qualification?**
Minimum 8th pass, 10th, 12th, ITI, Diploma, Degree, or Post Graduation depending on the post.

**Which government job is easy to get?**
Railway, Teaching, and Banking jobs are relatively easier to apply and get, especially at lower levels (Group C, D) where selection is based on written exam only.

**Why are government jobs the best?**
They offer security, respect, and benefits like medical, home loan, travel, and retirement benefits.

title: NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee (ACT) Recruitment 2026

Candidates with a Master's degree in Chemistry (M.Sc.) with at least 60% marks (50% for SC/ST/PwBD) are eligible to apply. The online application process commenced on 26 June 2026 and will close on 10 July 2026. Selected candidates will be placed in the E0 Grade with a pay scale of ₹30,000 – ₹1,20,000 per month, along with dearness allowance and other perks. This is an excellent opportunity for chemistry graduates to join India's largest energy conglomerate.

age_limit: Maximum 27 years as on the last date of online application. Age relaxation: SC/ST – 5 years, OBC (NCL) – 3 years, PwBD – 10 years (as per Govt. rules).
salary: Pay Scale: ₹30,000 – ₹1,20,000 (E0 Grade) | Basic Pay: ₹30,000 + DA + Allowances + Perks

content:
## NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee (ACT) Recruitment 2026

NTPC Limited, a Maharatna Central Public Sector Enterprise under the Government of India, invites online applications for the post of Assistant Chemist Trainee (ACT). This is a golden opportunity for M.Sc. Chemistry graduates to join India's largest energy conglomerate.

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Total Vacancies |
|-----------|----------------|
| Assistant Chemist Trainee (ACT) | 40 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Educational Qualification:** Regular/Full-time M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized Indian University/Institute with minimum 60% marks (aggregate). SC/ST/PwBD candidates need minimum 50% marks.
- **Age Limit:** Maximum 27 years as on the last date of online application. Age relaxation: SC/ST – 5 years, OBC (NCL) – 3 years, PwBD – 10 years (as per Govt. rules).
- **Final Year Students:** Candidates appearing in final semester/year and expecting results by 31 July 2026 are also eligible to apply.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| General / EWS / OBC | ₹500 |
| SC / ST / PwBD / Female / Ex-Servicemen | Exempted (No Fee) |

Fee is non-refundable and to be paid online.

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Online Application Starts | 26 June 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Application | 10 July 2026 |

### Pay Scale
Selected candidates will be placed in E0 Grade with Pay Scale of ₹30,000 – ₹1,20,000 per month. Basic Pay: ₹30,000 + DA + Allowances + Perks.

### Selection Process
The selection will be done through the following stages:
1. All India Online Selection Test (Two Parts – Subject Knowledge Test + Executive Aptitude Test). Candidates must qualify separately in both parts of the test.
2. Document Verification
3. Medical Examination by NTPC Medical Board

### How to Apply
Eligible and interested candidates must apply online only through the NTPC Careers portal.
1. Visit the official NTPC Careers website [www.ntpc.co.in](https://www.ntpc.co.in/careers) or directly go to the recruitment portal.
2. Register yourself using a valid Email ID and Mobile Number.
3. Fill the online application form with all required personal, educational and other details.
4. Upload scanned copies of all necessary documents (Photo, Signature, Educational Certificates, Category Certificate, etc.).
5. Pay the application fee online (if applicable) and submit the form.
6. Take a printout of the submitted application form and payment receipt for future reference.

### Important Links
- [Official Website](https://www.ntpc.co.in/careers)
- [Apply Online](https://www.ntpc.co.in/careers)

### FAQs
**Q: What is the total number of vacancies in NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026?**
A: Total 40 Assistant Chemist Trainee (ACT) posts.

**Q: What is the educational qualification required for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee?**
A: Regular/Full-time M.Sc. in Chemistry from a recognized University/Institute with minimum 60% marks (50% for SC/ST/PwBD).

**Q: What is the age limit for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026?**
A: Maximum 27 years as on the last date of online application (with applicable relaxations).

**Q: What is the pay scale for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee?**
A: Selected candidates will be placed in E0 Grade with Pay Scale of ₹30,000 – ₹1,20,000.

**Q: What is the last date to apply for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee Recruitment 2026?**
A: Last date for submission of online application is 10 July 2026.

**Q: What is the selection process for NTPC Assistant Chemist Trainee?**
A: All India Online Selection Test (Subject Knowledge + Executive Aptitude Test) + Document Verification + Medical Examination.

### Eligibility Criteria

- **Age Limit**: 18 to 40 years (post-wise). Age relaxation as per government norms.

### Application Fee

|----------|---------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|--------------------------|
| General/OBC | ₹500 | ₹1500 | ₹1000 | ₹800 |

### Important Dates

|-------|------|
| Start of Online Registration | 01 July 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Registration | 31 July 2026 (11:59 PM) |

1. Computer Based Test (CBT) – 0.25 negative marking (except MTS)
2. Interview (for Research Officer posts)
3. Skill Test (Stenography / Typing / Translation / Driving – where applicable)
4. Document Verification & Medical Examination

**Q: What is the application fee?**
A: Processing Fee ₹500 + Exam Fee (₹800-₹1500) with exemptions.

**Q: What are the important dates?**
A: Online registration from 01 July to 31 July 2026; correction window 03-05 August 2026.

eligibility: Candidates typically require specific educational qualifications such as a B.E./B.Tech degree in relevant engineering disciplines (e.g., Electronics, Mechanical, Computer Science), M.Sc. in Physics/Chemistry/Mathematics, or a Diploma in engineering fields. age_limit: Generally, candidates should be between 18 to 35 years of age, with relaxations applicable for reserved categories as per Government of India rules. Specific age limits for each post will be provided in the detailed official notification.
salary: Selected candidates will be offered a competitive salary package as per the Central Government pay matrix levels, varying according to the post and grade. Details of the pay scale will be specified in the official notification.
how_to_apply:
The application process for ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026 will be entirely online. Candidates are advised to follow these steps once the official notification and application portal are live:

| Interview/Skill Test           | To be announced           |
| Final Result Declaration       | To be announced           |

### Application Fee

The application fee structure for ISRO ISTRAC Recruitment 2026 is expected to be as follows. Please note that these are typical charges, and exact figures will be confirmed in the official notification.

| Category                                 | Application Fee (Expected) |
| :--------------------------------------- | :------------------------- |
| General / OBC / EWS (Male Candidates)    | ₹100 - ₹250                |
| SC / ST / PwBD / Ex-Servicemen           | Exempted                   |
| Women Candidates (All Categories)        | Exempted                   |

*Payment Mode: Online (Net Banking, Debit Card, Credit Card, UPI)*

### Post-wise Qualifications and Vacancy Details

ISRO ISTRAC typically recruits for a range of positions including Scientists/Engineers, Technical Assistants, Technicians, Junior Personal Assistants, and others. The qualifications for these posts generally include:

*   **Scientists/Engineers:** B.E./B.Tech or M.E./M.Tech in relevant engineering disciplines (e.g., Electronics & Communication, Computer Science, Mechanical, Civil, Electrical, Aerospace), or M.Sc. in Physics, Chemistry, Mathematics, etc.
*   **Technical Assistants:** Diploma in relevant engineering disciplines.
*   **Technicians:** ITI certificate in specific trades.
*   **Junior Personal Assistants/Stenographers:** Graduate degree with proficiency in Stenography and Computer Applications.

**Vacancy:** The number of vacancies for various posts will be announced in the detailed official notification.

### Age Limit

Candidates applying for ISRO ISTRAC positions should generally fall within the age bracket of 18 to 35 years. Age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes (SC), Scheduled Tribes (ST), Other Backward Classes (OBC), Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD), and Ex-Servicemen as per Government of India rules.

*   **Minimum Age:** 18 years
*   **Maximum Age:** 35 years (Relaxations as per government norms)

### How to Apply

The application process will be conducted online through the official ISRO/ISTRAC recruitment portal. Here’s a general step-by-step guide:

1.  **Visit Official Website:** Go to the career section of the official ISRO or ISTRAC website.
2.  **Registration:** Click on the 'New Registration' link. Provide your email ID, mobile number, and other basic details to register and receive your login credentials.
3.  **Login:** Use the generated Registration ID and password to log in to the application portal.
4.  **Fill Application Form:** Complete the online application form with accurate personal information, educational qualifications, and any relevant work experience.
5.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your passport-sized photograph, signature, educational certificates, and other required documents as per the specifications mentioned in the notification.
6.  **Pay Application Fee:** Proceed to pay the application fee online using debit card, credit card, net banking, or other available options. Ensure you select the correct category for fee payment.
7.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the details entered in the application form before final submission. No changes will be allowed after submission.
8.  **Print Application:** After successful submission and payment, take a printout of the filled application form and the e-receipt for your records.
