meta_description: The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has announced the recruitment of 170 Fireman (Vidhan Bhawan Rakshak / Agnikshak) posts
content:
## UPSSSC Fireman Recruitment 2026 Overview

The Uttar Pradesh Subordinate Service Selection Commission (UPSSSC) has released a notification for the recruitment of 170 Fireman (Vidhan Bhawan Rakshak / Agnikshak) posts. Candidates who have qualified the UP PET 2025 are eligible to apply. The online application process starts on 9 June 2026 and ends on 29 June 2026.

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Gen | EWS | OBC | SC | ST | Total |
|-----------|-----|-----|-----|----|----|-------|
| Fireman (Vidhan Bhawan Rakshak) | 51 | 12 | 24 | 31 | 2 | 120 |
| Fireman (Vidhan Bhawan Agnik/Agnirakshak) | 26 | 5 | 9 | 9 | 1 | 50 |
| **Grand Total** | **77** | **17** | **33** | **40** | **3** | **170** |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Age Limit:** 18-40 years as on 01/07/2026 (relaxation as per rules).
- **Educational Qualification:** 12th Pass from a recognized board + UP PET 2025 qualified.

### Physical Standards
| Parameter | Male | Female |
|-----------|------|--------|
| Height (Gen/OBC/SC) | 168 cm | 152 cm |
| Height (ST) | 160 cm | 147 cm |
| Chest (Gen/OBC/SC) | 79-84 cm | N/A |
| Chest (ST) | 77-82 cm | N/A |
| Weight | N/A | 45-58 kg |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Categories | ₹25/- |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Notification Release | 10 April 2026 |
| Online Application Start | 9 June 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply | 29 June 2026 |
| Application Correction | Up to 6 July 2026 |

### Selection Process
1. Shortlisting based on UP PET 2025 score
2. Written Examination
3. Physical Test
4. Medical Examination
5. Document Verification

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official website upsssc.gov.in.
2. Register/Login with valid credentials.
3. Fill the application form with personal, educational, category, and PET details.
4. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required documents.
5. Pay the application fee of ₹25/- online.
6. Submit the form before 29 June 2026 and take a printout.

### Important Links
- [Apply Online](https://upsssc.gov.in)
- [Official Website](https://upsssc.gov.in)

### FAQs
**Q: What is the total number of vacancies?**
A: 170 posts (120 Rakshak + 50 Agnik/Agnirakshak).

**Q: What is the age limit?**
A: 18-40 years as on 01/07/2026.

**Q: What is the application fee?**
A: ₹25/- for all categories.

**Q: What is the pay scale?**
A: Pay Level-3 (₹21,700 – 69,100).

**Q: What is the last date to apply?**
A: 29 June 2026.

title: NBEMS Recruitment 2026: 53 Group A, B & C Posts
department: National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS)
overview: The National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS), under the Ministry of Health & Family Welfare, Government of India, has announced a recruitment drive for 53 Group A, B & C posts. The vacancies include Deputy Director (Medical), Junior Programmer, Junior Accountant, Stenographer, and Junior Assistant positions. Eligible candidates can apply online from 7th July 2026 to 31st July 2026. The selection process comprises a Computer Based Test (CBT), skill test (for Stenographer), and document verification. This is a great opportunity for candidates seeking central government jobs in the medical and administrative fields.
eligibility: Deputy Director (Medical): Recognized Postgraduate Medical qualification; Junior Programmer: B.Tech/BE/BCA/DOEACC 'B' or 'C' Level or Degree in Computer Science/IT/Electronics; Junior Accountant: Bachelor's Degree with Mathematics/Statistics or Commerce; Stenographer: Matric + 12th Pass + Shorthand 80 WPM + Typing 30 WPM; Junior Assistant: Matric + 12th Pass + Computer Proficiency.
age_limit: Deputy Director: Below 35 years; Junior Programmer: Below 27 years; Junior Accountant: Below 27 years; Stenographer: 18-27 years; Junior Assistant: Below 27 years. Age relaxation as per government rules.
salary: Deputy Director (Medical): Pay Level-11 (₹67,700 - ₹2,08,700); Junior Programmer: Pay Level-7 (₹44,900 - ₹1,42,400); Junior Accountant: Pay Level-4 (₹25,500 - ₹81,100); Stenographer: Pay Level-4 (₹25,500 - ₹81,100); Junior Assistant: Pay Level-2 (₹19,900 - ₹63,200). Plus DA, HRA, and other allowances.
how_to_apply: 1. Visit the official NBEMS website: natboard.edu.in. 2. Click on the recruitment link for Group A, B & C posts. 3. Complete One-Time Registration (OTR) if not already done. 4. Fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and other details. 5. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required documents. 6. Pay the application fee online via debit/credit card, net banking, or UPI. 7. Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.

content:
## NBEMS Recruitment 2026: 53 Group A, B & C Posts

The National Board of Examinations in Medical Sciences (NBEMS) has released a notification for the recruitment of 53 vacancies across Group A, B, and C posts. Below are the details.

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Group | Pay Level | No. of Vacancies |
|-----------|-------|-----------|------------------|
| Deputy Director (Medical) | A | Level 11 | 02 |
| Junior Programmer | B | Level 7 | 01 |
| Junior Accountant | C | Level 4 | 04 |
| Stenographer | C | Level 4 | 07 |
| Junior Assistant | C | Level 2 | 39 |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| General / OBC | ₹1500 + 18% GST |
| SC / ST / PwBD | Nil |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Notification Release | 27 June 2026 |
| Online Registration Start | 7 July 2026 |
| Last Date to Apply | 31 July 2026 |
| Tentative Exam Date | 5 & 6 September 2026 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Deputy Director (Medical)**: Recognized Postgraduate Medical qualification; age below 35 years.
- **Junior Programmer**: B.Tech/BE/BCA/DOEACC 'B' or 'C' Level or Degree in Computer Science/IT/Electronics; age below 27 years.
- **Junior Accountant**: Bachelor's Degree with Mathematics/Statistics or Commerce; age below 27 years.
- **Stenographer**: Matric + 12th Pass + Shorthand speed 80 WPM + Typing speed 30 WPM; age 18-27 years.
- **Junior Assistant**: Matric + 12th Pass + Computer Proficiency; age below 27 years.

### Selection Process
- Computer Based Test (CBT)
- Skill Test (for Stenographer)
- Document Verification

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official NBEMS website: natboard.edu.in.
2. Click on the recruitment link for Group A, B & C posts.
3. Complete One-Time Registration (OTR) if not already done.
4. Fill in the online application form with personal, educational, and other details.
5. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required documents.
6. Pay the application fee online via debit/credit card, net banking, or UPI.
7. Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.

### Important Links
- **Apply Online**: [NBEMS Official Website](https://natboard.edu.in)
- **Official Notification**: Not yet available (check website for updates)

content:
## APPSC Departmental Tests Hall Ticket 2026

The Andhra Pradesh Public Service Commission (APPSC) will release the Hall Ticket for the Departmental Tests 2026 on **June 30, 2026**. Candidates can download the admit card from the official website **psc.ap.gov.in**. The exams are scheduled from **July 6 to July 11, 2026**, across 21 district centres in Andhra Pradesh.

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Hall Ticket Release | June 30, 2026 |
| Exam Dates | July 6 - July 11, 2026 |

### How to Download Hall Ticket

1. Visit the official APPSC website: [psc.ap.gov.in](https://psc.ap.gov.in).
2. Click on the 'Hall Tickets' link on the homepage.
3. Find the link for 'APPSC Departmental Tests Hall Ticket 2026' and click on it.
4. Enter your Registration Number and Date of Birth (or Password) as required.
5. Click on 'Submit' to view your hall ticket.
6. Download the hall ticket and take a printout for future reference.

### Exam Day Guidelines

- Carry a printed copy of the hall ticket along with a valid photo ID (e.g., Aadhaar, Voter ID, Passport).
- Reach the exam centre at least 30 minutes before the reporting time.
- Follow all COVID-19 protocols if applicable.
- Electronic gadgets, mobile phones, and study materials are strictly prohibited inside the exam hall.

### Documents to Carry

- APPSC Departmental Tests Hall Ticket 2026 (printed copy)
- Valid photo ID proof (original)
- Passport-size photograph (same as on application)

### Important Links

- **Official Website:** [psc.ap.gov.in](https://psc.ap.gov.in)
- **Direct Hall Ticket Link:** Will be updated on June 30, 2026

For any queries, candidates can contact the APPSC helpline or visit the official website.

content:
## APPSC Junior Specialist Result 2026

The Andhra Pradesh Public Service Commission (APPSC) has released the result for the Junior Specialist (Medical Specialist) Recruitment 2026 on 26th June 2026. The selection list includes candidates for 15 specialties such as Surgery, Anesthesiology, Ophthalmology, and more.

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Result Declaration | 26 June 2026 |

### How to Check Result
1. Visit the official APPSC website: [https://psc.ap.gov.in](https://psc.ap.gov.in)
2. Click on the 'Results' tab.
3. Select the link for 'Junior Specialist Result 2026'.
4. The PDF will display the list of selected candidates.
5. Download and take a printout for future reference.

### Documents Required for Verification

content:
## RRB NTPC Undergraduate Answer Key 2024 Released

The Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) has officially published the answer key for the Non-Technical Popular Categories (NTPC) Undergraduate level examinations. This release provides a transparent mechanism for candidates to check their answers against the official key and estimate their scores before the final results are processed. All candidates who participated in the Computer Based Test (CBT) are strongly advised to download their individual answer sheets and response sheets promptly.

### Key Dates and Timelines
Candidates should pay close attention to the following important dates regarding the answer key download and objection-raising window:

| Event                      | Date         |
| :------------------------- | :----------- |
| Answer Key Release Date    | 2024-07-20   |
| Objection Window Start Date| 2024-07-20   |
| Objection Window End Date  | 2024-07-25   |
| Fee Payment Last Date      | 2024-07-25   |

### Steps to Download RRB NTPC Undergraduate Answer Key
Follow these simple steps to access your RRB NTPC Undergraduate Answer Key:

1.  **Visit the Official RRB Portal:** Go to the official website of the Railway Recruitment Board (RRB) relevant to your zone (e.g., RRB Allahabad, RRB Mumbai, RRB Kolkata, etc.). Look for the 'Answer Key' or 'CBT-1 Results/Answer Key' section.
2.  **Locate the Answer Key Link:** On the homepage, find the link for 'RRB NTPC Undergraduate Answer Key 2024'.
3.  **Enter Login Credentials:** Click on the link. You will be redirected to a login page. Enter your:
    *   **Registration Number:** (As provided during application)
    *   **Date of Birth:** (In DD/MM/YYYY format)
4.  **View Answer Key and Response Sheet:** After successful login, your individual answer key and response sheet will be displayed on the screen.
5.  **Download and Save:** Download the answer key and your response sheet for future reference. It's advisable to take a printout.
6.  **Raise Objections (If Any):** If you find any discrepancies or incorrect answers, you can raise objections through the same portal within the specified timeline by paying the requisite fee per question.

### Important Instructions for Objections
*   Candidates can challenge questions they believe have incorrect answers as per the official key.
*   A non-refundable fee (typically Rs. 50 per question) is usually charged for raising objections.
*   Ensure to provide valid proof or justification for your objection. Objections without proper justification may not be considered.
*   The decision of the RRB on the objections raised will be final and binding.

### What Next?
After the objection window closes, RRB will review all submitted objections. A final revised answer key (if necessary) will be released, followed by the declaration of the CBT-1 results. Stay tuned to the official RRB websites for further updates regarding the result declaration and subsequent stages of the recruitment process.

content:
## UP Home Guard Result Announced!

The Uttar Pradesh Home Guard Department has successfully declared the results for its highly anticipated recruitment examination. This is a significant moment for thousands of candidates who participated in the selection process to join the esteemed Home Guard force in Uttar Pradesh. Aspirants are strongly encouraged to check their results promptly and prepare for the upcoming stages of selection.

### Important Dates and Timeline

While the specific exam dates for the recruitment drive were announced earlier, candidates should now focus on the key dates related to the result declaration and subsequent procedures. 

| Event                      | Date/Timeline         |
| :------------------------- | :-------------------- |
| Result Declaration         | Recently Announced    |
| Document Verification Start| To be announced soon  |
| Medical Examination        | To be announced       |
| Final Merit List           | Expected post DV/ME   |

*Note: Exact dates for subsequent stages will be updated on the official website. Candidates are advised to regularly check for the latest announcements.*

### Steps to Download Your Result

Follow these simple steps to access and download your UP Home Guard Result:

1.  **Access the Official Portal:** Open your web browser and visit the official website of the Uttar Pradesh Home Guard Department. (As no specific link is available, candidates must search for the official UP Home Guard portal).
2.  **Locate Result Section:** On the homepage, look for sections typically labeled 'Latest Updates', 'Results', 'Recruitment' or 'Announcements'.
3.  **Find the Result Link:** Within the relevant section, identify and click on the link titled 'UP Home Guard Result' or similar.
4.  **Enter Credentials:** A login page will appear. You will need to enter your Roll Number, Application ID, Date of Birth, or other specified details as required.
5.  **View Result:** After entering the correct details, click on the 'Submit' or 'Get Result' button. Your individual result/scorecard will be displayed on the screen.
6.  **Save and Print:** It is highly recommended to download the result in PDF format and take a printout for your records. This printout will be essential for future reference, especially during the document verification process.

### Document Verification (DV) & What to Expect Next

Candidates who have successfully qualified in the written examination will be called for Document Verification (DV) followed by a Medical Examination. It is crucial to keep all your original documents ready along with self-attested copies. 

**Commonly Required Documents for Verification:**

*   Educational Certificates (Matriculation, Intermediate, Graduation etc.)
*   Date of Birth Proof (usually 10th class mark sheet/certificate)
*   Caste Certificate (if applicable, for SC/ST/OBC/EWS candidates)
*   Domicile Certificate (Uttar Pradesh resident proof)
*   Identity Proof (Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID, Driving License)
*   Photographs (recent passport-sized color photographs)
*   Disability Certificate (if applicable)
*   Other relevant certificates as specified in the original notification.

Candidates are advised to frequently visit the official Uttar Pradesh Home Guard website for the latest updates regarding document verification schedules, venues, and further instructions. Preparing all necessary documents in advance will ensure a smooth and hassle-free verification process.

content:
## UPSC Advertisement No. 07/2026: Apply Online for 450+ Group 'A' & 'B' Posts

The Union Public Service Commission (UPSC) has released a recruitment notification, Advertisement No. 07/2026, inviting applications for over 450 Group 'A' and Group 'B' vacancies across various ministries and departments of the Government of India. This is an excellent opportunity for qualified individuals to secure a position in the central government.

### Important Dates

| Event                           | Date               |
| :------------------------------ | :----------------- |
| Online Application Start Date   | 25 June 2026       |
| Last Date to Apply Online       | 17 July 2026 (6:00 PM) |
| Last Date for Fee Payment       | 17 July 2026       |
| Recruitment Test Date (If applicable) | To be notified   |
| Interview Date (If applicable)  | To be notified   |

### Application Fee

Candidates are required to pay the application fee as detailed below:

| Category                         | Fee Amount |
| :------------------------------- | :--------- |
| General/OBC/EWS Male Candidates  | ₹25        |
| Female / SC / ST / PwBD Candidates | Nil        |

*   **Mode of Payment:** Fees can be paid online through Net Banking, Credit Card, Debit Card, or by depositing cash in any branch of SBI.

### Vacancy Details: 450 Posts

UPSC is recruiting for various Group 'A' & Group 'B' posts. A summary of the vacancies is provided below. For detailed post-wise information, candidates must refer to the official notification.

| Post Name                                                      | Department                                                        | Total Posts |
| :------------------------------------------------------------- | :---------------------------------------------------------------- | :---------- |
| Drug Inspector                                                 | CDSCO, Ministry of Health & Family Welfare                        | 186         |
| Joint Director (Crops Development Directorate)                 | Agriculture & Farmers Welfare                                     | 06          |
| Medical Officer / Research Officer (Siddha)                    | Ministry of Ayush                                                 | 01          |
| Aeronautical Officer                                           | DGCA, Ministry of Civil Aviation                                  | 11          |
| Legal Officer                                                  | DGCA, Ministry of Civil Aviation                                  | 12          |
| Company Prosecutor                                             | Ministry of Corporate Affairs                                     | 18          |
| Deputy Superintending Archaeologist                            | Archaeological Survey of India, Ministry of Culture               | 02          |
| Senior Photographic Officer                                    | Directorate of Public Relations, Ministry of Defence              | 04          |
| Photographic Officer                                           | Directorate of Public Relations, Ministry of Defence              | 02          |
| Civilian Assistant Security Officer                            | Lower Formations of Indian Army & DGQA, Ministry of Defence       | 07          |
| Store Officer (Civilian)                                       | DGAFMS, Ministry of Defence                                       | 04          |
| Specialist Grade III (Orthopaedics)                            | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 04          |
| Specialist Grade III Asst. Professor (Cardiology)              | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 09          |
| Specialist Grade III Asst. Professor (Cardiovascular & Thoracic Surgery) | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 04          |
| Specialist Grade III Asst. Professor (Neurology)               | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 21          |
| Specialist Grade III Asst. Professor (Orthopaedics) – Sports Injury Centre | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 02          |
| Specialist Grade III Asst. Professor (Paediatric Nephrology)   | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 01          |
| Specialist Grade III Asst. Professor (Paediatric Oncology)     | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 01          |
| Specialist Grade III Asst. Professor (Physical Medicine & Rehabilitation) | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 06          |
| Specialist Grade III Asst. Professor (Social & Preventive / Community Medicine) | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 11          |
| Specialist Grade III Asst. Professor (Urology)                 | Ministry of Health and Family Welfare                             | 06          |
| Assistant Director of Census Operations (Technical)            | O/o Registrar General & Census Commissioner, Ministry of Home Affairs | 09          |
| Assistant Director (Disaster Management)                       | Ministry of Home Affairs                                          | 04          |
| Library and Information Officer                                | Central Ground Water Board, Ministry of Jal Shakti                | 01          |
| Sub-Regional Employment Officer                                | Directorate General of Employment, Ministry of Labour & Employment| 11          |
| Assistant Administrative Officer                               | Indian Bureau of Mines, Ministry of Mines                         | 01          |
| Assistant Chemist                                              | Indian Bureau of Mines, Ministry of Mines                         | 04          |
| Ship Surveyor-cum-Deputy Director General (Technical)          | Directorat...                                                     | (truncated) |

### Eligibility Criteria

**Age Limit:**

*   The age limit for candidates typically ranges from **35 to 40 years**, depending on the specific post. 
*   Age relaxation will be provided for reserved categories (SC/ST/OBC/PwBD) as per Government of India norms.

**Educational Qualification:**

*   Applicants must hold a **Graduate / Post Graduate / MBBS + PG Degree** from a recognized University or Institution. 
*   Specific educational and experience requirements vary significantly for each post. Candidates are advised to check the detailed official notification for post-wise qualifications.

### Pay Scale

Selected candidates will be offered an attractive salary package as per the 7th Central Pay Commission (CPC).

*   **Pay Level:** Level-7 to Level-11 (depending on the post).
*   **Additional Benefits:** Non-Practicing Allowance (NPA) will also be applicable for medical posts.

### Selection Process

The selection process for UPSC Advertisement No. 07/2026 will generally involve the following stages:

1.  **Shortlisting:** Applications will be screened based on eligibility criteria.
2.  **Recruitment Test (RT):** If the number of applications is large, a Computer Based Recruitment Test (CBRT) may be conducted.
3.  **Interview:** Shortlisted candidates from the RT (or directly from shortlisting) will be called for an interview.
4.  **Document Verification:** Verification of original documents will be done during the interview stage.

Final selection will be based on the candidate's performance in the interview, and if applicable, the Recruitment Test.

### How to Apply for UPSC Advertisement No. 07/2026

Eligible and interested candidates must apply online through the UPSC official website. Follow these steps carefully to ensure a successful application:

1.  **Read the Notification:** Before applying, thoroughly read the official UPSC Advertisement No. 07/2026 PDF for complete details regarding eligibility criteria, vacancies, pay scale, and instructions.
2.  **Visit UPSC Online Application Portal:** Go to the official UPSC online application website (upsconline.nic.in).
3.  **One-Time Registration (OTR):** If you are a new user, you must first complete the One-Time Registration (OTR) process by providing basic personal details.
4.  **Login:** After successful OTR, log in using your registered credentials.
5.  **Fill Application Form:** Select the Advertisement No. 07/2026 and proceed to fill out the detailed application form. Provide accurate personal, educational, and experience details.
6.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your recent passport-size photograph, signature, and other required documents (e.g., educational certificates, caste certificate) in the prescribed format and size.
7.  **Pay Application Fee:** Pay the applicable application fee online using Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card. Female, SC, ST, and PwBD candidates are exempted from fee payment.
8.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the details entered in the application form before final submission. Make sure there are no errors.
9.  **Print Application:** After successful submission, take a printout of the submitted application form for your future reference. An application number will be generated; keep it safe.

Candidates are advised to apply well in advance of the last date to avoid any last-minute technical glitches.

content:
## AVNL Recruitment 2026: 1213 Executive & Non-Executive Vacancies

Armoured Vehicles Nigam Limited (AVNL), a key Defence Public Sector Undertaking (DPSU) under the Ministry of Defence, Government of India, is gearing up to announce a massive recruitment drive for 1213 Executive and Non-Executive posts. This includes roles such as Junior Technician and various other positions across its units. This is an excellent opportunity for qualified individuals seeking a stable career in the central government sector. Interested candidates are advised to keep an eye on the official AVNL website for the detailed notification and application commencement.

### Vacancy Details
The total number of vacancies announced is 1213 for various Executive and Non-Executive positions, including Junior Technician roles.

| Post Name | Total Vacancies |
|---|---|
| Executive Posts | To be announced |
| Non-Executive Posts (including Junior Technician) | To be announced |
| **Total** | **1213** |

(Specific distribution across Executive and Non-Executive posts, and for Junior Technician, will be detailed in the official notification.)

### Eligibility Criteria

#### Educational Qualification:
Candidates are generally required to possess an ITI certificate, Diploma, or a Graduate/Post-Graduate Degree in relevant engineering disciplines, science, commerce, or arts from a recognized university/institution. Specific educational requirements will vary for each post (Executive, Non-Executive, Junior Technician) and will be clearly outlined in the official AVNL Recruitment 2026 notification.

#### Age Limit:
Applicants typically need to be within the age group of 18 to 28 or 30 years as on the cut-off date. Age relaxation benefits will be provided to candidates belonging to Scheduled Castes (SC), Scheduled Tribes (ST), Other Backward Classes (OBC), Persons with Benchmark Disabilities (PwBD), and Ex-Servicemen as per the Government of India rules and regulations. Exact age criteria and relaxation details will be specified in the official advertisement.

### Application Fee
The application fee details will be announced with the release of the official notification. Based on previous recruitment patterns, the fee structure is expected to be as follows:

| Category | Application Fee |
|---|---|
| General/OBC/EWS | ₹500 (Expected) |
| SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen | Exempted / ₹250 (Expected) |

The fee will likely be payable online through Net Banking, Credit Card, Debit Card, or other specified payment gateways. Please refer to the official notification for precise fee amounts and payment methods.

### Important Dates
The exact schedule for the AVNL Recruitment 2026 will be released along with the detailed notification. Candidates should regularly check the official website for updates.

| Event | Tentative Date |
|---|---|
| Online Application Start Date | To be announced (Expected Early 2026) |
| Online Application End Date | To be announced |
| Last Date for Fee Payment | To be announced |
| Admit Card Release Date | To be announced |
| Written Examination Date | To be announced |
| Result Declaration Date | To be announced |

### Selection Process
The selection process for AVNL Executive and Non-Executive posts is likely to involve the following stages:

1.  **Written Examination:** A computer-based test (CBT) covering relevant subjects, general aptitude, and general knowledge.
2.  **Skill/Trade Test (for specific posts like Junior Technician):** Practical assessment of technical skills.
3.  **Document Verification:** Scrutiny of original documents to verify eligibility.
4.  **Medical Examination:** A medical fitness test as per AVNL standards.

The final selection will be based on the merit list prepared from the performance in the written examination and, where applicable, the skill test, followed by document verification and medical clearance.

### How to Apply for AVNL Recruitment 2026
Candidates interested in applying for the AVNL Executive and Non-Executive positions should follow these steps once the official application window opens:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the official website of Armoured Vehicles Nigam Limited (AVNL) at [Official Website URL - will be updated].
2.  **Find Recruitment Link:** Navigate to the 'Careers' or 'Recruitment' section and look for "AVNL Recruitment 2026 for Junior Technician & Executive/Non-Executive Posts" notification.
3.  **Read Notification Carefully:** Download and thoroughly read the official detailed notification to understand eligibility criteria, vacancies, application fees, and instructions.
4.  **Register/Login:** If you are a new user, register by providing basic details to create an account. If already registered, log in with your credentials.
5.  **Fill Application Form:** Fill out the online application form with all required personal, educational, and experience details accurately.
6.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, and other necessary documents as per the specified format and size.
7.  **Pay Application Fee:** Pay the prescribed application fee through the available online payment gateway (Net Banking/Credit Card/Debit Card).
8.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the entered information before final submission. Make any necessary corrections.
9.  **Print Application:** After successful submission, download and print a copy of the filled application form and fee receipt for your records.

**Note:** Ensure all details are correct as applications cannot be modified after final submission. Keep your registration number and password safe for future reference.

meta_description: The High Court of Gujarat has announced a significant recruitment drive for the position of Legal Assistant, inviting applications from eligible and aspiri
content:
## Gujarat High Court Legal Assistant Recruitment 2026: Apply for 65 Vacancies

The High Court of Gujarat has announced a significant recruitment drive for the position of Legal Assistant, inviting applications from eligible and aspiring law graduates. This recruitment aims to fill 65 vacancies, offering a prestigious opportunity to serve within the Gujarat judiciary. Candidates seeking a career in the legal support system of the state government are encouraged to review the complete notification once released and prepare for this promising opportunity.

### Vacancy Details

| Post Name         | Total Vacancies |
| :---------------- | :-------------- |
| Legal Assistant   | 65              |

### Eligibility Criteria

To be eligible for the Gujarat High Court Legal Assistant position, candidates must meet the following criteria:

*   **Educational Qualification:** Applicants must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Law (LL.B.) from a university recognized by the Bar Council of India. Further details regarding minimum marks or experience, if any, will be specified in the official notification.
*   **Age Limit:** Candidates should generally be between 18 to 35 years of age. Age relaxation will be applicable for reserved categories as per Gujarat Government rules and High Court norms. The exact crucial date for age calculation will be mentioned in the official notification.

### Application Fee

The application fee details are expected to be as follows. Please refer to the official notification for exact amounts and payment modes.

| Category        | Fee (Expected) |
| :-------------- | :------------- |
| General/OBC     | ₹500/-         |
| SC/ST/EWS/PwBD  | ₹250/-         |

*Note: Fees are typically non-refundable and must be paid online through Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card.*

### Important Dates (Expected Timeline)

Candidates should keep track of the following tentative dates for the recruitment process:

| Event                       | Date (Expected) |
| :-------------------------- | :-------------- |
| Notification Release Date   | To be announced |
| Online Application Start Date | To be announced |
| Online Application End Date | To be announced |
| Last Date for Fee Payment   | To be announced |
| Admit Card Release Date     | To be announced |
| Written Examination Date    | To be announced |
| Result Declaration Date     | To be announced |

### Salary Structure

Selected candidates for the Legal Assistant post in the Gujarat High Court will receive a competitive salary package as per the rules and regulations of the Gujarat High Court and the State Government. The detailed pay scale will be specified in the official notification.

### Selection Process

The selection process for the Gujarat High Court Legal Assistant Recruitment 2026 is expected to involve the following stages:

1.  **Written Examination:** A qualifying examination to assess general knowledge, legal aptitude, and language skills.
2.  **Viva-Voce (Interview):** Candidates shortlisted from the written exam will be called for an interview to evaluate their suitability for the role.
3.  **Document Verification:** Verification of original documents for all selected candidates.
4.  **Medical Examination:** A medical fitness test as per High Court norms.

### How to Apply

Interested and eligible candidates must apply online through the official website of the High Court of Gujarat. Follow these steps carefully:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the official recruitment portal of the High Court of Gujarat (e.g., gujarathighcourt.nic.in or hc-ojas.gujarat.gov.in).
2.  **Find the Notification:** Look for the "Recruitment" or "Latest Announcements" section and find the "Gujarat High Court Legal Assistant Recruitment 2026" notification. Download and read it thoroughly.
3.  **New Registration:** If you are a new user, click on the "Apply Online" link and complete the one-time registration process by providing basic details.
4.  **Login:** After registration, log in using your registration number and password.
5.  **Fill Application Form:** Accurately fill in all required personal, educational, and contact details in the online application form.
6.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, and other necessary documents as per the specified format and size.
7.  **Pay Application Fee:** Proceed to pay the application fee online through the available payment gateway (Net Banking/Debit Card/Credit Card).
8.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the entered information before final submission. No changes can be made after submission.
9.  **Print Application:** After successful submission and fee payment, take a printout of the submitted application form for future reference.

Candidates are strongly advised to check the official website regularly for updates and the release of the detailed notification.

### Eligibility Criteria

- Written Examination

content:
## IOCL Apprentice Recruitment 2026 – 1624 Posts

Indian Oil Corporation Limited (IOCL) invites online applications for engagement of Apprentices across its refineries. Below are the complete details.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates | Nil |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Start of Online Application | 29 June 2026 (10:00 AM) |
| Last Date for Online Application | 28 July 2026 (05:00 PM) |

### Vacancy Details
| Refinery | Total Posts |
|----------|-------------|
| Bongaigaon Refinery | 144 |
| Gujarat Refinery | 647 |
| Mathura Refinery | 151 |
| Paradip Refinery | 582 |
| Guwahati Refinery | 102 |
| **Total** | **1624** |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Trade Apprentice (ITI Trades):** Matriculation + ITI in relevant trade.
- **Technician Apprentice:** 3 years Diploma in relevant Engineering discipline.
- **Trade Apprentice (Other Posts):** B.Sc. Degree in relevant subject.
- **Trade Apprentice (DEO):** Matriculation + 12th Pass.
- **Age Limit:** 18 to 24 years as on 30.06.2026. Age relaxation applicable for SC/ST/OBC(NCL)/PwBD as per Government guidelines.

### Selection Process
- No Written Test.
- Merit based on percentage of marks in qualifying examination (descending order).
- In case of tie, older candidate (Date of Birth) will be preferred.
- Document Verification.

### How to Apply
1. Register on NAPS Portal (https://apprenticeshipindia.gov.in/) or NATS Portal (https://nats.education.gov.in/) and complete 100% profile.

3. Click on the relevant Refinery Apprentice Advertisement link.
4. Click on 'Click here to Register/Apply on NAPS/NATS' and submit your application.
5. After applying on NAPS/NATS, fill the additional information on Microsoft Forms link provided in the advertisement.
6. Submit the application before 28 July 2026. Keep a printout for future reference.

4. Register and fill the application form.
5. Upload required documents.
6. Pay fee (if applicable).

### Selection Process
The selection will be based on a written exam and skill test (where applicable). Shortlisted candidates will be called for document verification.

For more details, refer to the official notification.

content:
### AVNL Recruitment 2026: Junior Technician & Executive/Non-Executive Posts

Armoured Vehicles Nigam Limited (AVNL) is gearing up to release a significant recruitment notification for 2026, inviting applications for various Executive and Non-Executive posts, including Junior Technician roles. This drive aims to fill a total of 1213 vacancies across different disciplines within AVNL. Aspirants seeking a career in a prestigious Public Sector Undertaking under the Ministry of Defence are encouraged to keep a close watch on the official AVNL website for the detailed notification.

**Important Dates & Events:**

| Event                        | Date                     |
| :--------------------------- | :----------------------- |
| Notification Release Date    | To be announced          |
| Online Application Start Date| To be announced          |
| Last Date to Apply Online    | To be announced          |
| Last Date for Fee Payment    | To be announced          |
| Admit Card Release Date      | To be announced          |
| Written Exam Date            | To be announced          |
| Result Declaration           | To be announced          |

**Vacancy Details:**

A total of 1213 vacancies are expected for Executive and Non-Executive posts, including Junior Technicians. The detailed breakdown of vacancies per post and category will be published in the official notification.

| Post Name             | Total Vacancies (Expected) |
| :-------------------- | :------------------------- |
| Executive             | To be announced            |
| Non-Executive         | To be announced            |
| Junior Technician     | To be announced            |
| **Total**             | **1213**                   |

**Application Fee:**

The application fee structure will be detailed in the official notification. Candidates typically pay through online modes such as Net Banking, Credit Card, or Debit Card. Exact fees for different categories will be confirmed upon release of the detailed advertisement.

| Category                  | Fee Amount (Expected) |
| :------------------------ | :-------------------- |
| General/OBC/EWS           | To be announced       |
| SC/ST/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen | To be announced       |

**Eligibility Criteria:**

*   **Educational Qualification:**
    *   **Junior Technician:** Candidates are generally required to possess an ITI certificate or Diploma in a relevant engineering discipline from a recognized institute/university. Specific trade requirements will be mentioned in the official notification.
    *   **Executive Posts:** A Bachelor's Degree in Engineering/Technology or relevant postgraduate qualification from a recognized university/institution is typically required. Specific discipline requirements will vary by post.
    *   **Non-Executive Posts:** Educational qualifications may range from 10th pass with ITI, 12th pass, or a Bachelor's degree in any discipline, depending on the specific role.
    *   *Detailed post-wise qualifications will be available in the official advertisement.*
*   **Age Limit:**
    *   Minimum Age: As per AVNL norms (Expected to be 18 years).
    *   Maximum Age: As per AVNL norms (Expected to be 25-30 years for various posts).
    *   Age relaxation will be provided to candidates belonging to SC/ST/OBC/PwBD/Ex-Servicemen and other categories as per Government of India rules. The cut-off date for age calculation will be specified in the official notification.

**How to Apply:**

Interested and eligible candidates will be able to apply online through the official Armoured Vehicles Nigam Limited (AVNL) recruitment portal once the application window opens. Follow these general steps:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the official AVNL career/recruitment portal.
2.  **Registration:** Click on the "New Registration" link and provide basic details to create a user ID and password.
3.  **Login:** Use the generated credentials to log in to the applicant's dashboard.
4.  **Fill Application Form:** Complete the online application form with all required personal, educational, and experience details accurately.
5.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your recent passport-sized photograph, signature, educational certificates, caste certificate (if applicable), and any other necessary documents in the prescribed format and size.
6.  **Pay Application Fee:** Proceed to pay the application fee through the available online payment modes (Net Banking, Credit/Debit Card).
7.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the entered information before final submission. No changes may be possible after submission.
8.  **Print Application:** After successful submission and payment, take a printout of the filled application form and e-receipt for your records.

**Selection Process:**

The selection process for AVNL Executive and Non-Executive posts typically involves:

1.  **Written Examination:** A Computer Based Test (CBT) or Offline Written Exam, assessing general aptitude, subject-specific knowledge, and reasoning abilities.
2.  **Skill Test/Trade Test (for relevant posts):** Applicable for technical roles like Junior Technician where practical skills are assessed.
3.  **Document Verification:** Verification of all original documents.
4.  **Medical Examination:** A final medical fitness test.

Candidates are advised to regularly check the official AVNL website for the latest updates and the detailed official notification.

## Sainik School Amaravathinagar Recruitment 2026

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| General & OBC/MBC | ₹500 |
| SC / ST | ₹300 |

*Fee is non-refundable and payable online through SBI Collect.*

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Last Date to Apply | 30th June 2026 |

### Vacancy Details
| Post | Nature | Vacancies | Category |
|------|--------|-----------|----------|
| Mess Manager | Regular | 01 | UR |
| Medical Officer | Contractual (3 years) | 01 | UR |
| Lower Division Clerk (LDC) | Regular | 01 | UR |
| **Total** | | **03** | |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Age Limit (as on 01.08.2026):** Mess Manager & Medical Officer: 21-50 years; LDC: 18-50 years.
- **Educational Qualification:**
  - Mess Manager: Matriculation + 5 years experience in running catering organization independently. Diploma/Degree in Catering or JCO experience desirable.
  - Medical Officer: MBBS Degree. Specialization in Pediatrics and minimum 5 years experience desirable. Must be ready to stay on campus and handle 24×7 medical emergencies.
  - LDC: Matriculation + Typing speed (English 40 WPM & Hindi/Regional 35 WPM on computer). Knowledge of shorthand, accounting, computer applications desirable.

### Selection Process
- Written Test / Skill Test (Typing Test for LDC)
- Interview / Practical Test (wherever applicable)
- Document Verification & Medical Examination

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official website: [https://www.sainikschoolamaravathinagar.edu.in/careers.php](https://www.sainikschoolamaravathinagar.edu.in/careers.php)
2. Download the prescribed Application Form.
3. Fill the form carefully with all required details.
4. Pay the application fee online through SBI Collect and keep the receipt.
5. Attach self-attested copies of all educational, experience certificates, age proof, caste certificate (if applicable), and fee receipt.
6. Send the completed application form along with all enclosures by Registered Post / Speed Post to the school address mentioned in the notification.

## Bellary DCC Bank Recruitment 2026 – Apply for 82 Junior Assistant, Driver and Other Posts

Bellary DCC Bank has released a notification for the recruitment of 82 posts of Manager / First Division Assistant, Second Division Assistant, Vehicle Driver, and Junior Servant. Eligible candidates can apply online from 1 June 2026 to 30 June 2026.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| General / Category-2A / 2B / 3A / 3B | ₹1,000 + gateway charges |
| SC / ST / Category-1 / PwBD / Ex-Servicemen | ₹500 + gateway charges |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Notification Date | 1 June 2026 |
| Online Application Start Date | 1 June 2026 |
| Last Date for Online Application & Fee Payment | 30 June 2026 (23:59 hours) |
| Written Examination Date | To be notified later |

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Total Vacancies |
|-----------|----------------|
| Manager / First Division Assistant | 22 |
| Second Division Assistant | 28 |
| Vehicle Driver | 1 |
| Junior Servant | 31 |
| **Grand Total** | **82** |

### Eligibility Criteria
**Age Limit (as on last date of application):**
- General: 35 years
- Category-2A / 2B / 3A / 3B: 38 years
- SC / ST / Category-1: 40 years
- Additional relaxation for Ex-Servicemen, Differently-Abled, and Widows as per Karnataka Government norms.

**Educational Qualification (as on last date):**
- **Manager / First Division Assistant:** Degree from a recognized University + Computer knowledge + Kannada language proficiency.
- **Second Division Assistant:** Second PUC or equivalent + Computer knowledge + Kannada language proficiency.
- **Vehicle Driver:** SSLC + Valid Driving License + Kannada language proficiency.
- **Junior Servant:** SSLC + Kannada language proficiency.

### Selection Process
1. Written Examination (Objective Type – post-specific syllabus)
2. Personal Interview
Final merit list will be prepared on the basis of marks in Written Exam + Interview. Minimum qualifying marks in written exam: 85 out of 100 / 200 (as applicable).

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official website https://www.bellarydcc.bank.in.
2. Click on “BDCC RECRUITMENT 2026” link.
3. Register with valid email and mobile.
4. Fill the online application form with correct details.
5. Upload scanned photograph, signature, and required documents.

7. Submit the form and take a printout for future reference.

content:
## UP TET Admit Card 2026 Download

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Board has released the admit card for the UP TET (Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test) 2026. Candidates who have applied for the exam can now download their hall tickets from the official website. The admit card is a crucial document for entry to the examination center. It contains details such as candidate's name, roll number, exam date, time, and venue. Candidates must verify all details and carry a printed copy along with a valid photo ID to the exam hall.

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Admit Card Release Date | To be announced |
| Exam Date | To be announced |

### Exam Day Guidelines

- Reach the exam center at least 1 hour before the reporting time.
- Carry a printed copy of the admit card and a valid photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, Passport, etc.).
- Do not carry any electronic devices, bags, or prohibited items.
- Follow all COVID-19 protocols if applicable.

### Documents to Carry

- UP TET 2026 Admit Card (printed)
- One passport-size photograph (same as on application)
- Valid photo ID proof (original)

### How to Download

1. Visit the official website: [updeled.gov.in](http://updeled.gov.in)
2. Click on the 'Admit Card' link for UP TET 2026.
3. Enter your registration number and date of birth/password.
4. Click on 'Submit' to view your admit card.
5. Download and take a printout.

### Important Links

- [Official Website](http://updeled.gov.in)
- [Admit Card Download Link](http://updeled.gov.in) (when active)

### Contact Information

For any queries, contact the UP Basic Education Board helpline or email.

content:
## NGEL Engineer Recruitment 2026: Apply for 114 DGM & Assistant Engineer Posts

NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL), a leading subsidiary of NTPC Limited, invites online applications from dynamic and experienced professionals for various posts in the Renewable Energy domain. This recruitment drive aims to fill 114 vacancies for Deputy General Manager (RE) and Assistant Engineer (RE) positions on a regular basis. Aspiring candidates with a strong background in engineering and relevant experience are encouraged to apply.

### Vacancy Details

The distribution of vacancies for NGEL Recruitment 2026 is as follows:

| Post Name                                                      | No. of Vacancies |
| :------------------------------------------------------------- | :--------------- |
| Deputy General Manager – Renewable Energy (DGM-RE) – E6        | 14               |
| Assistant Engineer – Renewable Energy (Asset Management / O&M) – E0 | 100              |
| **Total Vacancies**                                            | **114**          |

### Eligibility Criteria

Candidates must meet the specified age limits and educational qualifications along with relevant experience for each post:

| Post Name                                                      | Age Limit     | Qualification & Experience                                                                                                                              |
| :------------------------------------------------------------- | :------------ | :------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ |
| Deputy General Manager – Renewable Energy (DGM-RE) – E6        | Maximum 44 years | Engineering Degree in relevant discipline + Minimum 12 years of relevant experience in Renewable Energy sector (as per detailed notification).             |
| Assistant Engineer – Renewable Energy (Asset Management / O&M) – E0 | Maximum 40 years | Engineering Degree in relevant discipline + Minimum 10 years of relevant experience in Renewable Energy (Asset Management / O&M) (as per detailed notification). |

**Note:** Age relaxation will be applicable as per Government/Company rules. Detailed educational qualification and experience requirements are available in the official notification on the NGEL website.

### Pay Scale

The selected candidates will be offered an attractive pay scale along with other allowances as per company rules:

*   **Deputy General Manager (E6):** ₹90,000 – ₹2,40,000
*   **Assistant Engineer (E0):** ₹30,000 – ₹1,20,000

### Selection Process

The selection process for NGEL Engineer Recruitment 2026 generally includes the following stages, as will be detailed in the official advertisement:

1.  **Shortlisting:** Candidates will be shortlisted based on their eligibility criteria and experience.
2.  **Interview:** Shortlisted candidates will undergo an interview process.
3.  **Document Verification:** Successful candidates will be required to undergo document verification.

### Application Fee

Application fee details are crucial and will be specified in the official notification. Candidates are advised to refer to the official advertisement for exact amounts and payment instructions.

| Category           | Fee Amount          | Remarks                                         |
| :----------------- | :------------------ | :---------------------------------------------- |
| General / OBC / EWS | As per notification | Check official notification for exact fee details |
| SC / ST / PwBD     | As per notification | Check official notification for exact fee details |

### Important Dates

Mark these important dates for the NGEL Recruitment 2026:

| Event                      | Date           |
| :------------------------- | :------------- |
| Online Application Starts  | 11 July 2026   |
| Last Date to Apply Online  | 31 July 2026   |

### How to Apply for NGEL Recruitment 2026

Eligible and interested candidates must apply online through the official NGEL website. Follow the step-by-step instructions below:

1.  **Visit Official Website:** Go to the official NTPC Green Energy Limited (NGEL) website: `https://ngel.in`.
2.  **Navigate to Careers:** On the homepage, locate and click on the 'Careers' or 'Recruitment' section.
3.  **Find Advertisement:** Search for 'Advertisement No. 02/26 – Recruitment of Professionals in Renewable Energy' and click on the relevant link to access the detailed notification.
4.  **Read Notification:** Carefully read the entire detailed advertisement to ensure you meet all the eligibility criteria, understand the application process, and are aware of all terms and conditions.
5.  **Registration/Login:** If you are a new user, register yourself by providing the required basic information. If already registered, log in using your credentials.
6.  **Fill Application Form:** Complete the online application form with accurate personal details, educational qualifications, work experience, and other necessary information.
7.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your photograph, signature, educational certificates, experience certificates, and any other required documents as specified in the notification, ensuring they meet the prescribed format and size.
8.  **Pay Application Fee:** If an application fee is applicable, proceed to pay it through the available online payment gateway (e.g., Net Banking, Credit Card, Debit Card).
9.  **Review and Submit:** Before final submission, review all the entered details thoroughly to avoid any errors. Once satisfied, submit the application form.
10. **Print Application:** After successful submission, download and print a copy of your submitted application form for your records and future reference.

### Important Links

*   **Official Website:** [https://ngel.in](https://ngel.in)
*   **Official Career Section:** Candidates are advised to regularly check the 'Careers' section on the official NGEL website for the detailed notification and direct application link once active.

## Daily Current Affairs – 30 June 2026

Stay ahead in your exam preparation with the key current affairs from 30 June 2026. This compilation covers important events across national and international spheres.

- **PM Modi Seychelles Honour**: Prime Minister Narendra Modi was conferred with the highest civilian award of Seychelles.

content:
## UPTET Admit Card 2026 Released

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Board (UPBEB) has officially released the Admit Cards for the Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET) 2026. This vital document is now available for all candidates who have successfully submitted their applications for the upcoming examination. The UPTET is a significant eligibility test for individuals aspiring to become teachers in government and government-aided schools across Uttar Pradesh.

Candidates are strongly advised to download their admit cards promptly and take a printout for future reference and exam day use. The admit card contains essential details such as the candidate's name, roll number, examination center, date, and time of the examination.

### Important Dates

Refer to the table below for the key dates related to the UPTET 2026 Admit Card and Examination:

| Event | Date |
| :------------------------- | :--------------- |
| UPTET 2026 Application Dates | [To be Updated] |
| Admit Card Release Date | **Released** |
| UPTET 2026 Exam Date | [To be Announced] |
| Result Declaration | [To be Announced] |

### How to Download UPTET Admit Card 2026

Follow these steps to download your UPTET 2026 Admit Card:

1.  **Visit the Official Website:** Go to the official website of the Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Board (UPBEB) or the designated UPTET portal (e.g., updeled.gov.in).
2.  **Locate Admit Card Link:** Look for the 'UPTET Admit Card 2026 Download' link on the homepage.
3.  **Enter Credentials:** Click on the link and enter your Registration Number and Password (or Date of Birth) as required.
4.  **Submit and Download:** After entering the details, click on the 'Submit' or 'Login' button. Your admit card will be displayed on the screen.
5.  **Print Admit Card:** Download the admit card and take a clear printout. It is recommended to keep multiple copies for safety.

### Exam Day Guidelines

Candidates appearing for the UPTET 2026 examination must adhere to the following guidelines:

*   **Reporting Time:** Reach the examination center well in advance of the reporting time mentioned on your admit card to complete pre-exam formalities.
*   **Mandatory Documents:** You must carry a printed copy of your UPTET Admit Card 2026 and a valid original photo identity proof (such as Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID, Driving License, or Passport).
*   **Prohibited Items:** Electronic gadgets, including mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, and any other unauthorized materials, are strictly prohibited inside the examination hall.
*   **Instructions:** Follow all instructions provided by the invigilators and maintain decorum throughout the examination.
*   **COVID-19 Protocols:** Candidates must comply with any prevailing COVID-19 related safety protocols and guidelines, if applicable, as instructed by the authorities.

### Documents Required for Verification

On the day of the examination, ensure you have the following documents ready for verification:

*   **Printed UPTET Admit Card 2026:** A clear and legible printout of your downloaded admit card.
*   **Original Photo Identity Proof:** Any one of the following original photo ID proofs: Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Voter ID, Driving License, or Passport.
*   **Passport-size Photographs:** Carry 1-2 recent passport-size photographs, similar to the one uploaded during the application process (check your admit card for specific requirements).

content:
## Bank of India (BOI) Credit Officer Recruitment 2026

Bank of India (BOI) has released a recruitment notification for Credit Officers in the GBO Stream, inviting applications for a total of 779 vacancies. This presents an excellent career opportunity for dynamic and experienced individuals in the banking sector. Candidates meeting the specified eligibility criteria are encouraged to apply online.

### Important Dates

| Event                               | Date           |
| :---------------------------------- | :------------- |
| Commencement of Online Application  | 30 June 2026   |
| Last Date for Online Application    | 20 July 2026   |
| Online Examination (Tentative)      | Will be advised separately |

### Vacancy Details

A total of 779 Credit Officer positions are available across different scales, as detailed below:

| Post Name         | Scale    | Total Posts | Age Limit (as on 01.06.2026) | Required Experience                 |
| :---------------- | :------- | :---------- | :--------------------------- | :---------------------------------- |
| Credit Officers   | MMGS-II  | 677         | 25-32 years                  | Min. 3 years (2 years in Credit Processing) |
| (GBO Stream)      | MMGS-III | 61          | 28-38 years                  | Min. 5 years (3 years in Credit Processing) |
|                   | SMGS-IV  | 41          | 32-45 years                  | Min. 7 years (4 years in Credit Processing) |
| **Total**         |          | **779**     |                              |                                     |

### Eligibility Criteria

**1. Educational Qualification:**
*   Graduation in any discipline with a minimum of 60% marks (55% for SC/ST/OBC/PwBD candidates) **OR**
*   Professional qualifications such as CA / CMA-ICWA / CS / CFA.

**2. Work Experience (Post Qualification as Officer):**
*   **MMGS-II:** Minimum 3 years of post-qualification experience as an officer, out of which at least 2 years must be in processing of MSME / Commercial / Project / Mid & Large Credit.
*   **MMGS-III:** Minimum 5 years of post-qualification experience as an officer, out of which at least 3 years must be in credit processing.
*   **SMGS-IV:** Minimum 7 years of post-qualification experience as an officer, out of which at least 4 years must be in credit processing.

**3. Preferred Qualification:**
*   2 years Post-Graduation in Commerce / Banking / Finance / Management or MBA / PGDBM or Certified Credit Professional courses from IIBF / Moody’s / recognized institutions.

### Age Limit

*   **General Age Range:** 25 to 45 years (as on June 1, 2026)
*   **Scale-wise Age Limits:**
    *   MMGS-II: 25-32 years
    *   MMGS-III: 28-38 years
    *   SMGS-IV: 32-45 years
*   Age relaxation will be provided to reserved categories as per Government of India norms.

### Application Fee

Candidates are required to pay the application fee online as per their category:

| Category               | Application Fee (Inclusive of GST) |
| :--------------------- | :--------------------------------- |
| General & Other Candidates | ₹850                               |
| SC / ST / PwBD         | ₹175 (Intimation Charges only)     |

*   The fee must be paid online between June 30, 2026, and July 20, 2026.

### Selection Process

The selection process for BOI Credit Officer Recruitment 2026 will consist of two main stages:

1.  **Online Examination:** This will evaluate candidates on their English Language and Professional Knowledge.
2.  **Personal Interview:** Candidates shortlisted from the online examination will be called for a personal interview.

### How to Apply

Eligible and interested candidates must apply online through the official Bank of India recruitment portal by following the detailed steps below:

1.  **Access the Official Website:** Visit the Bank of India's official website at `https://bankofindia.bank.in/`. Navigate to the 'Career' section.
2.  **New Registration:** If you are a new user, register yourself by providing a valid email ID and mobile number. This will generate your provisional registration number and password.
3.  **Fill Application Form:** Log in using your credentials and proceed to fill out the online application form. Ensure all personal, educational, and professional experience details are accurately entered.
4.  **Upload Documents:** Upload scanned copies of your recent passport-sized photograph, signature, left thumb impression, and a handwritten declaration as per the specifications mentioned in the official notification. Also, upload any other required documents/certificates.
5.  **Pay Application Fee:** Pay the requisite application fee online through the available payment gateway options (Debit Card, Credit Card, Internet Banking, UPI).
6.  **Review and Submit:** Carefully review all the details filled in the application form before final submission. Once satisfied, submit the application.
7.  **Print Application:** After successful submission, take a printout of the e-receipt and the submitted application form for your records and future reference.

### Important Links

*   **Official Notification PDF Download:** (Link will be provided on the official website)
*   **Apply Online:** (Link will be active on the official website's career page from 30 June 2026)
*   **Bank of India Official Website:** [https://bankofindia.bank.in/](https://bankofindia.bank.in/)

content:
## UPTET 2026 Admit Card Download Details

The Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Board (UPBEB) has made the Admit Cards for the Uttar Pradesh Teacher Eligibility Test (UPTET) 2026 available for download. This is a crucial step for all aspiring teachers in Uttar Pradesh to ensure their eligibility to sit for the examination.

### Important Dates and Schedules

Candidates should keep track of the following key dates related to the UPTET 2026 examination and admit card download process. Please note that exact dates are subject to official announcements and candidates are advised to regularly check the official website.

| Event                      | Date/Timeline       |
| :------------------------- | :------------------ |
| Admit Card Download Start  | To be announced     |
| Admit Card Download End    | To be announced     |
| UPTET 2026 Examination Date | To be announced     |
| Result Declaration         | To be announced     |

### Steps to Download Your UPTET 2026 Admit Card

To ensure a smooth download process, follow these simple steps:

1.  **Visit the Official Portal**: Navigate to the official website of the Uttar Pradesh Basic Education Board (UPBEB).
2.  **Locate Admit Card Link**: On the homepage, find and click on the link specifically for 'UPTET 2026 Admit Card Download'.
3.  **Enter Credentials**: You will be prompted to enter your Registration Number and Date of Birth (or password) in the designated fields.
4.  **Security Check**: Complete the captcha verification if required to prove you are not a robot.
5.  **Access Admit Card**: Click the 'Submit' or 'Login' button to view your admit card.
6.  **Verify Details**: Carefully check all information printed on your admit card, including your name, photograph, signature, exam date, time, and venue.
7.  **Download and Print**: Download the admit card in PDF format and take multiple clear printouts. It is highly recommended to keep a digital copy as well.

### Essential Exam Day Guidelines

Candidates must adhere to the following guidelines on the day of the examination:

*   **Mandatory Documents**: Carry a printout of your UPTET 2026 Admit Card along with a valid photo identity proof (Aadhar Card, PAN Card, Passport, Driving License, Voter ID) in original. Without these, entry to the examination hall will be denied.
*   **Reporting Time**: Arrive at the examination centre well before the reporting time mentioned on your admit card to complete pre-exam formalities smoothly.
*   **Prohibited Items**: Do not carry any electronic gadgets such as mobile phones, smartwatches, calculators, or study material into the examination hall. Any such items will lead to disqualification.
*   **COVID-19 Protocols**: Follow all prevailing COVID-19 safety protocols, including wearing a mask, maintaining social distancing, and carrying personal hand sanitizer, as per the guidelines issued by the authorities.
*   **Rough Work**: All rough work must be done only in the space provided in the test booklet.
*   **Instructions**: Read all instructions on the admit card and the question paper carefully before attempting the exam.

### Verification Documents for Examination

Candidates must carry the following documents to the examination center for verification purposes:

1.  **UPTET 2026 Admit Card**: A clear printout of the downloaded admit card.
2.  **Original Photo ID Proof**: Any one of the following original, valid photo identification cards:
    *   Aadhar Card
    *   PAN Card
    *   Driving License
    *   Passport
    *   Voter ID Card
3.  **Recent Passport Size Photograph**: Although not always explicitly required for entry, it is advisable to carry a couple of recent passport-sized photographs (matching the one uploaded in the application form) for any unforeseen circumstances or last-minute verification requirements.

Candidates are strongly advised to check the official website regularly for any further updates or announcements regarding the UPTET 2026 examination.

**Q: What are the qualifications for law jobs?**
A: Bachelor's Degree in Law (LLB) is the minimum requirement. Some posts require Master's in Law (M.L.) or enrollment as an Advocate.

**Q: Which sectors provide maximum law jobs?**
A: Government sectors such as District Courts, High Courts, Public Sector Companies, Ministry of Law and Justice, Government Universities, Public Sector Banks, Railways, and UPSC.

**Q: What does LLB stand for?**
A: LLB stands for Legum Baccalaureus (Latin) or Bachelor of Law Degree.

content:
## DMRC Assistant Manager & Manager (Utility Diversion) Recruitment 2026

Delhi Metro Rail Corporation Ltd. (DMRC) invites applications from experienced and retired professionals from PSUs, State Transmission Utilities (STU), or Metro's for the post of Assistant Manager / Manager (Utility Diversion) on Post Retirement Contractual Engagement (PRCE) basis. The recruitment is for 01 vacancy on a contractual basis. The last date for receipt of applications is 10th July 2026.

### Vacancy Details
| Post Name | Post Code | Vacancies | Age Limit (as on 01.06.2026) | Qualification & Experience | Pay Scale (Consolidated) |
|-----------|-----------|-----------|-----------------------------|---------------------------|--------------------------|
| Manager (Utility Diversion) | 02/M/UD | 01 | 55 – 62 years | Working in or retired from PSUs/STU/Metro's; Minimum 05 years experience in diversion/shifting/relocation of 400kV/220kV/132kV/110kV/66kV transmission line utilities at Gazetted/Executive level; Pay Scale: CDA Level-11 (₹67,700-2,08,700) or IDA ₹60,000-1,80,000 or above | ₹75,200 – ₹96,600 per month |
| Assistant Manager (Utility Diversion) | 01/AM/UD | 01 | 55 – 62 years | Working in or retired from PSUs/STU/Metro's; Minimum 03 years experience in diversion/shifting/relocation of 400kV/220kV/132kV/110kV/66kV transmission line utilities at Gazetted/Executive level; Pay Scale: CDA Level-9/10 or IDA ₹50,000-1,60,000 | ₹75,200 – ₹96,600 per month |

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates | Nil (No Application Fee) |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Last Date for Receipt of Application | 10 July 2026 |
| Shortlisting / Screening (Tentative) | Third / Fourth week of July 2026 |
| Final Result (Tentative) | Fifth week of July 2026 |

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Age Limit:** 55 to 62 years as on 01.06.2026.
- **Experience:** Minimum 3 years (for Assistant Manager) or 5 years (for Manager) in utility diversion of high voltage transmission lines from PSUs/STU/Metro's at Gazetted/Executive level.
- **Other:** Candidates currently working in PSUs/STU/Metro's can apply provided they opt for retirement (VRS or otherwise) before joining DMRC. Must be free from D&AR and Vigilance angle. Conversant with computerized environment.

### Selection Process
1. Personal Interview
2. Medical Fitness Examination (Executive/Technical category)

### How to Apply
Eligible candidates must apply through Speed Post or Email. The application steps are as follows:
1. Download the Application Form from the official DMRC notification PDF.
2. Fill the application form carefully and attach all required documents (educational qualifications, experience certificates, pay scale proof, APARs of last 5 years, Vigilance & D&AR clearance, etc.).
3. Candidates working in PSUs/STU/Metro's must apply through proper channel with NOC / clearance from their current employer.
4. Send the duly filled application in a sealed envelope superscribing “Application for the post of Manager / Assistant Manager (Utility Diversion) – Advt. No. DMRC/PERS/22/HR/2026(232)” by Speed Post to:
   Additional General Manager (HR/Project)
   Delhi Metro Rail Corporation Ltd.
   Metro Bhawan, Fire Brigade Lane, Barakhamba Road, New Delhi
   OR Email the scanned copy to career@dmrc.org (mention Advt. No. in the subject line).
5. Ensure the application reaches on or before 10th July 2026.

### Important Links
- [Detailed Notification & Application Form PDF](#)
- [Official DMRC Website](https://www.delhimetrorail.com)

### Job Location
Delhi / NCR (liable to transfer anywhere in India/Abroad)

content:
## DESIDOC Apprentice Recruitment 2026 – Overview

The Defence Scientific Information & Documentation Centre (DESIDOC), under DRDO, invites applications for engagement of Apprentices under the Apprentices Act, 1961 for one year training. A total of 20 vacancies are available in Library & Information Science, Computer Science, and Photography/Videography disciplines.

### Vacancy Details
| Discipline | No. of Vacancies |
|------------|------------------|
| Library & Information Science | 16 |
| Computer Science | 02 |
| Photography / Videography | 02 |

### Eligibility Criteria
| Discipline | Age Limit | Essential Qualification | Stipend |
|------------|-----------|------------------------|---------|
| Library & Information Science | Max 28 years | Graduation + Degree in Library & Information Science (One year) from recognized University/Institute | ₹12,300/- per month |
| Computer Science | Max 28 years | B.E. in Computer Science OR Three Years Diploma in Computer Science from recognized University/Institute | ₹12,300/- (Graduate) / ₹10,900/- (Diploma) per month |
| Photography / Videography | Max 28 years | Three Years Diploma in Photography or Videography OR ITI Certificate from Recognized University/Institute | ₹10,900/- per month |

**Note:** Only candidates who passed their qualifying examination in 2024 or 2025 are eligible. Candidates with post-graduate qualification or who have undergone apprenticeship training/job experience of one year or more after essential qualification are not eligible. Mandatory registration on NATS portal (nats.education.gov.in) is required before applying.

### Application Fee
| Category | Fee |
|----------|-----|
| All Candidates | Nil |

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Start Date to Apply | 10 June 2026 |
| Last Date to Submit Application | 01 July 2026 |

### Selection Process
- Shortlisting on merit basis (percentage/marks in essential qualification)
- Written Test / Interview
- Document Verification

### How to Apply
1. Download the application form from the DRDO website (www.drdo.gov.in) under 'What's New' section.
2. Fill the application form carefully and attach self-attested xerox copies of all relevant documents (educational certificates, caste certificate if applicable, etc.).
3. Register yourself on the National Apprenticeship Training Scheme (NATS) portal (https://nats.education.gov.in) before applying (mandatory).
4. Send the duly filled application form along with documents by Post or by Hand to: Director, Defence Scientific Information & Documentation Centre (DESIDOC), Metcalfe House, Civil Lines, Delhi – 110054.
5. Superscribe the envelope clearly with 'Application for the post of Apprentice in [Discipline Name]'. Ensure the application reaches within 21 days from the date of advertisement (latest by 01 July 2026).

**Note:** Only shortlisted candidates will be called for written test/interview. All correspondence will be done through email.

### Eligibility Criteria
- **Educational Qualification**: MBBS degree from a recognized university/institute. For specialist posts, MD/MS in relevant specialty.
- **Internship**: Completion of compulsory rotatory internship.
- **Registration**: Valid registration with MCI or State Medical Council.
- **Experience**: Varies by post; freshers can apply for GDMO and Medical Officer posts.

### Age Limit
- General: 30-40 years (depending on post)
- OBC: 3-5 years relaxation
- SC/ST: 5-10 years relaxation
- PwD: 10-15 years relaxation
- Ex-servicemen: As per government norms

### How to Apply
1. Visit the official website of the respective organization.
2. Read the detailed notification carefully.
3. Click on the online application link.
4. Register with a valid email ID and mobile number.
5. Fill in the application form with accurate details.
6. Upload scanned copies of photograph, signature, and required certificates.
7. Pay the application fee through online mode.
8. Submit the application and take a printout for future reference.

### Frequently Asked Questions
**Q: What are the best government job options for MBBS doctors in India in 2026?**
A: MBBS graduates can apply for roles like Medical Officer, General Duty Medical Officer (GDMO), Specialist Officer, and Insurance Medical Officer in organizations such as ESIC, AIIMS, Railways, PSUs, state health departments, and central government ministries.

**Q: How can fresh MBBS graduates find government jobs in India?**
A: Freshers should regularly check official websites of UPSC, ESIC, state PSCs, AIIMS, and central PSUs. Many entry-level Medical Officer and GDMO posts are open to recent graduates with MCI/State Medical Council registration.

**Q: What is the average salary for MBBS doctors in government sector jobs?**
A: Starting salary for MBBS doctors in government roles typically ranges from ₹56,100 to ₹80,000 per month (Level 10-11 of 7th CPC), plus allowances like HRA, DA, and NPA (Non-Practicing Allowance) of 20%.

**Q: Which organizations frequently recruit MBBS doctors for Medical Officer posts?**
A: Key recruiters include ESIC, Indian Railways, Armed Forces Medical Services, AIIMS, Central/State Health Services, PSUs like ONGC, IOCL, and state government hospitals and medical colleges.

**Q: Are there government job opportunities for MBBS doctors without postgraduate degrees?**
A: Yes, numerous posts like General Duty Medical Officer, Junior Resident, and Medical Officer in ESIC, Railways, and state services are available exclusively for MBBS holders without requiring MD/MS.

**Q: How to apply for central government MBBS doctor vacancies in 2026?**
A: Most applications are online through official portals like UPSC, ESIC recruitment site, or individual organization websites. Candidates need valid MCI registration and must complete registration before the deadline.

**Q: What are the age limits for MBBS government jobs in India?**
A: General age limit is 30-40 years depending on the post and organization, with relaxations of 3-5 years for OBC, 5-10 years for SC/ST, and additional for PwD and ex-servicemen as per government rules.

**Q: Which state governments offer the most MBBS doctor vacancies?**
A: States like Uttar Pradesh, Maharashtra, Rajasthan, Bihar, and Madhya Pradesh regularly announce large-scale recruitments for Medical Officers through their state Public Service Commissions and health departments.

content:
## TG TET June 2026 Answer Key Released

The Telangana State Council of Higher Education (TSCHE) has released the answer key for the TG TET June 2026 examination. Candidates can now download their response sheet and raise objections if needed.

### Important Dates

| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Exam Date | June 2026 |
| Answer Key Release | [Date] |
| Last Date to Raise Objections | [Date] |

### How to Download Answer Key

1. Visit the official website: [https://tgtet.telangana.gov.in](https://tgtet.telangana.gov.in)
2. Click on the 'Answer Key' link.
3. Enter your login credentials.
4. Download the response sheet.

### Raising Objections

Candidates can raise objections against the answer key by providing valid supporting documents. The objection window will remain open for a limited period. No objections will be entertained after the deadline.

### Exam Day Guidelines

- Carry a printed copy of the admit card and a valid photo ID.
- Reach the exam center at least 30 minutes before the reporting time.
- Follow all COVID-19 protocols if applicable.

### Verification Documents

- Admit Card
- Photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, etc.)
- Passport size photographs

### Cut-off Marks

The cut-off marks will be released along with the final result. Candidates are advised to check the official website for updates.

### Download Updates

Stay tuned to the official website for the latest updates regarding the TG TET June 2026 results and further processes.

content:
## HTET Admit Card 2026 - Haryana TET Hall Ticket

The Haryana Board of School Education (BSEH) has activated the download link for the HTET 2026 admit card. Candidates can obtain their hall ticket from 1st July 2026.

### Important Dates
| Event | Date |
|-------|------|
| Admit Card Release | 1st July 2026 |
| Exam Date | To be announced |

### How to Download
1. Go to the official BSEH website: bseh.org.in.
2. Click on the 'HTET Admit Card 2026' link.
3. Enter your application number and date of birth.
4. Submit to view and download your admit card.

### Exam Day Guidelines
- Carry a printed copy of the admit card along with a valid photo ID (Aadhaar, Voter ID, etc.).
- Reach the exam center at least 30 minutes before the reporting time.
- Electronic devices, books, and notes are strictly prohibited.

### Documents to Carry
- HTET Admit Card 2026
- Passport size photograph (same as on application)
- Valid photo ID proof

For any discrepancies in the admit card, contact BSEH helpline immediately.
